ndinonyorovesa uvato hwangu nemisodzi.
Meso angu aneta nokuchema;
haachaoni nokuda kwavavengi vangu vose.
Ibvai pandiri, imi mose munoita zvakaipa,
nokuti Jehovha anzwa kuchema kwangu.
Jehovha anzwa kukumbira kwangu nyasha;
Jehovha anogamuchira munyengetero wangu.
Vavengi vangu vose vachanyadziswa uye vachavhundutswa;
vachadzokera shure pakarepo mukunyadziswa.
Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu, ndinovanda mamuri;
ndiponesei uye mundirwire pane vose vanondidzinganisa,
kuti varege kundibvambura seshumba
nokundibvambura-bvambura pasina anondinunura.
Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu,
kana ndichinge ndakaita izvi uye ndine mhosva pamaoko angu,
kana ndakaita zvakaipa kuno uya akanga ane rugare neni
kana kupamba muvengi wangu pasina mhaka,
ipapo muvengi wangu ngaandidzinganise andibate;
ngaatsike-tsike upenyu hwangu muvhu
uye andivatise muguruva.
Simukai, imi Jehovha pakutsamwa kwenyu;
simukai murwise hasha dzavavengi vangu.
Simukai, Mwari wangu; rayirai kururamisira.
Marudzi akaungana ngaaungane akakupoteredzai.
Vatongei imi muri kumusoro;
Jehovha ngaatonge marudzi.
Nditongei, imi Jehovha, zvakafanira kururama kwangu,
zvakafanira kukwaniswa kwangu, imi Wokumusoro-soro.
Haiwa, Mwari akarurama,
iyemi munonzvera ndangariro nomwoyo,
gumisai kuita nesimba kwavakaipa
mugoita kuti vakarurama vagare zvakanaka.
Nhoo yangu ndimi Mwari Wokumusoro-soro,
iye anoponesa vane mwoyo yakarurama.
Mwari ndiye mutongi akarurama,
iye Mwari anoratidza hasha dzake zuva nezuva.
Kana munhu asingatendeuki,
iye acharodza munondo wake;
achakunga uta hwake agogadzirira.
Agadzirira zvombo zvake zvinouraya;
anozvigadzirira miseve yake inopisa.
Iye ane mimba yezvakaipa
akatakura mimba yokutambudzika achabereka nhema.
Uyo anochera gomba,
akaridzikisa achawira mugomba raachera.
Zvakashata zvake zvichadzokera pamusoro wake;
uye kumanikidza kwake kuchauya pamusoro wake.
Ndichatenda Jehovha nokuda kwokururama kwake,
uye ndichaimbira zita raJehovha Wokumusoro-soro nziyo dzokurumbidza.
Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu,
zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose!
Makaisa kubwinya kwenyu
kudenga kumusoro.
Pamiromo yavana navacheche
makaisa rumbidzo
nokuda kwavavengi venyu,
kuti munyaradze muvengi nomutsivi.
Kana ndichifunga nezvamatenga enyu,
iro basa reminwe yenyu,
mwedzi nenyeredzi,
zvamakarongedza panzvimbo yazvo,
munhu chiiko zvamunomufunga,
kana mwanakomana womunhu zvamune hanya naye?
Makamuita muduku zvishoma pana Mwari,
uye mukamushongedza korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa.
Makamuita mutongi pamusoro pebasa ramaoko enyu;
mukaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake:
makwai ose nemombe,
nemhuka dzesango,
neshiri dzedenga,
nehove dzegungwa,
zvose zvinofamba munzira dzomugungwa.
Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu,
zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose!
Ndichakurumbidzai, imi Jehovha, nomwoyo wangu wose;
ndichataura pamusoro pezvishamiso zvenyu zvose.
Ndichafara nokufarisisa mamuri;
ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza, imi Wokumusoro-soro.
Vavengi vangu vanodzokera shure;
vanogumburwa uye vanoparara pamberi penyu.
Nokuti makatsigira kodzero yangu nenyaya yangu;
makagara pachigaro chenyu choushe, muchitonga zvakarurama kwazvo.
Makatuka ndudzi mukaparadza vakaipa;
makadzima zita ravo nokusingaperi.
Kuparadzwa kusina magumo kwakakunda muvengi,
makadzura maguta avo;
kunyange chiyeuchidzo chavo chakaparara.
Jehovha anotonga nokusingaperi;
akasimbisa chigaro chake choushe kuti atonge.
Achatonga nyika nokururama;
achatonga marudzi nokururamisira.
Jehovha ndiye nhare yavakamanikidzwa,
nhare yakasimba panguva yokutambudzika.
Vanoziva zita renyu vachavimba nemi,
nokuti imi, Jehovha hamuna kumbosiya avo vanokutsvakai.
Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokurumbidza,
iye agere pachigaro choushe muZioni; paridzai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi.
Nokuti iye anotsiva ropa anorangarira;
haashayiri hanya kuchema kwavanotambudzwa.
Haiwa Jehovha, onai kuti vavengi vangu vanonditambudza sei!
Ndinzwirei ngoni mundisimudze pamasuo orufu,
kuti ndiparidze kurumbidzwa kwenyu
mumasuo oMwanasikana weZioni,
uye ndigofara muruponeso rwenyu.
Ndudzi dzakawira mugomba radzakachera;
tsoka dzavo dzakabatwa nemimbure yavakaviga.
Jehovha anozivikanwa nokururamisira kwake;
vakaipa vakateyiwa namabasa amaoko avo. Higayoni. Sera
Vakaipa vanodzokera kuguva,
idzo ndudzi dzose dzinokanganwa Mwari.
Asi vanoshayiwa havangagari vachikanganwikwa,
uye tariro yavanotambudzwa haingaparari.
Simukai, Jehovha, munhu ngaarege kukunda;
ndudzi ngadzitongwe pamberi penyu.
Varovei nokutyisa, imi Jehovha;
ndudzi ngadzizive kuti vanongova vanhu zvavo. Sera
Munomirireiko kure, imi Jehovha?
Munozvivanzireiko panguva yokutambudzika?
Pakuzvikudza kwake munhu akaipa anovhima vasina simba,
vanobatwa namano okufunga kwake.
Anozvirumbidza pamusoro pezvinopangwa nomwoyo wake;
anoropafadza vanokara uye anozvidza Jehovha.
Pakuzvikudza kwake akaipa haamutsvaki;
mundangariro dzake dzose hamuna nzvimbo yaMwari.
Nzira dzake dzinobudirira nguva dzose;
anozvikudza uye mirayiro yenyu iri kure naye;
anodadira vavengi vake vose.
Anoti pakufunga kwake, “Hakuna chichandizungunusa;
ndichagara ndakafara uye handingatongotambudziki.”
Muromo wake uzere nokutuka, kureva nhema, uye nokutyisidzira;
matambudziko nezvakaipa zviri pasi porurimi rwake.
Anovandira ari pedyo nemisha;
pakuvandira uku anouraya vasina mhosva,
ari panzvimbo yakavanzika anotarira vaachaparadza.
Anovandira seshumba iri panzvimbo yayo;
anovandira kuti abate vasina anovabatsira;
anobata vasina anobatsira uye anovakweva achienda navo mumumbure wake.
Vabatwa vake anovapwanya, vanowa;
vanowira pasi pesimba rake.
Anoti mumwoyo make, “Mwari akanganwa;
akafukidza chiso chake uye haazoonizve.”
Simukai, imi Jehovha! Simudzai ruoko rwenyu, imi Mwari.
Regai kukanganwa vanomanikidzwa.
Munhu akaipa anozvidzireiko Mwari?
Seiko achiti mumwoyo make,
“Haazondibvunzi?”
Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, munoona kutambudzika nokusuwa;
munokutarisisa kuti mukupedze.
Asina simba anozviisa kwamuri;
muri mubatsiri wenherera.
Vhunai ruoko rweakaipa nerwomunhu akaipa;
ngaazvidavirire pazvakaipa zvake
zvakanga zvisingazoonekwi.
Jehovha ndiye Mambo nokusingaperi-peri;
ndudzi dzichaparara munyika yake.
Munonzwa henyu, imi Jehovha, zvishuvo zvavanotambura;
munovakurudzira, uye munoteerera kuchema kwavo,
muchiruramisira nherera nevakamanikidzwa,
kuti munhu wenyika, arege kuramba achingovhundutsa.
Ndinovanda muna Jehovha.
Mungareva seiko kwandiri muchiti,
“Tizira kugomo rako seshiri.
Nokuti tarira, vakaipa vanowembura uta hwavo;
vanogadzirira miseve yavo parukungiso,
kuti vapfure vari murima,
uyo akarurama pamwoyo.
Kana nheyo dzaparadzwa,
akarurama angaiteiko?”
Jehovha ari mutemberi yake tsvene;
Jehovha ari pachigaro chake choushe chokudenga.
Anocherechedza vanakomana vavanhu;
meso ake anovaedza.
Jehovha anoedza vakarurama,
asi vakaipa navanoda zvechisimba
mweya wake unovavenga.
Pane vakaipa anonayisa
mazimbe omoto nesafuri inopfuta;
mhepo inopisa ndiwo uchava mugove wavo.
Nokuti Jehovha akarurama,
anoda kururamisira;
vanhu vakarurama vachaona chiso chake.
Batsirai, imi Jehovha, nokuti vanoda Mwari hapachina;
vakatendeka vapera pakati pavanhu.
Mumwe nomumwe anorevera wokwake nhema;
miromo yavo inobata kumeso nokutaura zvinonyengera.
Jehovha ngaagure miromo yose inobata kumeso,
norurimi rumwe norumwe runozvikudza
ruchiti, “Tichakunda nendimi dzedu;
miromo ndeyedu, tenzi wedu ndiani?”
“Nokuda kwokumanikidzwa kwavasina simba
nokugomera kwavarombo,
ndichasimuka zvino,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.
“Ndichavadzivirira kuna avo vanovaparadza.”
Uye mashoko aJehovha haana chaangapomerwa,
sesirivha yakacheneswa muchoto chevhu,
yakanatswa kanomwe.
Imi Jehovha, muchatichengeta murugare
uye muchatidzivirira kubva kuvanhu vakadai nokusingaperi.
Vakaipa vanofamba-famba vakasununguka
kana zvakashata zvichikudzwa pakati pavanhu.
Jehovha, ndiani angagara munzvimbo yenyu tsvene?
Ndiani angagara pagomo renyu dzvene?
Iye anofamba asina chaanopomerwa uye
anoita zvakarurama,
anotaura chokwadi zvichibva pamwoyo wake,
uye asina makuhwa parurimi rwake,
asingaitiri wokwake zvakaipa
uye asingatuki waagere naye,
anozvidza munhu akaipa
asi anokudza vaya vanotya Jehovha,
anochengeta mhiko yake
kunyange kana zvichirwadza,
anokweretesa mari yake asingarevi mhindu
uye asingagamuchiri fufuro pamusoro pousina mhosva.
Munhu anoita izvi
haangatongozungunuswi.
Ndichengetedzei, imi Mwari,
nokuti ndinovanda mamuri.
Ndakati kuna Jehovha, “Ndimi Ishe wangu;
kunze kwenyu handina chinhu chakanaka.”
Kana vari vatsvene vari panyika,
ndivo vakaisvonaka vandinofarira chose.
Kuchema kuchawedzerwa,
kwaavo vanomhanyira vamwe vamwari.
Handichazodiri zvipiriso zvavo zveropa
zvinodururwa kana kuisa mazita avo pamiromo yangu.
Jehovha, makandigovera mugove wangu nomukombe wangu;
mukaita kuti mugove wangu uchengetedzeke.
Ndakayererwa miganhu panzvimbo yakanaka;
zvirokwazvo ndine nhaka inofadza.
Ndicharumbidza Jehovha, anondipa zano;
kunyange usiku mwoyo wangu unondirayira.
Ndakaisa Jehovha pamberi pangu nguva dzose.
Nokuti ari kurudyi rwangu,
handingatongozungunuswi.
Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unofara uye rurimi rwangu runopururudza;
muviri wanguwo uchazorora zvakanaka,
nokuti imi hamuzondisiyi muguva,
kana kurega Mutsvene wenyu achiona kuora.
Makandizivisa nzira youpenyu;
muchandizadza nomufaro uri pamberi penyu,
nezvinofadza zvisingaperi muruoko rwenyu rworudyi.
Ndinokudai, imi Jehovha, simba rangu.
Jehovha ndiye dombo rangu, nhare yangu, murwiri wangu;
Mwari wangu ndiye dombo rangu, wandinovanda maari.
Ndiye nhoo yangu norunyanga rworuponeso rwangu, shongwe yangu.
Ndinodana kuna Jehovha, iye akafanira kurumbidzwa,
uye ndinoponeswa kubva kuvavengi vangu.
Mabote orufu akandipinganidza;
mvura zhinji inoparadza yakandifukidza.
Mabote eguva akandimonera;
misungo yorufu yakanangana neni.
Pakutambudzika kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha;
ndakadana kuna Mwari wangu kuti ndibatsirwe.
Akanzwa inzwi rangu ari mutemberi yake;
kuchema kwangu kwakasvika pamberi pake munzeve dzake.
Nyika yakadedera ikadengenyeka,
uye nheyo dzamakomo dzakazunguzika;
Utsi hwakakwira huchibva mumhino dzake;
moto unoparadza wakabuda mumuromo make,
mazimbe anopisa akabuda mauri achipfuta.
Akatsemura matenga akauya pasi;
makore erima akanga ari pasi petsoka dzake.
Akatasva makerubhi akabhururuka;
akabhururuka pamapapiro emhepo.
Akaita rima chifukidzo chake, denga rake rakamupoteredza,
iwo makore matema emvura okudenga.
Nokupenya kwaibva pamberi pake, makore akabuda akafamba,
nechimvuramabwe nokupenya kwemheni.
Jehovha akatinhira kudenga;
inzwi roWokumusoro-soro rikanzwika.
Akapfura miseve yake akaparadzira vavengi vake,
kupenya kukuru kwemheni kukavavhundutsa.
Mipata yegungwa yakaiswa pachena,
uye nheyo dzenyika dzakaiswa pachena
pakutuka kwenyu, imi Jehovha,
nokufema kwemhino dzenyu.
Akadzika pasi achibva kumusoro akanditora;
akandibudisa pamvura zhinji yakadzika.
Akandinunura kubva kuvavengi vangu vane simba,
kubva kuvadzivisi vangu, vakanga vakasimba zvikuru kwandiri.
Vakandinanga pazuva renjodzi yangu,
asi Jehovha akanga ari mutsigiri wangu.
Akandibudisa akandiisa panzvimbo yakafarikana;
akandinunura nokuti akanga achindifarira.
Jehovha akandiitira zvakafanira kururama kwangu;
nokuchena kwamaoko angu.
Nokuti ndakachengeta nzira dzaJehovha;
handina kuita zvakaipa nokubva pana Mwari wangu.
Mirayiro yake yose iri pamberi pangu;
handina kutsauka pazvirevo zvake.
Ndakanga ndisina chandingapomerwa pamberi pake,
uye ndakazvichengeta kuti ndigare kure nechivi.
Jehovha akandipa mubayiro zvakaringana nokururama kwangu,
zvakaringana nokuchena kwamaoko angu pamberi pake.
Kuna vakatendeka munoratidza kutendeka kwenyu,
kuna vasina chavangapomerwa munoratidza kusapomerwa kwenyu,
kuna vakachena munoratidza kuchena kwenyu,
asi kuna vakatsauka munoratidza hasha dzenyu.
Munoponesa vanozvininipisa,
asi muchideredza vane meso anozvikudza.
Imi, iyemi Jehovha, munoita kuti mwenje wangu urambe uchipfuta;
Mwari wangu anoshandura rima rangu richiva chiedza.
Norubatsiro rwenyu ndichaenda kundorwa hondo;
naMwari wangu ndinogona kukwira rusvingo.
Kana ari Mwari, nzira yake yakakwana;
shoko raJehovha harina charingapomerwa.
Ndiye nhoo
yavose vanovanda maari.
Nokuti ndianiko Mwari kunze kwaJehovha?
Uye ndianiko Dombo kunze kwaMwari wedu?
NdiMwari anondishongedza nesimba
uye anokwanisa nzira yangu.
Anoita kuti tsoka dzangu dzive setsoka dzenondo;
anoita kuti ndigone kumira pakakwirira.
Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa;
maoko angu anowembura uta hwendarira.
Munondipa nhoo yenyu yokukunda,
uye ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira;
munokotama pasi kuti mundiite mukuru.
Munondiitira nzira yakapamhama pasi pangu,
kuitira kuti zvitsitsinho zvangu zvirege kutedzemuka.
Ndakatevera vavengi vangu ndikavabata;
handina kudzokera shure kusvikira vaparadzwa.
Ndakavapwanya kuti vakoniwe kusimuka;
vakawira pasi petsoka dzangu.
Makandishongedza nesimba rokurwa;
makaita kuti vadzivisi vangu vapfugame patsoka dzangu.
Makaita kuti vavengi vangu vatize,
uye ndakaparadza vavengi vangu.
Vakachemera kubatsirwa, asi hakuna akavaponesa,
kunyange kuna Jehovha, asi haana kuvapindura.
Ndakavapura vakatsetseka seguruva ratakurwa nemhepo;
ndakavadururira pasi sedope renzira dzomumusha.
Makandirwira pakurwisa kwavanhu;
makandiita musoro wendudzi;
vanhu vandakanga ndisingazivi vava varanda vangu.
Pavanongondinzwa, vanonditeerera;
vatorwa vanokotama pamberi pangu.
Vose vanoora mwoyo;
vanouya vachibva panhare dzavo vachidedera.
Jehovha mupenyu! Dombo rangu ngarirumbidzwe!
Ngaakudzwe Mwari Muponesi wangu!
Ndiye Mwari anonditsivira,
anoisa ndudzi pasi pangu,
anondiponesa pavavengi vangu.
Makandisimudzira pamusoro pavavengi vangu.
Makandinunura kubva kuvanhu vechisimba.
Naizvozvo ndichakurumbidzai pakati pendudzi, imi Jehovha;
ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza.
Anopa mambo wake kukunda kukuru;
anoratidza unyoro hwake husingaperi kumuzodziwa wake,
kuna Dhavhidhi nokuvana vake nokusingaperi.
Matenga anotaura kubwinya kwaMwari;
matenga anoparidza mabasa amaoko ake.
Zuva nezuva anotaura;
usiku nousiku anoratidza zivo.
Hakuna mutauro kana rurimi
rusinganzwi inzwi ravo.
Inzwi razvo rinosvika panyika yose,
mashoko azvo kumagumo apasi.
Mumatenga imomo, akadzika tende rezuva,
rakaita sechikomba chinobuda mumba,
seshasha inopemberera kumhanya nhangemutange.
Rinobuda kuno rumwe rutivi rwedenga
richitenderera kusvikira kuno rumwe rutivi;
hakuna chinhu chakavanzika kubva pakupisa kwaro.
Murayiro waJehovha wakakwana,
unomutsiridza mweya.
Zvirevo zvaJehovha zvakavimbika,
zvinopa njere kuna vasina mano.
Zvirevo zvaJehovha zvakarurama,
zvinopa mufaro kumwoyo.
Murayiro waJehovha unopenya,
unopa chiedza kumaziso.
Kutya Jehovha kwakanaka,
kunogara nokusingaperi.
Zvakatongwa naJehovha ndezvechokwadi
uye zvose zvakarurama.
Zvinokosha kupfuura goridhe,
kupfuura goridhe rakanatswa;
zvinotapira kupfuura uchi,
kupinda uchi hwabva muzinga.
Muranda wenyu anoyambirwa nazvo;
pakuzvichengeta pano mubayiro mukuru.
Ndianiko angaziva kukanganisa kwake?
Ndikanganwirei mhosva dzangu dzakavanzika.
Dzorai muranda wenyu kubva pakutadza nobwoni;
ngazvirege kuva nesimba pamusoro pangu.
Ipapo handizovi nemhosva,
ndisina mhaka yokudarika kukuru.
Mashoko omuromo wangu nokurangarira kwomwoyo wangu
ngazvifadze pamberi penyu,
imi Jehovha, Dombo rangu noMudzikinuri wangu.
Jehovha ngaakupindure paunotambudzika;
zita raMwari waJakobho ngarikudzivirire.
Ngaakutumire rubatsiro runobva panzvimbo tsvene,
uye akupe rutsigiro runobva kuZioni.
Ngaarangarire zvibayiro zvako zvose
uye agogamuchira zvibayiro zvako zvinopiswa. Sera
Ngaakupe zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako,
uye aite kuti urongwa hwako hwose hubudirire.
Tichadanidzira nomufaro pakukunda kwako,
uye tichasimudza mireza yedu muzita raMwari wedu.
Jehovha ngaakupe zvose zvawakakumbira.
Zvino ndava kuziva kuti Jehovha anoponesa muzodziwa wake;
anomupindura ari kudenga rake dzvene,
nesimba rokuponesa kworuoko rwake rworudyi.
Vamwe vanovimba nengoro, vamwe namabhiza,
asi isu tinovimba nezita raJehovha Mwari wedu.
Vanowisirwa pasi namabvi avo vagowa,
asi isu tinosimuka tigomira takasimba.
Haiwa Jehovha, ponesai mambo!
Tipindurei patinodana!
Haiwa Jehovha, mambo anofara musimba renyu.
Mufaro wake mukuru sei pakukunda kwamunomupa!
Makamupa zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wake,
uye hamuna kumunyima zvaikumbirwa nomuromo wake. Sera
Makamugamuchira nemikomborero yakapfuma,
uye makadzika pamusoro pake korona yegoridhe yakachena.
Akakukumbirai upenyu, mukamupa mazuva
mazhinji, nokusingaperi-peri.
Kubudikidza nokukunda kwamakamupa,
kukudzwa kwake kukuru; makaisa pamusoro pake kubwinya nokukudzwa.
Zvirokwazvo makamupa maropafadzo anogara nokusingaperi,
mukamufadza nomufaro pamberi penyu.
Nokuti mambo anovimba naJehovha;
nokuda kworudo rusingaperi rwoWokumusoro-soro,
iye haangazungunuswi.
Ruoko rwenyu ruchabata vavengi venyu vose;
ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchabata vavengi venyu.
Panguva yokuonekwa kwenyu
muchavaita sevira romoto.
Jehovha achavamedza nehasha dzake,
uye moto wake uchavaparadza.
Muchaparadza zvizvarwa zvavo kubva panyika,
vana vavo kubva pakati pavanhu.
Kunyange vachirangana zvakaipa pamusoro penyu
nokufunga mano akaipa, havangagoni kubudirira;
nokuti muchaita kuti vafuratire,
pamuchavananga nouta hwakawemburwa.
Simudzirwai, imi Jehovha, musimba renyu;
tichaimba uye ticharumbidza simba renyu.
Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko?
Sei muri kure zvakadai nokundiponesa,
kure zvakadai namashoko okugomera kwangu?
Haiwa Mwari wangu, ndinodanidzira masikati,
asi hamundipinduri, nousiku, uye handinyarari.
Asi imi makagadzwa saIye Mutsvene;
ndimi rumbidzo yaIsraeri.
Madzibaba edu akavimba nemi;
vakavimba, uye mukavarwira.
Vakachema kwamuri, vakaponeswa;
vakavimba nemi uye havana kunyadziswa.
Asi ini ndiri honye kwete munhu,
ndinozvidzwa navanhu uye ndinoshorwa namarudzi.
Vose vanondiona vanondiseka;
vanoshamisa miromo yavo vachindituka, vachidzungudza misoro yavo vachiti,
“Anovimba naJehovha;
Jehovha ngaamununure.
Ngaamuponese,
sezvo achimufarira.”
Asi ndimi makandibudisa mudumbu;
mukaita kuti ndivimbe nemi
ndichiri pachipfuva chamai vangu.
Kubva pakuzvarwa kwangu, ndakaiswa kwamuri;
kubva mudumbu ramai vangu, makanga muchingova Mwari wangu.
Regai kuva kure neni,
nokuti dambudziko riri pedyo
uye hakuna angabatsira.
Hando zhinji dzakandikomba;
hando dzine simba dzeBhashani dzakandipoteredza.
Shumba dzinoomba dzichibvambura nyama,
dzinondishamira miromo yadzo.
Ndadururwa semvura,
uye mapfupa angu ose abva asvodogoka.
Mwoyo wangu washanduka ukava namo;
wanyungudika mukati mangu.
Simba rangu raoma sechaenga,
uye rurimi rwangu runonamatira kumusoro kwomuromo wangu;
munondiradzika muguruva rorufu.
Imbwa dzakandikomba;
boka ravanhu vakaipa rakandipoteredza,
vakabvoora maoko angu netsoka dzangu.
Ndinokwanisa kuverenga mapfupa angu ose;
vanhu vanondinanʼanidza uye vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu.
Vanogovana nguo dzangu pakati pavo
uye vanokanda mijenya nokuda kwenguo yangu.
Asi imi, Jehovha, regai kuva kure neni;
imi simba rangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira.
Rwirai upenyu hwangu pamunondo,
ihwo upenyu hwangu hunokosha, kubva pasimba rembwa.
Ndinunurei pamuromo weshumba;
ndiponesei panyanga dzenyati.
Ndichaparidza zita renyu kuhama dzangu;
ndichakurumbidzai paungano.
Imi munotya Jehovha, murumbidzei!
Imi mose zvizvarwa zvaJakobho, mukudzei!
Mutyei, imi mose zvizvarwa zvaIsraeri!
Nokuti haana kuzvidza kana kusema
chibayiro chaiye akatambudzwa;
haana kumuvanzira chiso chake,
asi akanzwa kuchemera kwake rubatsiro.
Kwamuri ndiko kunobva dingindira rerumbidzo yangu paungano huru;
ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu pamberi pavanokutyai.
Varombo vachadya uye vagoguta;
vanotsvaka Jehovha vachamurumbidza,
mwoyo yenyu ngairarame nokusingaperi!
Migumo yose yenyika
icharangarira igodzokera kuna Jehovha,
uye mhuri dzendudzi dzose
dzichapfugama pamberi pake,
nokuti ushe ndohwaJehovha
uye anotonga pamusoro pendudzi.
Vapfumi vose venyika vachadya
uye vachamunamata; vose vanoburukira muguruva vachapfugama pamberi pake,
navose vasingagoni kuzviraramisa.
Vana vake vachamushumira;
zvizvarwa zvinotevera zvichaudzwa nezvaIshe.
Vachaparidza kururama kwake
kuvanhu vasati vaberekwa,
nokuti akazviita.
Jehovha ndiye mufudzi wangu, hapana chandingashayiwa.
Anondivatisa pamafuro manyoro,
anondisesedza pamvura inozorodza,
anoponesa mweya wangu.
Anondifambisa panzira dzokururama
nokuda kwezita rake.
Kunyange ndikafamba nomumupata womumvuri worufu,
handingatyi zvakaipa,
nokuti imi muneni;
tsvimbo yenyu nomudonzvo
wenyu zvinondinyaradza.
Munondigadzirira tafura
pamberi pavavengi vangu.
Munozodza musoro wangu namafuta;
mukombe wangu unopfachukira.
Zvirokwazvo kunaka kwenyu norudo rwenyu zvichanditevera,
mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu,
uye ndichagara mumba maJehovha
nokusingaperi.
Nyika ndeyaJehovha, nezvose zviri mairi,
nyika, navose vanogaramo;
nokuti akaiteya pamusoro pamakungwa
uye akaisimbisa pamusoro pemvura zhinji.
Ndianiko angakwira pachikomo chaJehovha?
Ndianiko angamira panzvimbo yake tsvene?
Uyo ana maoko akachena nomwoyo wakanaka,
asingasimudziri mwoyo wake kuzvifananidzo,
kana kupika nhema.
Iye achagamuchira makomborero anobva kuna Jehovha
nokururamiswa kunobva kuna Mwari woruponeso rwake.
Ivava ndivo rudzi rwaavo vanomutsvaka,
ivo vanotsvaka chiso chenyu, imi Mwari waJakobho. Sera
Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuo;
muisimudze, imi makonhi akare,
kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde.
Ndianiko uyu Mambo wokubwinya?
Ndiye Jehovha ane simba noumhare,
Jehovha ane simba pakurwa.
Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuo;
muasimudze, imi makonhi akare,
kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde.
Ndianiko, uyu Mambo wokubwinya?
Jehovha Wamasimba Ose,
ndiye Mambo wokubwinya. Sera
Jehovha, ndinosimudzira mwoyo wangu kwamuri;
haiwa Mwari wangu, ndinovimba nemi.
Musandirega ndichinyadziswa,
uye musarega vavengi vangu vachindikunda.
Hapana munhu ane tariro mamuri
achanyadziswa,
asi vachanyadziswa
avo vanonyengera pasina chikonzero.
Ndiratidzei nzira dzenyu, imi Jehovha,
ndidzidzisei nzira dzenyu;
nditungamirirei muzvokwadi yenyu mugondidzidzisa,
nokuti ndimi Mwari Muponesi wangu,
uye tariro yangu iri pamuri zuva rose.
Rangarirai, imi Jehovha, ngoni dzenyu huru norudo,
nokuti zvakabvira kare.
Regai kurangarira zvivi zvouduku hwangu,
nenzira dzangu dzandaikumukirai nadzo;
ndirangarirei nokuda kworudo rwenyu,
nokuti makanaka, imi Jehovha.
Jehovha akanaka uye akarurama;
naizvozvo anodzidzisa vatadzi nzira dzake.
Anotungamirira vanozvininipisa mune zvakarurama,
uye anovadzidzisa nzira yake.
Nzira dzose dzaJehovha ndedzorudo nokutendeka,
kuna avo vanochengeta zvirevo zvesungano yake.
Nokuda kwezita renyu, imi Jehovha,
kanganwirai chakaipa changu, kunyange chiri chikuru.
Ndiani, zvino, munhu anotya Jehovha?
Achamudzidzisa nzira yaakasarudzirwa.
Achararama upenyu hwake mukubudirira,
uye zvizvarwa zvake zvichagara nhaka yenyika.
Jehovha anogara pakati pavanomutya;
anozivisa sungano yake kwavari.
Meso angu anoramba achitarira kuna Jehovha,
nokuti ndiye chete anosunungura tsoka dzangu pamusungo.
Dzokerai kwandiri uye mundinzwire nyasha,
nokuti ndiri ndoga uye ndinotambudzika.
Matambudziko omwoyo wangu awanda;
ndisunungurei pakurwadziwa kwangu.
Tarirai kutambudzika kwangu nenhamo yangu,
mugobvisa zvivi zvangu zvose.
Tarirai kuwanda kwaita vavengi vangu,
uye kuti vanondivenga zvakakura sei!
Rindai upenyu hwangu mugondinunura;
ndirege kunyadziswa,
nokuti ndinovanda mamuri.
Kusanyengera nokururama ngazvindichengete,
nokuti tariro yangu iri mamuri.
Dzikinurai Israeri, imi Mwari,
kuti vabve mumatambudziko avo ose!
Nditongerei, imi Jehovha,
nokuti ndakararama upenyu
husina chahungapomerwa;
ndakavimba naJehovha ndisingazungunuki.
Ndiedzei, imi Jehovha, ndinzverei,
nzverai mwoyo wangu nendangariro dzangu;
nokuti rudo rwenyu rwuri pamberi pangu nguva dzose,
uye ndinogara ndichifamba muzvokwadi yenyu.
Handigari navanhu vanonyengera,
kana kufambidzana navanyengeri;
ndinovenga ungano yavaiti vezvakaipa,
uye ndinoramba kugara navakaipa.
Ndinoshamba maoko angu ndisina mhaka,
uye ndinofamba-famba paaritari yenyu, imi Jehovha,
ndichiparidza rumbidzo yenyu nenzwi guru,
uye ndichireva zvamabasa enyu ose anoshamisa.
Ndinoda imba yamunogara, imi Jehovha,
nzvimbo inogara kubwinya kwenyu.
Regai kubatanidza mweya wangu navatadzi,
noupenyu hwangu navanoteura ropa,
vana maoko akabata zvakaipa,
vazere nefufuro mumaoko avo orudyi.
Asi ini ndinogara upenyu husina chahungapomerwa;
ndidzikinurei uye mundinzwire ngoni.
Tsoka dzangu dzimire pakati chechetere;
ndicharumbidza Jehovha paungano huru.
Jehovha ndiye chiedza changu noruponeso rwangu,
ndichagotya aniko?
Jehovha ndiye nhare youpenyu hwangu,
ndianiko wandingatya?
Vanhu vakaipa pavakauya kwandiri
kuzodya nyama yangu,
vavengi navadzivisi vangu pavanondirwisa,
vanogumburwa ndokuwa.
Kunyange hondo ikandikomba,
mwoyo wangu haungazotyi;
kunyange hondo ikamuka kuzondirwisa,
ipapo ndichavimba naJehovha.
Chinhu chimwe chete chandinokumbira kuna Jehovha,
ndicho chandinotsvaka:
kuti ndigare mumba maJehovha
mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu,
kuti nditarire kunaka kwaJehovha
uye ndimutsvake mutemberi yake.
Nokuti zuva rokutambudzika
achandichengeta zvakanaka munzvimbo yaanogara;
achandiviga mudumba retabhenakeri yake,
agondikwidza pamusoro pedombo.
Ipapo musoro wangu uchasimudzirwa
pamusoro pavavengi vakandipoteredza;
ndichamubayira zvibayiro patabhenakeri yake nomufaro mukuru;
ndichaimba ndigoimbira Jehovha nziyo.
Inzwai inzwi rangu kana ndichidana, imi Jehovha;
ndinzwirei ngoni mugondipindura.
Mwoyo wangu unoti kwandiri, “Tsvaka chiso chake!”
Chiso chenyu, Jehovha, ndichachitsvaka.
Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu,
musadzinga muranda wenyu mukutsamwa;
makanga muri mubatsiri wangu.
Regai kundiramba kana kundisiya,
imi Mwari Muponesi wangu.
Kunyange baba vangu namai vangu vakandisiya,
Jehovha achandigamuchira.
Ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu, imi Jehovha;
ndisesedzei munzira yakarurama
nokuda kwavamanikidzi vangu.
Regai kundisundira kuzvido zvavavengi vangu,
nokuti zvapupu zvenhema zvinondimukira,
vachifemedzeka nehasha.
Ndichine chokwadi neizvi zvokuti:
ndichaona kunaka kwaJehovha
munyika yavapenyu.
Rindira Jehovha;
iva nesimba,
utsunge mwoyo ugomirira Jehovha.
Ipai kuna Jehovha, imi mune simba
ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo nesimba.
Ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo rwakafanira zita rake;
namatai Jehovha mukubwinya kwoutsvene hwake.
Inzwi raJehovha riri pamusoro pemvura zhinji.
Mwari wokubwinya anotinhira,
Jehovha anotinhira ari pamusoro pemvura zhinji.
Inzwi raJehovha rine simba;
inzwi raJehovha rinokudzwa.
Inzwi raJehovha rinovhuna misidhari,
Jehovha anovhuna-vhuna misidhari yeRebhanoni.
Anoita kuti Rebhanoni ikwakuke semhuru,
neSirioni senzombe yenyati.
Inzwi raJehovha rinorova
nokuvaima kwemheni.
Inzwi raJehovha rinozungunusa gwenga;
Jehovha anozungunusa Gwenga reKadheshi.
Inzwi raJehovha rinomonyorora miouki
uye rinosvuura sango rigosara rati hwe-e.
Uye mutemberi yake zvose zvinodana zvichiti, “Kubwinya!”
Jehovha anogara pachigaro choushe chamafashamu emvura;
Jehovha anogara ari Mambo nokusingaperi.
Jehovha anopa simba kuvanhu vake;
Jehovha anoropafadza vanhu vake norugare.
Ndichakukudzai imi Jehovha,
nokuti makandisimudza kubva pakadzika,
uye hamuna kutendera vavengi vangu kuti vafare pamusoro pangu.
Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndakachemera rubatsiro kwamuri
uye mukandiporesa.
Haiwa Jehovha, makandibudisa muguva;
mukandirwira kuti ndirege kupinda mugomba.
Imbirai Jehovha, imi vatsvene vake;
rumbidzai zita rake dzvene.
Nokuti kutsamwa kwake ndokwenguva duku,
asi nyasha dzake ndedzoupenyu hwose;
kuchema kungangovapo usiku.
Asi mufaro unouya mangwanani.
Pandakanzwa kugadzikana, ndakati,
“Handingatongozungunuswi.”
Haiwa Jehovha, pamakandinzwira tsitsi,
makaita kuti gomo rangu rimire rakasimba;
asi pamakavanza chiso chenyu,
ini ndakavhunduka.
Ndakadana kwamuri, imi Jehovha;
ndakachemera nyasha kuna Jehovha ndichiti,
“Chiiko chinowanikwa pakuparadzwa kwangu,
napakupinda kwangu mugomba?
Ko, guruva richakurumbidzai here?
Richaparidza kutendeka kwenyu here?
Inzwai, imi Jehovha, mundinzwire ngoni;
imi Jehovha, ivai mubatsiri wangu.”
Imi makashandura kuungudza kwangu kukava kutamba;
makabvisa nguo dzangu dzamasaga mukandishongedza nomufaro,
kuti mwoyo wangu ukuimbirei ugorega kunyarara.
Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi.
Ndinovanda mamuri, imi Jehovha;
itai kuti ndisatombonyadziswa;
ndirwirei mukururama kwenyu.
Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri,
kurumidzai kundinunura;
ivai dombo rangu rokuvanda,
nhare yakasimba inondiponesa.
Sezvo murimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu,
nditungamirirei uye mundisesedze nokuda kwezita renyu.
Ndisunungurei pamusungo wandakadzikirwa,
nokuti imi muri utiziro hwangu.
Ndinoisa mweya wangu mumaoko enyu;
ndidzikinurei, imi Jehovha, Mwari wechokwadi.
Ndinovenga vanonamatira kuzvifananidzo zvisina maturo;
ndinovimba naJehovha.
Ndichafara nokufarisisa murudo rwenyu,
nokuti makaona kutambudzika kwangu
mukaziva kurwadziwa kwomwoyo wangu.
Hamuna kundiisa kumuvengi,
asi makamisa tsoka dzangu panzvimbo yakafarikana.
Haiwa Jehovha, ndinzwirei ngoni nokuti ndine nhamo;
meso angu aneta nokuchema,
mwoyo wangu nomuviri wangu zvarwadziwa.
Upenyu hwangu hwopera nokurwadziwa,
uye namakore angu nokugomera;
simba rangu rapera nokuda kwokutambudzika kwangu,
uye mapfupa angu arukutika.
Nokuda kwavavengi vangu,
ndava chinhu chinovengwa navavakidzani vangu;
ndava chinhu chinotyisa kushamwari dzangu;
vanondiona munzira dzomumisha vanonditiza.
Ndakanganwikwa navo sendakafa;
ndafanana nehari yakaputsika,
nokuti ndinonzwa guhwa ravazhinji;
kumativi ose kune zvinotyisa;
vanorangana pamusoro pangu
uye vanoronga kundiuraya.
Asi ndinovimba nemi, imi Jehovha;
ndinoti, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.”
Nguva dzangu dziri mumaoko enyu;
ndirwirei kuvavengi vangu
nokuna avo vanonditeverera.
Chiso chenyu ngachipenye pamusoro pomuranda wenyu;
ndiponesei norudo rwenyu rusingaperi.
Haiwa Jehovha, itai kuti ndisanyadziswa,
nokuti ndakadana kwamuri;
asi vakaipa ngavanyadziswe
uye vavate vakati mwiro muguva.
Miromo yavo inoreva nhema ngainyaradzwe,
nokuti vanotaura namanyawi
nokuzvikudza pamusoro pavakarurama.
Haiwa, kunaka kwenyu kukuru sei,
kwamakachengetera vaya vanokutyai,
kwamunoisa pamberi pavanhu,
pamusoro paivo vanovanda mamuri.
Mukudzivirira kwokuvapo kwenyu munovavanza
kubva parangano dzavanhu;
munovachengeta zvakanaka pamunogara
kubva pandimi dzinopomera.
Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe,
nokuti akaratidza rudo rwake runoshamisa
kwandiri pandakanga ndiri muguta rakakombwa.
Mukuvhunduka kwangu, ndakati,
“Ndabviswa pamberi penyu!”
Asi makanzwa kuchemera nyasha kwangu
pandakadanidzira kwamuri ndichida rubatsiro.
Idai Jehovha, imi vatsvene mose!
Jehovha anochengetedza vakatendeka,
asi anotsiva zvizere vanozvikudza.
Simbai uye mutsunge mwoyo,
imi mose munorindira Jehovha.
Akaropafadzwa uyo
akakanganwirwa kudarika kwake,
akafukidzirwa zvivi zvake.
Akaropafadzwa munhu
asingaverengerwi zvivi zvake naJehovha,
uye asina kunyengera mumwoyo make.
Pandakanyarara,
mapfupa angu akarukutika nokuda
kwokugomera kwangu zuva rose.
Nokuti masikati nousiku
ruoko rwenyu rwakanga ruchirema pamusoro pangu;
simba rangu rakasvetwa
sezvinoita kupisa kwechirimo. Sera
Ipapo ndakazivisa chivi changu kwamuri
uye handina kuvanza chakaipa changu.
Ndakati, “Ndichareurura kudarika kwangu kuna Jehovha,”
uye makandiregerera mhosva yechivi changu. Sera
Naizvozvo vose vanoda Mwari ngavanyengetere kwamuri
muchiri kuwanikwa;
zvirokwazvo mvura zhinji ine simba painokwira,
haingasviki kwavari.
Ndimi nzvimbo yangu yokuvanda;
muchandidzivirira panhamo
uye muchandipoteredza nenziyo dzorusununguko. Sera
Ndichakurairidza uye ndichakudzidzisa nzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo;
ndichakupa zano uye ndichakurinda.
Rega kuva sebhiza kana senyurusi,
zvisinganzwisisi asi zvinofanira kupingudzwa
nomukaro kana namatomu,
kana kuti hazvingauyi kwauri.
Wakaipa ana matambudziko mazhinji,
asi rudo rusingaperi rwaJehovha
runopoteredza munhu anovimba naye.
Farai muna Jehovha uye mufarisise, imi vakarurama;
imbai, imi mose makarurama pamwoyo!
Imbirai Jehovha, mufarisise, imi vakarurama;
zvakanaka kuti vakarurama vamurumbidze.
Rumbidzai Jehovha nembira;
muimbirei nziyo nomutengeranwa une hungiso gumi.
Muimbirei rwiyo rutsva;
muridze zvakanaka, mugopururudza nomufaro.
Nokuti shoko raJehovha rakarurama uye nderechokwadi;
iye akatendeka pane zvose zvaanoita.
Jehovha anoda kururama nokururamisira;
nyika izere norudo rwake rusingaperi.
Kudenga denga kwakaitwa neshoko raJehovha,
hondo dzenyeredzi dzaikoko, nokufema kwomuromo wake.
Anounganidza mvura zhinji yegungwa muzvirongo;
anoisa kwakadzika mumatura.
Nyika yose ngaitye Jehovha;
marudzi ose enyika ngaamuremekedze.
Nokuti iye akataura, zvikaitika;
akarayira, zvikamira zvakasimba.
Jehovha anokonesa urongwa hwendudzi;
anopinganidza mifungo yendudzi.
Asi urongwa hwaJehovha hunomira hwakasimba nokusingaperi,
nendangariro dzomwoyo wake kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Rwakaropafadzwa rudzi rwakaita Jehovha Mwari warwo,
vanhu vaakasarudza kuti vave nhaka yake.
Jehovha anotarira pasi ari kudenga
uye anoona marudzi ose avanhu;
ari pachigaro chake anotarira
vose vagere panyika,
iye anoumba mwoyo yavanhu vose,
anofungisisa zvose zvavanoita.
Hapana mambo anoponeswa nokukura kwehondo yake;
hapana murwi anopunyuka nokuda kwesimba rake guru.
Bhiza itariro isina maturo pakurwirwa;
harigoni kuponesa kunyange rine simba guru.
Asi meso aJehovha ari pamusoro paavo vanomutya,
napamusoro paavo vakaisa tariro yavo murudo rwake rusingaperi,
kuti avarwire parufu
nokuvararamisa panzara.
Tinomirira Jehovha netariro;
ndiye mubatsiri wedu nenhoo yedu.
Mwoyo yedu inofara maari,
nokuti tinovimba nezita rake dzvene.
Rudo rwenyu rusingaperi ngarugare pamusoro pedu, imi Jehovha,
kunyange sezvatakaisa tariro yedu mamuri.
Ndinorumbidza Jehovha nguva dzose;
kurumbidzwa kwake kucharamba kuri pamiromo yangu.
Mwoyo wangu uchazvirumbidza muna Jehovha;
vanotambudzika ngavanzwe vafare.
Kudzai Jehovha pamwe chete neni;
ngatikudzei zita rake pamwe chete.
Ndakachema kuna Jehovha akandipindura;
akandisunungura pakutya kwangu kwose.
Vanotarira kwaari vanopenya;
zviso zvavo hazvingambofukidzwi nenyadzi.
Murombo uyu akadana, uye Jehovha akamunzwa;
akamuponesa pakutambudzika kwake kwose.
Mutumwa waJehovha anokomberedza avo vanomutya,
uye anovasunungura.
Ravirai henyu muone kuti Jehovha akanaka;
akaropafadzwa munhu anovanda maari.
Ityai Jehovha, imi vatsvene vake,
nokuti vanomutya havana chavanoshayiwa.
Shumba dzinopera simba uye dzinofa nenzara,
asi avo vanotsvaka Jehovha havashayiwi chinhu chakanaka.
Uyai, vana vangu, nditeererei;
ndichakudzidzisai kutya Jehovha.
Ani naani wenyu anoda upenyu,
uye uchida kuona mazuva akawanda,
dzora rurimi rwako pane zvakaipa
nemiromo yako pakureva nhema.
Ibva pane zvakaipa ugoita zvakanaka;
tsvaka rugare uye urutevere.
Meso aJehovha ari pamusoro pavakarurama
uye nzeve dzake dzinonzwa kuchema kwavo;
chiso chaJehovha chinovenga avo vanoita zvakaipa,
kuti abvise chiyeuchidzo chavo panyika.
Vakarurama vanodanidzira, uye Jehovha anovanzwa;
anovarwira pakutambudzika kwavo kwose.
Jehovha ari pedyo navane mwoyo yakaputsika
uye anoponesa avo vakapwanyika pamweya.
Akarurama angava namatambudziko mazhinji,
asi Jehovha anomurwira paari ose;
anochengetedza mapfupa ake ose,
hakuna nerimwe rawo richavhunika.
Zvakaipa zvichauraya vakaipa;
vavengi vavakarurama vachapiwa mhosva.
Jehovha anodzikinura varanda vake;
hapana kana mumwe anovanda maari achapiwa mhosva.
Haiwa Jehovha, kakavadzanai navanokakavadzana neni;
rwisai avo vanondirwisa.
Torai nhoo huru neduku;
simukai, uye uyai mundibatsire.
Vheyesai pfumo guru nepfumo diki
murwise avo vanonditevera.
Muti kumweya wangu,
“Ndini ruponeso rwako.”
Vanotsvaka kundiuraya
ngavazvidzwe uye vanyadziswe;
vanorangana kuparadzwa kwangu
ngavadzoserwe shure vachitya.
Ngavaite sehundi pamberi pemhepo,
mutumwa waJehovha achivasundira kure;
nzira yavo ngaisvibe uye itsvedze,
mutumwa waJehovha achivateverera.
Sezvo vakandivanzira mimbure yavo ndisina mhosva,
uye vakandicherera gomba ndisina mhosva,
kuparadzwa ngakuvawire pakarepo,
mumbure wavakavanza ngauvapinge ivo,
ngavawire mugomba ravo vaparare.
Ipapo mweya wangu uchafara muna Jehovha,
uye uchafarira ruponeso rwake.
Zvandiri zvose zvichadanidzira zvichiti:
“Ndianiko akaita semi, Jehovha?
Munonunura varombo kubva
kuna avo vane simba kupinda ravo.”
Zvapupu zvino utsinye zvinouya mberi;
zvinondibvunza pamusoro pezvinhu zvandisingazivi.
Vanotsiva zvakanaka zvangu nezvakaipa,
uye vanosiya mweya wangu uchidzungaira.
Asi pavairwara, ndakafuka nguo dzamasaga
ndikazvininipisa nokutsanya.
Munyengetero wangu pawakadzokera kwandiri usina mhinduro,
ndakafamba-famba ndichichema
kunge ndinochemera shamwari yangu kana hama yangu.
Ndakakotamisa musoro wangu ndichichema,
sokunge ndinochema mai vangu.
Asi pandakagumburwa, vakaungana vachifara;
varwi vakaungana kuzondirwisa ndisingazivi.
Vakandireva vasingaregi.
Savanhu vasina Mwari vakandiseka muruvengo rwavo;
vakandirumanyira meno avo.
Haiwa Jehovha, muchasvika riniko makangotarira?
Nunurai upenyu hwangu kubva pakuparadza kwavo,
noupenyu hwangu hunokosha kubva pashumba idzi.
Ndichakuvongai paungano huru;
ndichakurumbidzai pakati pavanhu vazhinji.
Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu
avo vanondivenga ndisina mhosva;
vanondivenga ndisina mhosva
ngavarege kuchonyerana meso avo mukundivenga.
Havatauri norugare,
asi vanofunga kupomera mhosva
pamusoro pavanogara norunyararo munyika.
Vanondishamira miromo yavo vachiti,
“Hekani waro! Hekani waro! Tazviona nameso edu.”
Haiwa Jehovha, mazviona izvi; regai kunyarara.
Regai kuva kure neni, imi Ishe.
Mukai uye simukai mundirwire!
Ndirwirei, Mwari wangu naIshe wangu.
Ndiruramisirei mukururama kwenyu, imi Jehovha Mwari wangu;
musarega vachifara pamusoro pangu.
Musarega vachifunga mumwoyo mavo vachiti, “Hekani waro,
ndizvo zvatanga tichida!” kana kuti vati, “Tamumedza chose.”
Vose vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu
ngavanyadziswe uye vanyonganiswe;
vose vanozvisimudzira pamusoro pangu
ngavafukidzwe nenyadzi nokuzvidzwa.
Vose vanofarira kururamisirwa kwangu
ngavapembere nomufaro nokufarisisa;
ngavarambe vachiti, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe,
iye anofarira kugara zvakanaka kwavaranda vake.”
Rurimi rwangu ruchataura zvokururama kwenyu,
uye nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu zuva rose.
Shoko riri mumwoyo mangu
pamusoro pokutadza kweakaipa rinoti:
Hakuna kutya Mwari
pamberi pake.
Pamaonero ake anozvirumbidza, nokuti anozvibata kumeso kwazvo pakuona kwake,
zvokuti anotadza kuona kana kuvenga chivi chake.
Mashoko omuromo wake akaipa uye anonyengera;
haachisiri munhu akachenjera kana anoita zvakanaka.
Kunyange panhoo yake anofunga zvakaipa;
anozvifambisa panzira yezvakaipa
uye haarambi chakaipa.
Rudo rwenyu, imi Jehovha, runosvika kudenga denga,
kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumakore.
Kururama kwenyu kwakaita segomo guru guru,
kururamisira kwenyu sepakadzika dzika.
Haiwa Jehovha, imi munochengetedza zvose munhu nemhuka.
Haiwa rudo rwenyu rusingatongoperi runokosha sei!
Vose vakuru navaduku pakati pavanhu
vanovanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu.
Vanogutswa nezvakawanda zvomumba menyu;
munovanwisa kubva parwizi rwenyu runofadza.
Nokuti kwamuri ndiko kune chitubu choupenyu;
muchiedza chenyu tinoona chiedza.
Rambai muchiitira rudo kuna avo vanokuzivai,
uye kururama kwenyu kuna vane mwoyo yakarurama.
Rutsoka rwounozvikudza ngarurege kusvika kwandiri,
kunyange ruoko rweakaipa ngarurege kundidzingira kure.
Tarirai vaiti vezvakaipa kuti vawa sei,
vakandwa pasi, havagoni kumuka.
Usava neshungu nokuda kwavanhu vakaipa,
uye usaitira godo avo vanoita zvakaipa;
nokuti souswa vachaoma nokukurumidza,
somuriwo wakasvibira vachakurumidza kuoma.
Vimba naJehovha uite zvakanaka;
gara panyika ufarikane pamafuro manyoro.
Farikana muna Jehovha,
uye iye achakupa zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako.
Isa nzira yako kuna Jehovha;
uvimbe naye uye iye achaita izvi;
achaita kuti kururama kwako kupenye samambakwedza,
nokururamisirwa kwako sezuva ramasikati.
Nyarara pamberi paJehovha, umurindire unyerere;
usava neshungu kana vanhu vachibudirira panzira dzavo,
pavanoita mano avo akaipa avakaronga.
Rega kutsamwa, uzvidzore pahasha;
usava neshungu zvinokutungamirira mune zvakaipa.
Nokuti vasakarurama vachagurwa,
asi avo vanomirira Jehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika.
Chinguva chiduku duku, vakaipa havachazovapozve;
kunyange ukavatsvaka, havazowanikwi.
Asi vanyoro vachagara nhaka yenyika,
uye vachafarikana norugare rukuru.
Vakaipa vanofungira vakarurama mano akaipa,
uye vanovarumanyira meno avo.
Asi Ishe anoseka vakaipa
nokuti anoziva kuti zuva ravo riri kuuya.
Vakaipa vanovhomora munondo
uye vanowembura uta
kuti vawisire pasi varombo navanoshayiwa,
kuti vauraye avo vane nzira dzakarurama.
Asi minondo yavo ichabaya mwoyo yavo pachavo,
uye uta hwavo huchavhunika.
Zvishoma zvowakarurama zviri nani
kupinda pfuma yavakaipa vazhinji;
nokuti simba ravakaipa richavhuniwa,
asi Jehovha anotsigira vakarurama.
Mazuva avakarurama anozivikanwa naJehovha,
uye nhaka yavo ichagara nokusingaperi.
Panguva yamatambudziko, havanganyadziswi;
mumazuva enzara ivo vachava nezvakawanda.
Asi vakaipa vachaparara:
vavengi vaJehovha vachafanana norunako rweminda,
vachanyangarika soutsi.
Vakaipa vanokwereta uye havadzori,
asi vakarurama vanopa zvakawanda;
avo vanoropafadzwa naJehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika,
asi avo vaanotuka vachaparadzwa.
Kana Jehovha achifarira nzira yomunhu,
anosimbisa mafambiro ake;
kunyange akagumburwa, haangawi,
nokuti Jehovha anomutsigira noruoko rwake.
Ndakanga ndiri muduku uye zvino ndakwegura,
asi handina kumboona vakarurama vachiraswa,
kana vana vavo vachipemha chingwa.
Vanogara vachingopa vamwe, uye vachikweretesa pasina muripo;
vana vavo vacharopafadzwa.
Dzoka pane zvakaipa ugoita zvakanaka;
ipapo uchagara panyika nokusingaperi.
Nokuti Jehovha anoda vanoruramisira
uye haangazosiyi vanhu vake vakatendeka.
Vachadzivirirwa nokusingaperi;
asi vana vowakaipa vachaparadzwa;
vakarurama vachagara nhaka yenyika
uye vachagara mairi nokusingaperi.
Muromo womunhu akarurama unotaura uchenjeri,
uye rurimi rwake runotaura kururamisira.
Murayiro waMwari wake uri pamwoyo wake;
tsoka dzake hadzitedzemuki.
Vakaipa vanovandira vakarurama,
vachitsvaka upenyu hwavo chaihwo;
asi Jehovha haangavasiyi vari musimba ravo,
kana kuvarega vachipomerwa kana vamira pakutongwa.
Rindira Jehovha,
uye uchengete nzira yake.
Achakusimudzira kuti ugare nhaka yenyika;
kana vakaipa voparadzwa, iwe uchazviona.
Ndakaona munhu akaipa uye ano utsinye
achibudirira somuti wakasvibira pavhu romunyika yawo,
asi nokukurumidza akapfuura uye akasazovapozve;
kunyange ndakamutsvaka, haana kuzowanikwa.
Cherechedza asina mhosva, ongorora akarurama;
ane ramangwana rakanaka munhu worugare.
Asi vatadzi vose vachaparadzwa;
ramangwana rowakaipa richagurwa.
Ruponeso rwavakarurama runobva kuna Jehovha;
ndiye nhare yavo panguva yamatambudziko.
Jehovha anovabatsira uye anovanunura;
anovanunura kubva kuna vakaipa uye anovaponesa,
nokuti vanovanda maari.
Haiwa Jehovha, musandirayira mukutsamwa kwenyu kana
kundiranga muhasha dzenyu.
Nokuti miseve yenyu yandibaya,
uye ruoko rwenyu rwawira pamusoro pangu.
Mumuviri mangu hamuchina utano nokuda kwehasha dzenyu;
mapfupa angu apera simba nokuda kwechivi changu.
Mhosva yangu yandiremera
somutoro unorema kwazvo kuutakura.
Maronda angu aora uye anosemesa
nokuda kwoupenzi hwokutadza kwangu.
Ndakotamiswa uye ndaderedzwa kwazvo;
ndinofamba ndichichema zuva rose.
Musana wangu wazara nokupisa kunorwadza;
muviri wangu hauchina utano.
Ndarukutika uye ndapwanyika chose;
ndiri kugomera nokurwadza kwomwoyo.
Haiwa Ishe, zvose zvandinoshuva zviri pachena pamberi penyu,
kugomera kwangu hakuna kuvanzika kwamuri.
Hana yangu inorova, simba rangu rapera;
kunyange nechiedza chabva pameso angu.
Shamwari dzangu navafambidzani vondinzvenga nokuda kwamaronda angu;
vavakidzani vangu vanogara kure neni.
Avo vanotsvaka kundiuraya vanonditeya nemisungo yavo,
avo vanoda kundikuvadza vanotaura nezvokuparadzwa kwangu;
zuva rose vanorangana zvounyengeri.
Ini ndafanana nematsi, isinganzwi,
sembeveve, isingagoni kushamisa muromo wayo;
ndava somunhu asinganzwi,
ano muromo usingapinduri.
Haiwa Jehovha, ndakakumirirai;
muchapindura, imi Ishe Mwari wangu.
Nokuti ndakati, “Musavarega vachifarira kutambudzika kwangu
kana kuzvisimudzira pamusoro pangu, rutsoka rwangu parunotedzemuka.”
Nokuti ndava pedyo nokuwa,
uye kurwadziwa kwangu kunogara neni.
Ndinoreurura chivi changu;
chivi changu chinonditambudza.
Vavengi vangu vane simba vazhinji;
vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vakawanda.
Ivavo vanotsiva zvakanaka zvangu nezvakaipa,
vanondireva pandinotevera zvakanaka.
Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundisiya;
regai kuva kure neni, imi Mwari wangu.
Haiwa Ishe Muponesi wangu,
kurumidzai kuuya kuzondibatsira.
Ndakati, “Ndichangwarira nzira dzangu
nokuchengeta rurimi rwangu pachivi;
ndichaisa matomu pamuromo wangu
kana vakaipa vari pamberi pangu.”
Asi pandakanga ndinyerere uye ndakadzikama,
ndisingatauri kana chakanaka zvacho,
kurwadziwa kwangu kwakawedzerwa.
Mwoyo wangu wakapisa mukati mangu,
uye pandakafungisisa, moto ukapisa;
ipapo ndakataura norurimi rwangu ndikati:
“Ndiratidzei, imi Jehovha, magumo oupenyu hwangu
nokuwanda kwamazuva angu;
ndizivisei kupfuura kwoupenyu hwangu.
Makaita mazuva angu soupamhi hwechanza changu;
kuwanda kwamakore angu kwakaita sechinhu chisipo pamberi penyu.
Upenyu hwomunhu mumwe nomumwe mweya bedzi.
Munhu anongori mumvuri zvaanofamba-famba hake:
anofamba nomufaro mukuru, asi zvinongova pasina;
anounganidza pfuma, asingazivi achazoitora.
“Asi zvino, Ishe, ndakamirireiko?
Tariro yangu iri mamuri.
Ndiponesei pakudarika kwangu kwose;
regai kundiita chiseko chamapenzi.
Ndakanga ndinyerere; handina kushamisa muromo wangu,
nokuti ndimi makaita izvi.
Bvisai shamhu yenyu kwandiri;
ndakundwa nokurova kworuoko rwenyu.
Munorayira uye munoranga vanhu nokuda kwezvivi zvavo,
munoparadza pfuma yavo sechipfukuto,
munhu mumwe nomumwe mweya zvawo. Sera
“Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha,
rerekerai nzeve yenyu pandinochemera rubatsiro;
regai kuva matsi pakuchema kwangu.
Nokuti ndigere nemi somutorwa,
somweni, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba angu ose.
Ringirai kure neni, kuti ndimbofarazve
ndisati ndabva uye ndisisipo.”
Akaropafadzwa uyo ane hanya navasina simba;
Jehovha anomurwira panguva dzokutambudzika.
Jehovha achamudzivirira uye achachengetedza upenyu hwake;
achamuropafadza panyika
uye haangamuisi kuchido chavavengi vake.
Jehovha achamuraramisa panhoo yake yourwere
uye achamuponesa panhoo yake yourwere.
Ini ndakati, “Haiwa Jehovha, ndinzwirei ngoni;
ndiporesei, nokuti ndakakutadzirai.”
Vavengi vangu vachindigodora vanoti,
“Achafa riniko uye zita rake rigoparara?”
Kana mumwe achiuya kuzondiona,
anotaura zvenhema, mwoyo uchiunganidza makuhwa;
ipapo anobuda ondozviparadzira kumwe.
Vavengi vangu vose vanoita zevezeve pamwe chete pamusoro pangu;
vanondifungira zvakaipisisa, vachiti,
“Chirwere chakaipa chakamubata,
haachambomukizve panzvimbo paakarara.”
Kunyange neshamwari yangu yapedyo yandaivimba nayo,
yandaigovana zvokudya nayo,
yandisimudzira chitsitsinho chayo.
Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, mune tsitsi neni,
ndisimudzei, kuti ndivatsive.
Ndinoziva kuti munofadzwa neni,
nokuti muvengi wangu haandikundi.
Munonditsigira pakutendeka kwangu,
uye munondiisa pamberi penyu nokusingaperi.
Kurumbidzwa ngakuve kuna Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri,
kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira nokusingaperi.
Ameni naAmeni.
Senondo inodokwairira hova dzemvura,
saizvozvo mweya wangu unodokwairirai, imi Mwari.
Mweya wangu une nyota kuna Mwari, nyota yaMwari mupenyu.
Ndingaenda riniko kundosangana naMwari?
Misodzi yangu yanga iri zvokudya zvangu
masikati nousiku,
asi zuva rose vanhu vanoti kwandiri,
“Mwari wako aripiko?”
Ndinorangarira zvinhu izvi
pandinodurura mweya wangu,
mafambiro andaiita navazhinji
ndichitungamirira mudungwe wavanhu kuimba yaMwari,
nokupembera nomufaro uye nokuvonga
pakati pavazhinji pamutambo.
Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu?
Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu?
Isa tariro yako muna Mwari,
nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve,
Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu.
Mweya wangu wakaneta mukati mangu;
naizvozvo ndichakurangarirai
ndiri kunyika yeJorodhani,
pamatunhu akakwirira eHeremoni, kubva paGomo reMizari.
Pakadzika panodana pakadzika
mukutinhira kwamapopopo emvura;
mafungu enyu ose namafashamu
akapfuura napamusoro pangu.
Masikati, Jehovha anorayira rudo rwake,
pausiku rwiyo rwake runeni,
munyengetero kuna Mwari woupenyu hwangu.
Ndinoti kuna Mwari Dombo rangu,
“Mandikanganwireiko?
Ndinofambireiko ndichichema
ndakadzvinyirirwa nomuvengi?”
Mapfupa angu atambura nokurwadza kworufu,
sezvo vavengi vangu vachindizvidza
zuva rose vachiti kwandiri,
“Mwari wako aripiko?”
Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu?
Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu?
Isa tariro yako muna Mwari,
nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve.
Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu.
Ndiruramisirei, imi Mwari,
uye mundireverere mhaka yangu parudzi rusina Mwari;
ndinunurei pavanhu vanonyengera nevakaipa.
Ndimi Mwari nhare yangu.
Mandirambireiko?
Ndinofambireiko pose ndichichema
ndichidzvinyirirwa navavengi?
Tumirai chiedza chenyu nechokwadi chenyu,
ngazvinditungamirire;
ngazvindisvitse kugomo renyu dzvene,
kunzvimbo yamunogara.
Ipapo ndichaenda kuaritari yaMwari,
kuna Mwari, iye mufaro wangu nomudikani wangu.
Ndichakurumbidzai nembira,
imi Mwari, Mwari wangu.
Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu?
Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu?
Isa tariro yako muna Mwari,
nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve,
Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu.
Haiwa Mwari, takanzwa nenzeve dzedu;
madzibaba edu akatiudza
zvamakaita pamazuva avo,
pamazuva ekare.
Noruoko rwenyu makadzinga ndudzi
uye mukasima madzibaba edu;
makapwanya marudzi
mukaita kuti madzibaba edu abudirire.
Havana kuzviwanira nyika nomunondo wavo,
uye ruoko rwavo haruna kuvakundisa;
rwakanga rwuri ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, irwo ruoko rwenyu,
nokupenya kwechiso chenyu, nokuti imi makavada.
Ndimi Mambo wangu naMwari wangu,
anorayira kukunda kwaJakobho.
Kubudikidza nemi, tinosunda vavengi vedu shure;
kubudikidza nezita renyu, tinotsika vavengi vedu netsoka dzedu.
Handivimbi nouta hwangu,
munondo wangu haundivigiri kukunda;
asi imi munotipa kukunda pamusoro pavavengi vedu,
munonyadzisa vadzivisi vedu.
Tinozvirumbidza muna Mwari zuva rose,
uye ticharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi. Sera
Asi zvino matiramba uye matininipisa;
hamuchabudi nehondo dzedu.
Makaita kuti tidududze pamberi pavavengi vedu,
uye vadzivisi vedu vakatipamba.
Makatiramwira kumudyi samakwai
uye makatiparadzira pakati pendudzi.
Makatengesa vanhu venyu pasina,
hamuna kuwana kana chinhu pakuvatengesa.
Makatiita chiseko kuvavakidzani vedu,
chinozvidzwa nechinosekwa chaavo vakatipoteredza.
Makatiita tsumo pakati pendudzi;
vanhu vanotidzungudzira misoro.
Kunyadziswa kwangu kuri pamberi pangu zuva rose,
uye chiso changu chafukidzwa nenyadzi
pakuseka kwaavo vanondizvidza nokundirwisa,
nokuda kwomuvengi, agarira kutsiva.
Zvose izvi zvakaitika kwatiri
kunyange takanga tisina kukukanganwai,
kana kuva vasina kutendeka kusungano yenyu.
Mwoyo yedu yakanga isati yafuratira;
tsoka dzedu dzakanga dzisati dzatsauka panzira yenyu.
Asi makatipwanya mukatiita nzvimbo yamakava
uye mukatifukidza nerima guru.
Dai takanga takanganwa zita raMwari wedu,
kana kutambanudzira maoko edu kuna mwari wavatorwa,
Mwari haaizviziva here,
sezvo achiziva zvakavanzika zvomwoyo?
Asi nokuda kwenyu takatarisana norufu zuva rose;
tinotorwa samakwai anobayiwa.
Mukai, imi Ishe! Munovatireiko?
Zvisimudzei! Regai kutiramba nokusingaperi.
Ko, munovanzirei chiso chenyu
muchikanganwa kutambudzika nokudzvinyirirwa kwedu?
Takawisirwa muguruva;
miviri yedu inonamatira pavhu.
Simukai mutibatsire;
tidzikinurei nokuda kworudo rwenyu rusingaperi.
Mwoyo wangu unobvongodzwa nedingindira rakanaka,
pandinodetembera mambo ndima dzangu;
rurimi rwangu chinyoreso chomunyori anogona.
Imi makanakisisa pavanhu vose
uye miromo yenyu yakazadzwa nenyasha,
sezvo Mwari akakuropafadzai nokusingaperi.
Sungai munondo wenyu parutivi, imi wamasimba,
zvishongedzei nokubwinya noumambo.
Paumambo hwenyu kwirai mukunde kwazvo,
makamirira chokwadi, kuzvininipisa nokururama;
ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ngaruratidze mabasa enyu anotyisa.
Miseve yenyu inopinza ngaibaye mwoyo yavavengi vamambo;
ndudzi ngadziputsikire pasi petsoka dzenyu.
Chigaro chenyu, imi Mwari, chichagara nokusingaperi-peri;
tsvimbo yokururamisira ichava tsvimbo youmambo hwenyu.
Imi munoda kururama uye munovenga zvakaipa;
naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, akakuisai pamusoro peshamwari dzenyu
nokukuzodzai namafuta omufaro.
Nguo dzenyu dzose dzinonhuwirira mura, arosi nekasia,
zvinobva kumizinda yamadzimambo yakashongedzwa nenyanga dzenzou,
kurira kwehungiso kunokufadzai.
Vanasikana vamadzimambo vari pakati pavakadzi vanokudzwa;
kuruoko rwenyu rworudyi kuno mwenga akashongedzwa negoridhe reOfiri.
Teerera, iwe mwanasikana, rangarira,
uye urereke nzeve yako: Kanganwa vanhu vako neimba yababa vako.
Mambo ayevedzwa norunako rwako;
mukudze, nokuti ndiye Ishe wako.
Mwanasikana weTire achauya nechipo,
vanhu vakapfuma vachatsvaka nyasha kwauri.
Mwanasikana wamambo akanaka kwazvo mukati meimba yake; nguo yake yakarukirirwa negoridhe.
Akapfeka nguo dzakashongedzwa achaperekedzwa kuna mambo;
shamwari dzake idzo mhandara dzinomutevera
uye vanouyiswa kwamuri.
Vanoperekedzwa vachapinda nomufaro nokufarisisa;
vanopinda mumuzinda wamambo.
Vanakomana venyu vachatsiva nzvimbo yamadzibaba enyu;
muchavaita machinda munyika yose.
Ndichaita kuti kurangarirwa kwenyu kurambe kuripo, kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvose;
naizvozvo ndudzi dzichakurumbidzai nokusingaperi-peri.
Uchirai maoko, imi vanhu vose;
pururudzai kuna Mwari nokudanidzira kwomufaro.
Jehovha Wokumusoro-soro anotyisa sei,
iye Mambo mukuru pamusoro penyika yose!
Akaisa ndudzi dzavanhu pasi pedu,
marudzi pasi petsoka dzedu.
Akatitsaurira nhaka yedu,
iyo pfuma yaJakobho, waakada. Sera
Mwari akwidza kumusoro pakati pokudanidzira kwomufaro,
Jehovha pakati pokurira kwehwamanda.
Imbirai Mwari nziyo dzokurumbidza, murumbidzei nenziyo.
Imbirai Mambo wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza, murumbidzei nenziyo.
Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mambo wenyika yose;
muimbirei pisarema rokurumbidza.
Mwari anotonga pamusoro pendudzi dzose;
Mwari agere pamusoro pechigaro chake chitsvene.
Makurukota amarudzi aungana
savanhu vaMwari waAbhurahama,
nokuti madzimambo enyika ndeaMwari;
iye anokudzwa zvikuru kwazvo.
Iye Wamasimba, Mwari, Jehovha,
anotaura uye anodana nyika
kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira kwarinovirira.
Kubva kuZioni, rakakwana parunako,
Mwari anopenya.
Mwari wedu anouya uye haanganyarari;
moto unoparadza pamberi pake,
uye dutu rine hasha rakamupoteredza.
Anodana matenga kumusoro,
uye nenyika, kuti atonge vanhu vake achiti:
“Ndiunganidzirei vatsvene vangu,
vakaita sungano neni nechibayiro.”
Uye matenga anoparidza kururama kwake,
nokuti Mwari amene ndiye mutongi. Sera
“Inzwai, imi vanhu vangu, uye ndichataura,
imi Israeri, uye ndichapupura pamusoro penyu:
Ndini Mwari, Mwari wenyu.
Handikutukei nokuda kwezvibayiro zvenyu,
kana zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, zvinogara zviri pamberi pangu.
Handisi kuda hando inobva mudanga rako,
kana mbudzi inobva muzvirugu zvako,
nokuti mhuka dzose dzesango ndedzangu,
nemombe pamakomo chiuru.
Ndinoziva shiri dzose dziri mumakomo,
uye zvisikwa zvose zvesango ndezvangu.
Kana dai ndaiva nenzara, handaikuudza iwe,
nokuti nyika ndeyangu, nezvose zviri mairi.
Ko, ndinodya nyama yehando
kana kunwa ropa rembudzi here?
“Bayirai zvibayiro zvokuvonga kuna Mwari,
zadzisai zvamakapikira Wokumusoro-soro,
uye mudane kwandiri pazuva rokutambudzika;
ndichakurwirai, uye imi muchandikudza.”
Asi kuna vakaipa, Mwari anoti:
“Ko, une mvumo ipiko iwe yokuti ududzire mutemo wangu,
kana kuisa sungano yangu pamiromo yako?
Unovenga kurayira kwangu,
uye unorasira mashoko angu shure kwako.
Paunoona mbavha, unowadzana nayo;
unogoverana nemhombwe mugove wako.
Unoshandisa muromo wako kuita zvakaipa,
uye unorovedza rurimi rwako kukunyengera.
Unogara uchipomera hama yako
uye unoitira mwanakomana wamai vako makuhwa.
Zvinhu izvi wakazviita ini ndikaramba ndinyerere;
wakafunga kuti ndakafanana newe.
Asi ndichakutsiura
uye ndichaisa mhosva iyi pamberi pako.
“Fungai izvi, imi vanokanganwa Mwari,
kuti ndirege kukubvambura-bvamburai mukashaya angakununurai:
Munhu anobayira chibayiro chokuvonga ndiye anondikudza,
uye anogadzira nzira
kuitira kuti ndimuratidze ruponeso rwaMwari.”
Ndinzwirei tsitsi, imi Mwari,
nokuda kworudo rwenyu rusingaperi;
dzimai kudarika kwangu
nokuda kwengoni dzenyu huru.
Shambidzai zvakaipa zvangu zvose
uye mundinatse kubva pachivi changu.
Nokuti ndinoziva kudarika kwangu,
uye chivi changu chinogara chiri pamberi pangu.
Ndakakutadzirai imi, iyemi moga
nokuita chinhu chakaipa pamberi penyu,
kuti munzi makarurama pamunotaura
uye musapomerwa mhosva pakutonga kwenyu.
Zvirokwazvo ndakanga ndiri mutadzi pandakaberekwa,
ndiri mutadzi kubva pandakaumbwa mudumbu ramai vangu.
Zvirokwazvo imi munoda chokwadi pakati pomwoyo;
munondidzidzisa uchenjeri panzvimbo yomukatikati.
Ndinatsei nehisopi, ipapo ndichachena;
ndishambidzei, ipapo ndichachena sechando.
Ndiitei kuti ndinzwe mufaro nokufarisisa;
itai kuti mapfupa amakapwanya afare.
Vanzai chiso chenyu pazvivi zvangu
uye mudzime zvakaipa zvangu zvose.
Sikai mukati mangu mwoyo wakachena, imi Mwari,
uye muvandudze mweya wakarurama mukati mangu.
Regai kundirasa pamberi penyu
kana kubvisa Mweya wenyu Mutsvene kwandiri.
Dzoreraizve kwandiri mufaro woruponeso rwenyu,
uye mundipe mweya unoda, kuti undiraramise.
Ipapo ndichadzidzisa vadariki nzira dzenyu,
uye vatadzi vachatendeukira kwamuri.
Ndiponesei pamhosva yeropa, imi Mwari,
iyemi Mwari anondiponesa,
ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchaimba zvokururama kwenyu.
Haiwa Ishe, zarurai miromo yangu,
ipapo muromo wangu uchaparidza rumbidzo yenyu.
Hamufariri chibayiro, ndingadai ndakuvigirai,
imi hamufariri zvipiriso zvinopiswa.
Zvibayiro zvaMwari mweya wakaputsika;
mwoyo wakaputsika nowakapwanyika,
imi Mwari hamuzoushori.
Pamufaro wenyu wakanaka, itai kuti Zioni ribudirire;
muvake masvingo eJerusarema.
Ipapo pachava nezvibayiro zvakarurama,
zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvakazara zvinokufadzai;
ipapo hando dzichabayirwa paaritari yenyu.
Ko, unozvikudzirei pane zvakaipa, iwe murume wesimba?
Unozvikudzirei zuva rose,
iyewe unonyadzisa pamberi paMwari?
Rurimi rwako runofarira zvokuparadza;
rwakaita sechisvo chakarodzwa,
iyewe unogara uchingonyengera.
Unoda zvakaipa pachinzvimbo chezvakanaka,
kureva nhema pachinzvimbo chokutaura chokwadi. Sera
Unoda shoko rimwe nerimwe rinoparadza,
iwe rurimi runonyengera!
Zvirokwazvo Mwari achakuburutsira kukuparadzwa kusingaperi:
Achakubvuta agokubvisa mutende rako;
achakudzura kubva munyika yavapenyu. Sera
Vakarurama vachazviona uye vachatya;
vachamuseka vachiti,
“Houno zvino munhu asina kuita Mwari nhare yake,
asi aivimba nepfuma yake zhinji,
uye aisimba nokuparadza vamwe!”
Asi ini ndakaita somuti
womuorivhi unokura zvakanaka mumba maMwari;
ndinovimba norudo rusingaperi rwaMwari,
nokusingaperi-peri.
Ndichakurumbidzai, nokusingaperi nokuda kwezvamakaita;
ndichavimba nezita renyu, nokuti zita renyu rakanaka.
Ndichakurumbidzai pamberi pavatsvene venyu.
Benzi rinoti mumwoyo maro,
“Mwari hakuna.”
Vakaora, uye nzira dzavo dzakaipa;
hakuna anoita zvakanaka.
Mwari anotarira ari kudenga,
pavanakomana vavanhu,
kuti aone kana aripo anonzwisisa,
kana aripo anotsvaka Mwari.
Mumwe nomumwe wavo akadzokera shure,
vakava vakaora pamwe chete;
hakuna anoita zvakanaka,
kunyange nomumwe.
Ko, vaiti vezvakaipa havangadzidzi here,
vaya vanodya vanhu vangu savanhu vanodya chingwa,
uye vasingadani kuna Mwari?
Havo, vakazadzwa nokutya,
ipo pasina chavangatya.
Mwari akaparadzira mapfupa avanhu vaikurwisa;
makavanyadzisa, nokuti Mwari akavazvidza.
Haiwa, dai ruponeso rwaIsraeri rwabuda kubva muZioni;
Mwari paachadzosera nhaka yavanhu vake;
Jakobho ngaafarisise uye Israeri ngaafarisise!
Ndiponesei, imi Mwari, nezita renyu;
ndiruramisirei nesimba renyu.
Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Mwari;
teererai kumashoko omuromo wangu.
Vatorwa vanondirwisa;
vanhu vane utsinye vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu,
vanhu vasingazivi Mwari. Sera
Zvirokwazvo Mwari ndiye mubatsiri wangu;
ishe ndiye anonditsigira.
Zvakaipa ngazvimonere pane avo vanondireva;
muvaparadze pakutendeka kwenyu.
Ndichakubayirai chipiriso chokungopa;
ndicharumbidza zita renyu, imi Jehovha,
nokuti rakanaka.
Nokuti akandirwira pamatambudziko angu ose,
uye mukukunda, meso angu akatarisa vavengi vangu.
Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu, imi Mwari;
regai kushaya hanya nokukumbira kwangu;
ndinzwei, uye ndipindureiwo.
Pfungwa dzangu dzinondinetsa uye ndiri kushushikana,
pandinonzwa inzwi romuvengi wangu,
pandinodzvokorwa navakaipa; nokuti vanodururira matambudziko pamusoro pangu,
uye vanondituka mukutsamwa kwavo.
Mwoyo wangu unorwadziwa mukati mangu;
kutyisa kworufu kunondiwira.
Kutya nokudedera zvakandibata;
kutya kukuru kwakandifukidza.
Ini ndakati, “Haiwa, dai ndina mapapiro enjiva!
Ndaibhururukira kure ndikandozorora hangu,
ndaitizira kure kwazvo,
ndikandogara mugwenga; Sera
ndaikurumidza kundovanda panzvimbo yangu,
kure nemafungu nedutu.”
Nyonganisai vakaipa, imi Ishe, kanganisai mutauro wavo,
nokuti ndinoona mhirizhonga nokurwa muguta.
Masikati nousiku vanopoterera masvingo aro chinyararire;
utsinye nokumanikidza zviri mukati maro.
Masimba okuparadza azere muguta;
kutyisidzira nenhema hazvibvi munzira dzaro.
Dai ndatukwa nomuvengi,
ndaigona kushinga hangu;
dai muvengi aindimukira,
ndaigona kumuvanda hangu.
Asi ndiwe, munhu akaita seni,
mumwe wangu, shamwari yangu yapedyo,
yandaimbofarira kuwadzana nayo
pataifamba navazhinji mumba maMwari.
Rufu ngaruwane vavengi vangu vasingafungiri;
ngavaburukire muguva vari vapenyu,
nokuti kuipa kwakawana pokugara pakati pavo.
Asi ini ndinodana kuna Mwari,
uye Jehovha anondiponesa.
Madekwana, mangwanani namasikati
ndinochema mukushushikana,
uye iye anonzwa inzwi rangu.
Anondidzikinura ndisina kukuvara
kubva pahondo inondirwisa,
kunyange zvazvo vazhinji vachindipikisa.
Mwari, agere pachigaro choushe nokusingaperi,
achavanzwa agovaninipisa, Sera
ivo vanhu vasingamboshanduri nzira dzavo,
uye vasingatyi Mwari.
Mumwe wangu anorova shamwari dzake;
anoputsa sungano yake.
Mutauro wake unotsvedzerera samafuta,
asi kurwa kuri mumwoyo make;
mashoko ake anopfavisa kukunda mafuta,
asi minondo yakavhomorwa.
Kanda kufunganya kwako pana Jehovha
uye iye achakusimbisa;
haazombotenderi vakarurama kuti vawire pasi.
Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, muchaburutsira vakaipa pasi
mugomba rokuora;
vanhu vanokarira ropa navanyengeri
havangararami hafu yamazuva avo.
Asi kana ndirini, ndinovimba nemi.
Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Mwari, nokuti vanhu vanondidzinganisa nehasha;
zuva rose vanorwa neni.
Vavengi vangu vanondidzinganisa zuva rose;
vazhinji vanorwa neni mukuzvikudza kwavo.
Pandinenge ndotya,
ndichavimba nemi.
Muna Mwari, iye ane shoko randinorumbidza,
muna Mwari ndinovimba; handichazotyi.
Ko, munhu anofa angandiitei?
Zuva rose vanomonyorora mashoko angu;
vanogara vachirangana kundikuvadza.
Vanorangana, vanovandira,
vanocherechedza mafambiro angu,
vachishuva kundiuraya.
Ngavasapunyuka savasina mhaka;
koromorerai ndudzi pasi mukutsamwa kwenyu imi Mwari.
Nyorai kuchema kwangu;
isai misodzi yangu parugwaro rwenyu,
ko, hazvina kuiswa muzvinyorwa zvenyu here?
Ipapo vavengi vangu vachadzokera shure
pandinodanidzira kuti ndibatsirwe.
Nechinhu ichi, ndichaziva kuti Mwari ari kurutivi rwangu.
Muna Mwari, iye ane shoko randinorumbidza,
muna Jehovha, ane shoko randinorumbidza,
muna Mwari ndinovimba; handichazotyi chinhu.
Ko, munhu angandiitei?
Ndinosungwa nemhiko kwamuri, imi Mwari;
ndichakuvigirai zvipo zvangu zvokuvonga.
Nokuti makandirwira parufu,
uye netsoka dzangu pakugumburwa,
kuti ndifambe pamberi penyu
muchiedza choupenyu.
Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Mwari, ndinzwirei ngoni,
nokuti mweya wangu unovanda mamuri.
Ndichavanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu,
kusvikira njodzi yapfuura.
Ndinodanidzira kuna Mwari Wokumusoro-soro,
kuna Mwari anozadzisa chinangwa chake kwandiri.
Anotuma kubva kudenga agondiponesa,
achituka vaya vanondidzingirira nehasha; Sera
Mwari anotumira rudo rwake nokutendeka kwake.
Ndiri pakati peshumba;
ndinovata pakati pemhuka dzinokara,
ivo vanhu vane meno amapfumo nemiseve,
vane ndimi dzinopinza seminondo.
Kudzwai, imi Mwari, pamusoro pamatenga;
kubwinya kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose. Sera
Vanowaririra tsoka dzangu mimbure,
ndakakotamiswa pasi nenhamo.
Vakachera gomba panzira yangu,
asi vakawiramo vamene. Sera
Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari wangu,
mwoyo wangu wakasimba;
ndichaimba uye ndichaimba rwiyo.
Chimuka iwe mweya wangu!
Mukai imi mutengeranwa nembira!
Ini ndichamutsa mambakwedza.
Ndichakurumbidzai imi, iyemi Ishe, pakati pendudzi;
ndichakuimbirai pakati pamarudzi.
Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru, runosvika kudenga denga;
kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumusoro.
Kudzwai, imi Mwari, pamusoro pamatenga;
kubwinya kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose.
Ko, imi vatongi munotaura mukururama here?
Munotonga pakati pavanhu nokururamisira here?
Kwete, munofunga kusaruramisira mumwoyo menyu,
uye maoko enyu anomanikidza panyika.
Kunyange kubvira pakuberekwa, vakaipa vanofamba mukutsauka;
kubva mudumbu ramai, vakaipa uye vanoreva nhema.
Uturu hwavo hwakaita souturu hwenyoka,
vakafanana nemhakure yadzivira nzeve dzayo,
isingateereri maimbiro enʼanga
kunyange zvazvo achiimba nouchenjeri hukuru.
Vhunai mazino mumiromo yavo, imi Mwari;
bvisai, imi Jehovha, mazino marefu eshumba!
Ngavatsakatike semvura yapera kuerera;
pavanowembura uta, miseve yavo ngaigomare.
Vafanane nehozhwa inonyakatika painofamba,
kufanana negavamwedzi, ngavarege kuona zuva.
Hari dzenyu dzisati dzanzwa kupisa kweminzwa pamoto,
ingava minyoro kana yakaoma, vakaipa vachakukurwa.
Vakarurama vachafara pavachatsivirwa,
pavachashambidza tsoka dzavo muropa ravakaipa.
Ipapo vanhu vachati,
“Zvirokwazvo vakarurama vachiri kungowana mubayiro;
zvirokwazvo Mwari ariko anotonga nyika.”
Ndirwirei pavavengi vangu, imi Mwari;
Ndidzivirirei kubva kuna avo vanondimukira.
Ndirwirei pavaiti vezvakaipa,
uye mundiponese pavanhu vanokarira kuteura ropa.
Tarirai kundivandira kwavakaita!
Vanhu vanotyisa vanondirangana
pasina mhosva yandapara kana chivi, nhai Jehovha.
Handina chandakakanganisa, asi ivo vagadzirira kundirwisa.
Simukai mundibatsire; tarirai dambudziko rangu!
Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari Wamasimba Ose, Mwari waIsraeri,
mukai murange ndudzi dzose;
musanzwira ngoni vakaipa navapanduki. Sera
Vanodzoka madekwana,
vachihonʼa sembwa,
uye vachinyahwaira muguta.
Onai zvavanorutsa mumiromo yavo:
vanorutsa minondo kubva pamiromo yavo,
uye vanoti, “Ndiani angatinzwa?”
Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munovaseka;
munodadira ndudzi dzose.
Haiwa imi simba rangu, ndinokurindirai;
imi, iyemi Mwari, ndimi nhare yangu,
Mwari anondida
achanditungamirira
uye achanditendera kuti ndifare pamusoro pavanondireva.
Asi musavauraya, imi Ishe nhoo yedu,
zvimwe vanhu vangu vangakanganwa.
Musimba renyu itai kuti vadzungaire,
uye muvaderedze.
Nokuda kwezvivi zvemiromo yavo,
nokuda kwamashoko emiromo yavo,
ngavabatwe pakuzvikudza kwavo.
Nokuda kwokutuka nenhema dzavanotaura,
vaparadzei nehasha dzenyu,
vaparadzei kusvikira vapera.
Ipapo zvichazivikanwa kumigumo yenyika
kuti Mwari anotonga pamusoro paJakobho. Sera
Vanodzoka madekwana,
vachihonʼa sembwa,
uye vachinyahwaira muguta.
Vanodzungaira vachitsvaka zvokudya,
uye vanohuhudza kana vasina kuguta.
Asi ini ndichaimba nezvesimba renyu,
ndichaimba nezvorudo rwenyu mangwanani;
nokuti imi muri nhare yangu,
utiziro hwangu panguva dzokutambudzika.
Haiwa imi simba rangu, ndinokuimbirai nziyo dzokukurumbidzai;
imi, Mwari, ndimi nhare yangu, Mwari anondida.
Makatiramba, imi Mwari, uye mukatirwisa;
makanga makatsamwa, zvino tidzorei henyu!
Makazungunusa nyika mukaitsemura napakati;
gadzirai henyu mitswe yayo, nokuti iri kudengenyeka.
Makaratidza vanhu venyu nguva dzakaoma;
makatipa waini inotidzedzeresa.
Asi kuna vanokutyai, makasimudza mureza
kuti urege kupfaranyurwa neuta. Sera
Tiponesei uye tibatsirei noruoko rwenyu rworudyi,
kuti avo vamunoda varwirwe.
Mwari akataura ari muimba yake tsvene achiti:
“Ndichaganhura Shekemu nesimba
uye ndichayera Mupata weSukoti.
Gireadhi nderangu, uye Manase ndowangu;
Efuremu inguwani yangu yakasimba,
Judha itsvimbo yangu.
Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokushambira,
pamusoro paEdhomu ndipo pandinokanda shangu yangu;
pamusoro paFiristia ndinopururudza mukukunda.”
Ndianiko achandiisa kuguta rakakomberedzwa?
Ndianiko achanditungamirira kuenda kuEdhomu?
Hamusimi, iyemi Mwari, iyemi makatiramba here,
uye mukarega kubuda nehondo dzedu?
Tibatsirei pavavengi vedu,
nokuti rubatsiro rwavanhu haruna maturo.
NaMwari wedu, tichakunda,
uye achatsikira vavengi vedu pasi.
Inzwai kuchema kwangu, imi Mwari;
rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu.
Kubva kumigumo yenyika, ndinodanidzira kwamuri,
ndinodana sezvo mwoyo wangu woziya;
nditungamirirei kudombo rakakwirira kundipfuura.
Nokuti imi makanga muri utiziro hwangu,
shongwe yakasimba pamusoro pavavengi vangu.
Ndinopanga kugara mutende renyu nokusingaperi,
uye nokuvanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu. Sera
Nokuti makanzwa mhiko dzangu, imi Mwari;
makandipa nhaka yaavo vanotya zita renyu.
Wedzerai mazuva oupenyu hwamambo,
makore ake kumarudzi namarudzi.
Ngaagare pachigaro choushe pamberi paMwari nokusingaperi;
gadzai rudo nokutendeka kwenyu kuti zvimudzivirire.
Ipapo ndichagara ndichirumbidza zita renyu nenziyo,
uye ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu zuva nezuva.
Mweya wangu unozorora muna Mwari oga;
ruponeso rwangu runobva kwaari.
Iye oga ndiye dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu;
ndiye nhare yangu, handingambozungunuswi.
Muchasvika kupiko muchingorova munhu?
Ko, imi mose muchamukanda pasi here,
iyeyu rusvingo rwakarereka, noruzhowa rwuri kuwa?
Vanofunga kwazvo zvokumuwisira
pasi kubva panzvimbo yake yakakwirira;
vanofarira nhema.
Vanoropafadza nemiromo yavo,
Asi vachituka mumwoyo yavo. Sera
Iwe mweya wangu, zviwanire zororo muna Mwari oga;
tariro yangu inobva kwaari.
Ndiye oga dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu;
ndiye nhare yangu, handingazungunuswi.
Ruponeso rwangu nokukudzwa kwangu zvinobva kuna Mwari;
ndiye dombo rangu guru, noutiziro hwangu.
Vimbai naye nguva dzose, imi vanhu;
dururai mwoyo yenyu kwaari,
nokuti Mwari ndiye utiziro hwedu. Sera
Vanhu vasina maturo vanongova mweya zvawo,
asi vanokudzwa inhema bedzi;
kana vakayerwa havaremi, havasi chinhu;
vose pamwe chete vanongova mweya.
Regai kuvimba noupambi
kana kuzvikudza nezvinhu zvokuba;
kunyange pfuma yenyu ichiwanda,
regai kuisa mwoyo yenyu pairi.
Chinhu chimwe chakataurwa naMwari,
zvinhu zviviri zvandakanzwa:
Kuti imi, iyemi Mwari, mune simba,
uye kuti imi, iyemi Ishe, mune rudo.
Zvirokwazvo muchapa mubayiro kumunhu mumwe nomumwe
maererano nezvaakaita.
Haiwa Mwari, ndimi Mwari wangu,
ndinokutsvakai nomwoyo wose;
mwoyo wangu une nyota kwamuri,
muviri wangu unokupangai,
munyika yakaoma
uye yasakara isina mvura.
Ndakakuonai munzvimbo yenyu tsvene,
uye ndikaona simba renyu nokubwinya kwenyu.
Nokuti rudo rwenyu runokunda upenyu,
miromo yangu ichakurumbidzai.
Ndichakurumbidzai ndichiri mupenyu,
uye ndichasimudza maoko angu muzita renyu.
Mweya wangu uchagutswa kunge wadya zvakakora kwazvo;
muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai nemiromo inofara kwazvo.
Ndinokurangarirai ndiri pamubhedha wangu;
ndinokufungai panguva dzose dzousiku.
Nokuti muri mubatsiri wangu,
ndinoimba ndiri mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu.
Mweya wangu unonamatira kwamuri;
ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira.
Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu vachaparadzwa;
vachaburukira kwakadzika kwepasi.
Vachaiswa kumunondo
vagova zvokudya zvamakava.
Asi mambo achafara muna Mwari;
vose vanopika nezita raMwari vachamurumbidza,
asi miromo yavanoreva nhema ichafumbirwa.
Ndinzweiwo, imi Mwari, pandinotaura chichemo changu;
dzivirirai upenyu hwangu pakutyisidzira kwavavengi.
Ndivanzei pakurangana kwavakaipa,
ndibve pazhowezhowe yeungano yavaiti vezvakaipa.
Vanorodza ndimi dzavo seminondo,
uye vanonanga namashoko avo semiseve inouraya.
Vanopfura vari pakavanda munhu asina mhosva;
vanomupfura pakarepo, vasingatyi.
Vanokurudzira mumwe nomumwe wavo pakufunga zvakaipa,
vanotaura pamusoro pokuteya misungo yavo, uye vanoti,
“Ndianiko achaiona?”
Vanorangana kusaruramisira vachiti,
“Tafunga zano rakakwana!”
Zvirokwazvo mwoyo nomurangariro womunhu zvinonyengera.
Asi Mwari achavapfura nemiseve;
pakarepo vachawira pasi.
Achaita kuti ndimi dzavo dzivashandukire,
uye achavaisa pakuparadzwa;
vose vanovaona vachavadzungudzira misoro vachivaseka.
Marudzi ose avanhu achatya;
achaparidza mabasa aMwari,
uye achafungisisa zvaakaita.
Vakarurama ngavafare muna Jehovha
uye vavande maari;
vose vakarurama mumwoyo ngavamurumbidze!
Kurumbidzwa kwakakumirirai, imi Mwari, muZioni;
kwamuri mhiko dzedu dzichazadziswa.
Haiwa, imi munonzwa munyengetero,
vanhu vose vachauya kwamuri.
Patakanga takafukidzwa nezvivi,
makakanganwira kudarika kwedu.
Vakaropafadzwa avo vamunosarudza
navamunoswededza pedyo kuti vagare pavanze dzenyu!
Takagutswa nezvinhu zvakanaka zveimba yenyu,
zvetemberi yenyu tsvene.
Munotipindura namabasa okururama anotyisa,
imi Mwari Muponesi wedu,
tariro yemigumo yepasi pose
namakungwa ari kure kure,
iyemi makaumba makomo nesimba renyu,
makazvishongedza nesimba,
iyemi makanyaradza kutinhira kwamakungwa,
iko kutinhira kwamafungu aro,
nokupopota kwendudzi.
Vanogara kure kure vanotya zvishamiso zvenyu;
uko kunobuda mambakwedza uye madekwana achipera,
munodanidzira nziyo dzomufaro.
Mune hanya nenyika uye munoidiridza;
munoipfumisa kwazvo.
Hova dzaMwari dzizere nemvura
kuti dzivigire vanhu zviyo,
nokuti saizvozvo ndimi makazvirayira.
Munozadza mihoronga yacho nemvura,
uye munoenzanisa mihomba yacho;
munoinyorovesa nemvura inopfunha
munoropafadza zvibereko zvayo.
Munoshongedza gore nekorona yezvakawanda zvenyu,
uye ngoro dzenyu dzinopfachukira nezvakawanda.
Uswa hwomurenje hwopfachukira;
zvikomo zvakafukidzwa nomufaro.
Mafuro azara namapoka emakwai,
uye mipata yafukidzwa nezviyo;
zvinodanidzira nomufaro uye zvinoimba.
Danidzirai nomufaro kuna Mwari, imi nyika yose!
Imbirai mukurumbira wezita rake;
murumbidze zvikuru kukudzwa kwake!
Muti kuna Mwari, “Mabasa enyu anotyisa sei!
Simba renyu iguru zvokuti vavengi venyu
vanodedera pamberi penyu.
Nyika yose inokukotamirai;
vanokuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza,
vanoimba nziyo dzokurumbidza zita renyu.” Sera
Uyai muone zvaitwa naMwari,
mabasa ake anotyisa sei pakati pavanhu!
Akashandura gungwa rikava nyika yakaoma,
vakafamba nomumvura zhinji netsoka dzavo,
uyai, ngatifarei maari.
Anotonga nokusingaperi nesimba rake,
meso ake anocherechedza ndudzi,
vanomumukira ngavarege kumisidzana naye. Sera
Rumbidzai Mwari wedu, imi vanhu,
inzwi rokurumbidzwa kwake ngarinzwike;
iye akachengetedza upenyu hwedu
netsoka dzedu kuti dzirege kutedzemuka.
Nokuti imi, iyemi Mwari, makatiedza;
mukatinatsa sesirivha.
Makatipinza mutorongo
mukatitakudza mitoro pamisana yedu.
Makabvumira vanhu kukwira pamisoro yedu;
takapinda mumoto nomumvura,
asi makatiisa kunzvimbo ine zvakawanda.
Ndichauya nezvibayiro zvinopiswa kutemberi yenyu,
ndigozadzisa mhiko dzangu kwamuri,
mhiko dzandakavimbisa nemiromo yangu,
uye muromo wangu wakataura pandakanga ndiri munhamo.
Ndichakubayirai mhuka dzakakora
nechipiriso chamakondobwe;
ndichabayirawo hando nembudzi. Sera
Uyai munzwe, imi mose munotya Mwari;
ndikuudzei zvaakandiitira.
Ndakachema kwaari nomuromo wangu; rumbidzo yake yaiva parurimi rwangu.
Dai ndakanga ndaviga chivi mumwoyo mangu,
Ishe aidai asina kundinzwa;
asi zvirokwazvo Mwari akateerera
akanzwa inzwi rangu mumunyengetero.
Mwari ngaarumbidzwe,
iye asina kuramba munyengetero wangu.
Kana kudzivisa rudo rwake kwandiri!
Mwari ngaatinzwire tsitsi atiropafadze,
uye apenyese chiso chake pamusoro pedu, Sera
kuti nzira dzenyu dzizivikanwe panyika,
ruponeso rwenyu pakati pendudzi dzose.
Marudzi ngaakurumbidzei, imi Mwari;
marudzi ose ngaakurumbidzei.
Ndudzi ngadzifare uye dziimbe nomufaro,
nokuti munotonga marudzi nokururamisira,
uye munotungamirira ndudzi dzenyika. Sera
Marudzi ngaakurumbidzei, imi Mwari;
marudzi ose ngaakurumbidzei.
Ipapo nyika ichabereka mukohwo wayo,
uye Mwari, Mwari wedu, achatiropafadza.
Mwari achatiropafadza,
uye migumo yose yepasi ichamutya.
Ndiponesei, imi Mwari,
nokuti mvura zhinji yakwira kusvikira pamutsipa wangu.
Ndinonyura munhope yakadzika,
pasina pangatsika makumbo angu.
Ndapinda mumvura yakadzika;
ndafukidzwa namafashamu.
Ndaneta nokuridza mhere yokuti ndibatsirwe;
huro dzangu dzaoma,
meso angu aneta
nokumirira Mwari wangu.
Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vakawanda
kupfuura bvudzi romusoro wangu;
vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vazhinji, avo vanotsvaka kundiparadza. Ndinomanikidzwa kudzosera zvandisina kuba.
Munoziva upenzi hwangu, imi Mwari;
mhaka yangu haina kuvanzika kwamuri.
Vaya vane tariro mamuri
ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu,
haiwa Ishe, Jehovha Wamasimba Ose;
vanokutsvakai
ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu,
haiwa Mwari waIsraeri.
Nokuti ndinotsunga kusekwa hangu nokuda kwenyu,
uye nyadzi dzafukidza chiso changu.
Ndiri mutorwa kuhama dzangu,
nomweni kuvanakomana vamai vangu;
nokuti kushingairira imba yenyu kwandipedza,
uye kutuka kwaavo vanokutukai kunowira pamusoro pangu.
Pandinochema uye ndichitsanya,
ndinofanira kushinga pakusekwa;
pandinofuka nguo dzamasaga,
vanhu vanondiita shumo.
Vaya vanogara pasuo vanondiseka,
uye ndiri rwiyo rwezvidhakwa.
Asi ndinonyengetera kwamuri, imi Mwari,
panguva inokufadzai;
murudo rwenyu rukuru, imi Mwari,
ndipindurei noruponeso rwenyu rwechokwadi.
Ndinunurei mumatope,
musandirega ndichinyura;
ndirwirei kuna vanondivenga,
napamvura zhinji yakadzika.
Musatendera mvura yamafashamu kuti indifukidze,
kana kwakadzika kuti kundimedze
kana kuti gomba rizarure muromo waro pamusoro pangu.
Ndipindurei, imi Jehovha, zvichibva pakunaka kworudo rwenyu;
dzokerai henyu kwandiri nokuda kwetsitsi dzenyu huru.
Regai kuvanzira muranda wenyu chiso chenyu;
ndipindurei nokukurumidza, nokuti ndava mudambudziko.
Swederai pedyo mundinunure;
ndidzikinurei nokuda kwavavengi vangu.
Munoziva kusekwa kwangu, kunyadziswa nokusakudzwa kwangu;
vavengi vangu vose vari pamberi penyu.
Kusekwa kwaputsa mwoyo wangu,
uye kwandisiya ndisisina chingandibatsira;
Ndakatsvaka vangandinzwira ngoni, asi ndakavashaya,
vangandinyaradza, asi ndakavashayazve.
Vakaisa nduru mune zvokudya zvangu,
uye vakandipa vhiniga pandaiva nenyota.
Tafura yagadzirwa pamberi pavo ngaive musungo;
ngaive shamhu yokuranga neriva.
Meso avo ngaapofumadzwe kuti varege kuona,
uye misana yavo iminame nokusingaperi.
Dururirai hasha dzenyu pamusoro pavo;
kutsamwa kwenyu kunotyisa ngakuvakurire.
Nzvimbo yavo ngaisiyiwe;
ngaparege kuva nomunhu anogara mumatende avo.
Nokuti vanotambudza vaya vamakarova,
uye vanotaura pamusoro pokurwadziwa kwavakakuvadzwa nemi.
Vapei mhosva pamusoro pemhosva;
ngavarege kuva nomugove woruponeso rwenyu.
Ngavadzimwe mubhuku roupenyu,
uye varege kuverengwa pamwe chete navakarurama.
Ndiri pakurwadziwa nenhamo;
ruponeso rwenyu imi Mwari, ngarundidzivirire.
Ndicharumbidza zita raMwari norwiyo,
uye ndichamukudza nokuvonga.
Izvi zvichafadza Jehovha kukunda nzombe,
kupfuura hando nenyanga dzayo, namahwanda ayo.
Varombo vachazviona uye vachafara,
imi vanotsvaka Mwari, mwoyo yenyu ngairarame!
Jehovha anonzwa vanoshayiwa
uye haashori vanhu vake vakatapwa.
Denga nenyika ngazvimurumbidze,
makungwa nezvose zvinofamba, imomo,
nokuti Mwari achaponesa Zioni
agovakazve maguta aJudha.
Ipapo vanhu vachagarako, vagoritora;
Vana vavaranda vake vacharipiwa senhaka,
uye avo vanoda zita rake vachagara ikoko.
Kurumidzai kundiponesa, imi Mwari;
Haiwa Jehovha kurumidzai kuuya mundibatsire.
Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu
ngavanyadziswe uye vakanganiswe;
vose vanofarira kuparara kwangu
ngavadzorwe shure vanyare.
Vanoti kwandiri, “Hekani waro! Hekani waro!”
ngavadzorerwe shure nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo.
Asi vose vanokutsvakai
ngavafare nokufarisisa mamuri;
vanoda ruponeso rwenyu ngavagare vachiti,
“Mwari ngaakudzwe!”
Asi ndiri murombo nomushayiwi;
uyai nokukurumidza kwandiri, imi Mwari.
Imi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu;
Haiwa Jehovha, musanonoka.
Ndinovanda mamuri, imi Jehovha;
ngandirege kutongonyadziswa.
Ndinunurei uye mundirwire mukururama kwenyu;
rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri uye mundiponese.
Ivai bako rangu rokuvanda kwandingaramba ndichienda;
rayirai kuti ndiponeswe, nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu.
Haiwa Mwari wangu, ndirwirei, paruoko rwowakaipa,
pakubatwa navanhu vakaipa uye vane utsinye.
Nokuti muri tariro yangu, imi Ishe Jehovha,
ndakavimba nemi kubva pauduku hwangu.
Ndakazendamira pamuri kubva pakuberekwa kwangu;
ndimi makandibudisa mudumbu ramai vangu.
Ndicharamba ndichikurumbidzai.
Ndava sechishamiso kuvazhinji,
asi imi muri utiziro hwangu hwakasimba.
Muromo wangu uzere nerumbidzo yenyu,
ndinoparidza kubwinya kwenyu zuva rose.
Regai kundirasa pandinenge ndakwegura;
