musandisiya kana simba rangu rapera.
Nokuti vavengi vangu vanotaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu;
avo vakamirira kundiuraya vanorangana pamwe chete.
Vanoti, “Mwari amusiya;
muteverei mumubate,
nokuti hakuna achamununura.”
Regai kuva kure neni, imi Mwari;
uyai nokukurumidza, imi Mwari wangu, mundibatsire.
Vapomeri vangu ngavaparare vanyadziswe;
vaya vanoda kundikuvadza
ngavafukidzwe nokusekwa nokunyadziswa.
Asi kana ndirini, ndichagara ndine tariro;
ndicharamba ndichikurumbidzai zvakanyanya.
Muromo wangu uchareva zvokururama kwenyu,
nezvoruponeso rwenyu zuva rose,
kunyange ndisingazivi chiyero charwo.
Ndichauya ndichiparidza mabasa enyu makuru, imi Ishe Jehovha;
ndichaparidza kururama kwenyu, iyemi moga.
Kubva pauduku hwangu, imi Mwari, makandidzidzisa,
nanhasi uno ndinoparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa.
Kunyange pandinenge ndakwegura uye bvudzi rachena,
musandisiya, imi Mwari,
kusvikira ndaparidza simba renyu kurudzi runotevera,
nesimba renyu kuna vose vari kuzouya.
Kururama kwenyu kunosvika kudenga kumusoro, imi Mwari,
iyemi makaita zvinhu zvikuru.
Haiwa Mwari, ndiani akafanana nemi?
Kunyange imi makandiratidza matambudziko mazhinji uye anorwadza,
muchadzosa upenyu hwangu zvakare;
kubva kwakadzika kwepasi
muchandibudisazve.
Muchawedzera kukudzwa kwangu,
uye muchandinyaradzazve.
Ndichakurumbidzai nembira
nokuda kwokutendeka kwenyu, imi Mwari wangu;
ndichakurumbidzai nenziyo nomutengeranwa,
imi Mutsvene woga waIsraeri.
Miromo yangu ichadanidzira nomufaro
pandinokurumbidzai nenziyo,
iyeni, wamakadzikinura.
Rurimi rwangu ruchataura nezvamabasa enyu akarurama
zuva rose,
nokuti avo vaida kundikuvadza
vanyadziswa uye vakanganiswa.
Shongedzai Mambo nokururamisira kwenyu, imi Mwari,
mwanakomana wamambo nokururama kwenyu.
Achatonga vanhu venyu nokururama,
navanonetswa venyu nokururamisira.
Makomo achavigira vanhu kubudirira,
nezvikomo, chibereko chokururama.
Achadzivirira vanonetswa pakati pavanhu,
uye achaponesa vana vavanoshayiwa;
achapwanya mudzvinyiriri.
Achashinga sokuvapo kwezuva, sokuvapo kwomwedzi,
kusvikira kumarudzi ose anotevera,
achafanana nemvura inonaya pamunda une uswa hwakachekererwa,
seguti rinonyorovesa nyika.
Pamazuva ake vakarurama vachakura zvakanaka;
kubudirira kuchawanda kusvikira mwedzi waguma.
Achatonga kubva kugungwa kusvikira kugungwa,
uye kubva paRwizi kusvikira kumagumo enyika.
Marudzi omugwenga achapfugama pamberi pake,
uye vavengi vake vachananzva guruva.
Madzimambo eTashishi navari kumahombekombe ari kure
vachamuvigira mutero;
madzimambo eShebha neSebha
vachamupa zvipo.
Madzimambo ose achamupfugamira
uye ndudzi dzose dzichamushandira.
Nokuti acharwira vanoshayiwa vanodanidzira;
vanonetswa vasina anovabatsira.
Achanzwira ngoni vasina simba navanoshayiwa,
uye achaponesa vanoshayiwa kubva parufu.
Achavanunura pakudzvinyirirwa nokuitirwa zvinhu nechisimba,
nokuti ropa ravo rinokosha pamberi pake.
Iye ngaararame upenyu hurefu!
Goridhe rinobva kuShebha ngaripiwe kwaari.
Vanhu ngavarambe vachimunyengeterera
uye vamuropafadze zuva rose.
Zviyo ngazviwande munyika yose;
ngazvizengaire pamusoro pezvikomo.
Zvibereko zvazvo ngazvikure zvakanaka seRebhanoni;
ngazvibukire sebundo romusango.
Zita rake ngarigare nokusingaperi;
ngarirambe riripo sokuvapo kwezuva.
Ndudzi dzose dzicharopafadzwa kubudikidza naye,
uye vachamuti, ano mufaro.
Jehovha Mwari ngaarumbidzwe, Mwari waIsraeri,
iye oga anoita mabasa anoshamisa.
Zita rake rinobwinya ngarirumbidzwe nokusingaperi;
nyika yose ngaizadzwe nokubwinya kwake.
Ameni naAmeni.
Ndipo panoperera minyengetero yaDhavhidhi, mwanakomana waJese.
Zvirokwazvo Mwari akanaka kuna Israeri,
kuna avo vakachena pamwoyo.
Asi kana ndirini, tsoka dzangu dzakapotsa dzatsvedza;
ndakasara paduku kupunzika.
Nokuti ndakaitira shanje vanozvikudza,
pandakaona kubudirira kwavakaipa.
Havatambudziki;
miviri yavo ino utano uye vakasimba.
Vakasununguka pamitoro inowanikwa muvanhu;
havatambudzwi nezvinotambudza vanhu.
Naizvozvo kuzvikudza ndiko ruketani rwemitsipa yavo;
vanozvishongedza nechisimba.
Mumwoyo yavo makasindimara munobuda chitadzo;
mifungo yakaipa yendangariro dzavo haina magumo.
Vanoseka, uye vanotaura noutsinye mukuzvikudza kwavo,
vanoti vachadzvinyirira vamwe.
Miromo yavo inoti denga nderavo,
uye ndimi dzavo dzinotora nyika.
Naizvozvo vanhu vavo vanodzokera kwavari,
uye vanonwa mvura yakawanda.
Vanoti, “Mwari angazviziva sei?
Ko, Wokumusoro-soro ane ruzivo here?”
Ndizvo zvakaita vakaipa,
havana hanya nguva dzose, vanowedzera pfuma yavo.
Zvirokwazvo ndakanatsa mwoyo wangu, asi pasina;
ndakashamba maoko angu ndisina mhosva, asi pasina.
Zuva rose ndanga ndichitambudzwa;
ndinorangwa mangwanani ose.
Dai ndakanga ndati, “Ndichataura zvakadai,”
ndingadai ndakapandukira vana venyu.
Pandakaedza kunzwisisa izvi zvose,
zvakandiremera kwazvo
kusvikira ndapinda munzvimbo tsvene yaMwari;
ipapo ndikazonzwisisa magumo avo.
Zvirokwazvo makavaisa munzira inotsvedza;
makavakanda pasi kuti vaparare.
Haiwa, vanoparadzwa kamwe kamwe,
vanopedzwa chose nezvinotyisa!
Sezvakaita kurota panopepuka munhu,
saizvozvo pamunomuka, imi Ishe,
muchavashora savanhu vanorotomoka.
Mwoyo wangu pawakachema
uye mweya wangu ukashungurudzika,
ndakanga ndava benzi uye ndisingazivi;
ndakanga ndava mhuka inotyisa pamberi penyu.
Kunyange zvakadaro ndinogara nemi nguva dzose;
munondibata noruoko rwenyu rworudyi.
Munondisesedza nezano renyu,
uye pashure muchazonditora mondipinza mukubwinya kwenyu.
Ndianiko wandinaye kudenga kana musirimi?
Uye nyika haina chandinoshuva kunze kwenyu.
Nyama yangu nomwoyo wangu zvingapera hazvo,
asi Mwari isimba romwoyo wangu
nomugove wangu nokusingaperi.
Avo vari kure nemi vachaparara;
munoparadza vose vasina kutendeka kwamuri.
Asi kana ndirini, zvakanaka kuva pedyo naMwari.
Ndakaita Ishe Jehovha utiziro hwangu;
ndichataura zvamabasa enyu ose.
Haiwa Mwari, makatirambireiko nokusingaperi?
Kutsamwa kwenyu kwapfungairireiko pamusoro pamakwai anofudzwa nemi?
Rangarirai vanhu vamakatenga kare,
rudzi rwenhaka yenyu, ivo vamakadzikinura,
Gomo reZioni, pamaigara.
Dzorai nhambwe dzenyu mutarise matongo asingaperi,
kuparadza ikoku kwose kwakauya nomuvengi pamusoro penzvimbo yenyu tsvene.
Vavengi venyu vakaomba panzvimbo yamakasangana nesu;
vakamisa mireza yavo sechiratidzo.
Vakaita savanhu vanosimudza matemo
kuti vateme dondo remiti.
Vakaputsa zvose zvakavezwa
namatemo avo nembezo.
Vakapisira pasi nzvimbo yenyu tsvene;
vakamhura ugaro hweZita renyu.
Vakati mumwoyo yavo, “Tichavaputsa zvachose!”
Vakapisa nzvimbo dzose dzokunamatira Mwari munyika.
Hatichaoni zviratidzo zvinoshamisa;
hakuna muprofita akasara,
pakati pedu hapana munhu anoziva kuti zvicharamba zvakadaro kusvikira rini.
Haiwa Mwari, muvengi acharamba achikushorai kusvikira riniko?
Ko, muvengi acharamba achimhura zita renyu nokusingaperi here?
Munodzoserereiko ruoko rwenyu shure, irwo ruoko rwenyu rworudyi?
Rubvisei pamupendero wenguo yenyu muvaparadze!
Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, ndimi mambo wangu kubva nakare;
imi munouyisa ruponeso panyika.
Ndimi makaganhura gungwa napakati nesimba renyu;
makaputsa misoro yechikara chomumvura.
Ndimi makapwanya misoro yaRevhiatani,
mukamuita chokudya chezvisikwa zvomugwenga.
Ndimi makazarura zvitubu nehova;
mukapwisa nzizi dzaigara dzichierera.
Zuva nderenyu, uye usiku ndohwenyuwo;
makasimbisa zuva nomwedzi.
Ndimi makatara miganhu yose yenyika;
mukaita zvose zhizha nechando.
Rangarirai kuti muvengi akakushorai sei, imi Jehovha,
uye kuti mapenzi akamhura sei zita renyu.
Regai kuisa upenyu hwenjiva yenyu kumhuka dzesango;
regai kukanganwa nokusingaperi upenyu hwavanhu venyu vanonetswa.
Ivai nehanya nesungano yenyu,
nokuti mweya wokurwisana wazadza nzvimbo dzerima munyika.
Musarega vakadzvinyirirwa vachidududza shure nenyadzi;
varombo navanoshayiwa ngavarumbidze zita renyu.
Simukai, imi Mwari, mutsigire mhaka yenyu;
rangarirai kuti mapenzi anokushorai sei zuva rose.
Regai kushayira hanya ruzha rwavadzivisi venyu,
bope ravavengi venyu, rinoramba richikwira.
Tinokuvongai, imi Mwari, tinokuvongai,
nokuti Zita renyu riri pedyo;
vanhu vanotaura nezvamabasa enyu anoshamisa.
Imi munoti, “Ndinosarudza nguva yakatarwa;
ndini ndinotonga zvakarurama.
Panozununguka nyika yose navanhu vayo,
ini ndini ndinobata mbiru dzayo zvakasimba. Sera
Kuna vanozvikudza ndinoti, ‘Regai kuzvikudzazve,’
uye kuna vakaipa, ndinoti, ‘Regai kusimudza nyanga dzenyu.
Regai kusimudzira nyanga dzenyu kudenga;
regai kutaura nemitsipa mikukutu.’ ”
Hakuna munhu anobva kumabvazuva kana kumavirira,
kana anobva kugwenga angasimudzira munhu.
Asi Mwari ndiye anotonga:
Anoderedza mumwe, achisimudzira mumwe.
Muruoko rwaJehovha mune mukombe
uzere newaini inopupuma, yakavhenganiswa nezvinonhuhwira;
anoidururira pasi, uye vakaipa vose vapanyika
vanoinwa kusvikira pamasese ayo.
Kana ndirini, ndichaparidza izvi nokusingaperi;
ndichaimbira Mwari waJakobho rwiyo rwokurumbidza.
Ndichagura nyanga dzavakaipa vose,
asi nyanga dzavakarurama dzichasimudzirwa kumusoro.
Mwari anozivikanwa muJudha;
zita rake iguru muIsraeri.
Tende rake riri muSaremu,
ugaro hwake paZioni.
Ndipo paakavhuna miseve inovaima,
nhoo neminondo, izvo zvombo zvokurwa. Sera
Imi makashongedzwa nechiedza,
kupfuura makomo akapfuma nemhuka.
Varume vakashinga vakavata pasi vapambwa,
vakavata hope dzavo dzokupedzisira;
hakuna mumwe wavarwi
angasimudza maoko ake.
Pakutuka kwenyu, imi Mwari waJakobho,
zvose bhiza nengoro zvinovata zvakati mwiro.
Imi moga ndimi munofanira kutyiwa.
Mukatsamwa, ndianiko angamira pamberi penyu?
Muri kudenga makazivisa kutonga kwenyu,
uye nyika yakatya ikanyarara,
haiwa Mwari, pamakasimuka kuti mutonge,
kuti muponese vanonetswa vose venyika. Sera
Zvirokwazvo hasha dzenyu pamusoro pavanhu dzinokuvigirai kurumbidzwa,
uye vanosara pahasha dzenyu vachadziviswa.
Itai mhiko kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu mugodzizadzisa;
nyika dzose dzakakupoteredzai
ngadzivigire zvipo kuna Iye anofanira kutyiwa.
Anoputsa mweya yavatongi;
anotyiwa namadzimambo enyika.
Haiwa vanhu vangu, inzwai kudzidzisa kwangu;
teererai mashoko omuromo wangu.
Ndichashamisa muromo wangu nditaure nomufananidzo,
ndichataura zvinhu zvakavanzika, zvinhu zvakare kare,
zvatakanzwa nezvatakaziva,
zvatakaudzwa namadzibaba edu.
Hatingazozvivanziri vana vavo;
tichaudza rudzi runotevera
mabasa angarumbidzwa aJehovha,
simba rake, nezvishamiso zvaakaita.
Akatema zvirevo zvaJakobho
akasimbisa murayiro muIsraeri,
waakarayira madzitateguru edu
kuti vadzidzise vana vavo,
kuti rudzi runotevera ruzvizive,
kunyange vana vachazoberekwa,
naivo vagozoudzawo vana vavo.
Ipapo vachavimba naMwari wavo
uye havangazokanganwi mabasa ake
asi vachazochengeta mirayiro yake.
Havazofanani namadzitateguru avo,
rudzi rwakanga rwakasindimara uye rwaimumukira,
mwoyo yavo yakanga isingateereri Mwari,
mweya yavo yakanga isina kutendeka kwaari.
Vanhu vokwaEfuremu, kunyange vakanga vakapakata uta,
vakadzokera shure pazuva rokurwa;
havana kuchengeta sungano yaMwari,
uye vakaramba kufamba maererano nomurayiro wake.
Vakakanganwa zvaakaita,
zvishamiso zvaakavaratidza.
Akaita zviratidzo pamberi pamadzibaba avo
munyika yeIjipiti, mudunhu reZoani.
Akapamura gungwa akavayambutsa napakati;
akaita kuti mvura imire yakasimba sorusvingo.
Akavatungamirira negore masikati,
uye nechiedza chomoto usiku hwose.
Akapamura ruware mugwenga
akavapa mvura yakawanda seyamakungwa;
akabudisa hova dzemvura paruware
akaita kuti iyerere seyenzizi.
Asi vakaramba vachingomutadzira,
vachimukira Wokumusoro-soro mugwenga.
Vakaedza Mwari nobwoni
vachimugombedzera kuti avape zvokudya zvavaipanga.
Vakapopotera Mwari, vachiti,
“Ko, Mwari angawadzira tafura mugwenga here?
Paakarova dombo, mvura yakatubuka,
uye hova dzakayerera mvura zhinji.
Asi angagona kutipawo zvokudya here?
Angavigira vanhu vake nyama here?”
Jehovha akati avanzwa, akatsamwa zvikuru kwazvo;
moto wake ukaveserwa Jakobho,
uye hasha dzake dzikamukira Israeri,
nokuti havana kutenda muna Mwari
kana kuvimba nokurwira kwake.
Asi akarayira matenga kumusoro
akazarura makonhi okumatenga;
akanayisa mana kuti vanhu vadye,
akavapa zviyo zvokudenga.
Vanhu vakadya chingwa chavatumwa;
akavatumira zvokudya zvose zvavaigona kudya.
Akazarura mhepo yokumabvazuva kubva kudenga,
uye akafambisa mhepo yakabva zasi nesimba rake.
Akavanayisira nyama pamusoro pavo seguruva,
shiri dzinobhururuka dzakaita sejecha rokumhenderekedzo yegungwa.
Akaita kuti dziburukire mumisasa yavo,
dzakapoteredza matende avo ose.
Vakadya kusvikira vaguta kwazvo,
nokuti akanga avapa zvavakanga vachipanga.
Asi vasati vafuratira chokudya chavaikarira,
kunyange pachakanga chichiri pamiromo yavo,
kutsamwa kwaMwari kwakavamukira;
akauraya vakanga vakanyanya kusimba pakati pavo,
akaparadza majaya eIsraeri.
Kunyange zvakadaro, vakaramba vachingotadza;
kunyange zvazvo zviratidzo zvake izvi zvaivapo, havana kutenda.
Saka akagumisa mazuva avo nezvisina maturo,
uye makore avo mukutya.
Pose pavaiurayiwa naMwari, ndipo pavaimutsvaka;
vaishingairira kudzokerazve kwaari.
Vakarangarira kuti Mwari ndiye Dombo ravo,
kuti Mwari Wokumusoro-soro ndiye Mudzikinuri wavo.
Asizve vaingomubata kumeso nemiromo yavo,
vachimurevera nhema nendimi dzavo;
mwoyo yavo yakanga isina kutendeka kwaari,
vakanga vasina kutendeka pasungano yake.
Kunyange zvakadaro
iye akavanzwira tsitsi;
akavakanganwira kuipa kwavo akasavaparadza.
Nguva nenguva akadzora kutsamwa kwake,
uye haana kumutsa hasha dzake dzose.
Akarangarira kuti ivo vaingova nyama bedzi,
mhepo inopfuura isingadzoki.
Vakamumukira mugwenga kazhinji sei,
uye vakamuitisa shungu murenje!
Vakaedza Mwari vamuedzazve;
vakagumbusa Iye Mutsvene waIsraeri.
Havana kurangarira simba rake,
zuva raakavadzikinura kubva pamudzvinyiriri,
zuva raakaratidza zviratidzo zvake zvinoshamisa muIjipiti,
zvishamiso zvake mudunhu reZoani.
Akashandura nzizi dzavo dzikava ropa;
havana kugona kunwa muhova dzavo.
Akavatumira mapupira enhunzi dzikavaparadza,
uye matatya akavaparadza zvikuru.
Akapa zviyo zvavo kumagutaguta
nezvibereko zvavo kumhashu.
Akaparadza mazambiringa avo nechimvuramabwe,
uye namaonde emionde yavo nechando.
Mombe dzavo akadziisa kuchimvuramabwe,
nezvipfuwo zvavo kukurova kwemheni.
Akaregedzera kutsamwa kwake kukuru pamusoro pavo,
hasha dzake, shungu dzake noukasha hwake,
boka ravatumwa vokuparadza.
Akagadzira nzira yokutsamwa kwake;
haana kuponesa mweya yavo parufu asi akavaisa kudenda.
Akauraya matangwe ose eIjipiti,
chibereko chokutanga chomurume pamatende aHamu.
Asi akabudisa vanhu vake seboka ramakwai;
akavatungamirira samakwai nomugwenga.
Akavafambisa norugare,
asi gungwa rakamedza vavengi vavo.
Saizvozvo akavasvitsa kumuganhu wenyika yake tsvene,
kunyika yamakomo yaakatora noruoko rwake rworudyi.
Akadzinga ndudzi mberi kwavo,
akagovera nyika yavo kwavari senhaka;
akagarisa rudzi rwaIsraeri mudzimba dzavo.
Asi vakaedza Mwari
uye vakamukira Wokumusoro-soro;
vakasachengeta zvirevo zvake.
Vakanga vasingazvirereki uye vasina kutendeka samadzibaba avo,
vasingavimbiki souta hunonyengera.
Vakamutsamwisa nenzvimbo dzavo dzakakwirira;
vakamutsa godo rake nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvavo.
Mwari akati avanzwa akatsamwa zvikuru kwazvo;
akaramba Israeri zvachose.
Akasiya tabhenakeri yeShiro,
iyo tende yaakanga amisa pakati pavanhu.
Akaendesa areka yesimba rake kuutapwa,
kubwinya kwake mumaoko omuvengi.
Akaisa vanhu vake kumunondo;
akatsamwira nhaka yake zvikuru kwazvo.
Moto wakaparadza majaya avo,
uye varandakadzi vavo vakashayiwa nziyo dzesvitsa;
vaprista vavo vakanga vaiswa kumunondo,
uye chirikadzi dzavo hadzina kugona kuchema.
Ipapo Ishe akamuka somunhu anga akakotsira,
somunhu amuka pakubatwa newaini.
Akarova vavengi vake vakadzokera shure;
akavanyadzisa nokusingaperi.
Ipapo akaramba matende aJosefa,
haana kusarudza rudzi rwaEfuremu;
asi akasarudza rudzi rwaJudha,
Gomo reZioni, raakada.
Akavaka nzvimbo yake tsvene senhare yakakwirira,
senyika yaakasimbisa nokusingaperi.
Akasarudza Dhavhidhi muranda wake,
akamutora kumatanga amakwai;
akamubvisa pakufudza makwai
kuti ave mufudzi wavanhu vake Jakobho,
vaIsraeri nhaka yake.
Uye Dhavhidhi akavafudza nokururama kwomwoyo;
akavatungamirira namaoko ouchenjeri.
Haiwa Mwari, ndudzi dzapinda panhaka yenyu;
vakasvibisa temberi yenyu tsvene,
Jerusarema varideredza rikava marara.
Vakapa mitumbi yavaranda venyu
sezvokudya zveshiri dzedenga,
nyama yavatsvene venyu kuzvikara zvenyika.
Vakateura ropa kunge mvura
paJerusarema rose,
uye hakuna munhu anoviga zvitunha.
Tiri chinhu chinoshorwa navatigere navo,
chinosekwa nechinozvidzwa kuna avo vakatipoteredza.
Haiwa Jehovha, mucharamba makatitsamwira nokusingaperi kusvikira riniko?
Godo renyu richapisa somoto kusvikira riniko?
Dururirai hasha dzenyu pamusoro pendudzi dzisingakuzive,
napaushe husingadani kuzita renyu;
nokuti vakapedza Jakobho
uye vakaparadza nyika yokwake.
Regai kuverengera pamusoro pedu zvivi zvamadzibaba;
tsitsi dzenyu ngadzikurumidze kuuya kuzosangana nesu,
nokuti tiri pakutambudzika.
Tibatsirei, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu,
nokuda kwokukudzwa kwezita renyu;
tirwirei mutiregerere zvivi zvedu
nokuda kwezita renyu.
Ndudzi dzichataurireiko dzichiti,
“Mwari wavo aripi?”
Zivisai pakati pendudzi, pamberi pedu,
kuti munotsiva ropa ravaranda venyu rakateurwa.
Kugomera kwavasungwa ngakusvike pamberi penyu;
nesimba roruoko rwenyu
chengetedzai avo vakatongerwa rufu.
Mutsive kanomwe pamabvi avavakidzani vedu,
kutuka kwavakaita zita renyu, imi Ishe.
Ipapo vanhu venyu, makwai amafuro enyu,
vachakurumbidzai nokusingaperi;
kubva kune chimwe chizvarwa kusvikira kune chimwe chizvarwa,
ticharondedzera nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu.
Imbirai Mwari nomufaro iye simba redu;
danidzirai kuna Mwari waJakobho!
Vambai rwiyo, muridze tambureni,
ridzai mbira dzinonakidza nomutengeranwa.
Ridzai runyanga rwehwai paKugara kwoMwedzi,
uye pakuchena kwomwedzi, pazuva roMutambo wedu;
ichi ndicho chirevo chaIsraeri,
chakatarwa naMwari waJakobho.
Akachisimbisa somutemo wakanyorwa waJosefa
panguva yaakandorwa neIjipiti,
uko kwatakanzwa mutauro watakanga tisinganzwisisi.
Iye anoti, “Ndakabvisa mutoro pamapfudzi avo;
maoko avo akasunungurwa padengu.
Pakutambudzika kwako wakadana ini ndikakununura,
ndakakupindura ndiri mugore rokutinhira;
ndakakuedza pamvura zhinji yeMeribha. Sera
“Inzwai, imi vanhu vangu, uye ndichakuyambirai,
kana mukada chete kunditeerera, imi Israeri!
Pakati penyu ngaparege kuva namwari wavatorwa,
musapfugamira mwari wokumwe.
Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako,
akakubudisa kubva munyika yeIjipiti.
Shamisa muromo wako kwazvo, ndigouzadza.
“Asi vanhu vangu havana kuda kundinzwa,
Israeri haana kuda kuzviisa pasi pangu.
Saka ndakavaregera paukukutu hwemwoyo yavo,
kuti vatevere mano avo.
“Kana vanhu vangu vakada kunditeerera,
kana Israeri akada kutevera nzira dzangu,
ndaikurumidza kukunda sei vavengi
vavo nokurova vavengi vavo noruoko rwangu!
Vaya vanovenga Jehovha vachatya pamberi pake,
uye kurangwa kwavo kuchagara nokusingaperi.
Asi imi muchagutswa nezviyo zvakaisvonaka;
uye ndichakugutsai nouchi hunobva padombo.”
Mwari anogara paungano huru;
anotonga pakati pa“vamwari” achiti,
“Muchasvika riniko muchirwira vasakarurama
uye muchisanangura vanhu vakaipa? Sera
Tongai mhaka dzavasina simba nenherera;
chengetedzai kodzero dzavarombo navakadzvinyirirwa.
Nunurai vasina simba navanoshayiwa;
varwirei paruoko rwowakaipa.
“Havana chavanoziva, havana chavanonzwisisa.
Vanongofamba-famba murima;
nheyo dzose dzenyika dzinozungunuswa.
“Ndakati, ‘Muri vamwari;
imi mose muri vanakomana veWokumusoro-soro.’
Asi muchafa savanhuwo zvavo;
muchawa savatongi vose.”
Simukai, imi Mwari, mutonge nyika,
nokuti ndudzi dzose inhaka yenyu.
Haiwa Mwari, regai kunyarara;
musanyarara, imi Mwari, musati mwiro.
Tarirai kumutswa kwaitwa vavengi venyu,
namasimudziro avaita misoro yavo.
Vakarangana nounyengeri pamusoro pavanhu venyu;
vanorangana pamusoro paavo vamunochengeta zvakanaka.
Ivo vanoti, “Uyai, ngativaparadzei sorudzi,
kuti zita raIsraeri rirove.”
Vanorangana pamwe chete nomwoyo mumwe chete;
vanoita sungano yokuzorwa nemi,
matende eEdhomu nevaIshumaeri,
neMoabhu navaHagari,
Gebha, Amoni neAmareki,
Firistia, navanhu veTire.
Kunyange neAsiria yabatana
navo kuti vasimbise zvizvarwa zvaRoti. Sera
Muvaitire sezvamakaitira vaMidhia,
sezvamakaita kuna Sisera naJabhini paRwizi Kishoni,
ivo vakafira paEndori
uye vakava sendove pamusoro pevhu.
Muite makurukota avo saOrebhu naZibhi,
machinda avo ose saZebha naZarumuna,
ivo vakati, “Handei tindotora
mafuro aMwari.”
Haiwa Mwari wangu, vaitei sendira,
sehundi inodzingwa nemhepo.
Somoto unopisa sango
kana moto unoririma mugomo,
saka vateverei nedutu renyu
mugovavhundutsa nokutinhira wenyu.
Fukidzai zviso zvavo nenyadzi
kuti vanhu vagotsvaka zita renyu, imi Jehovha.
Ngavarambe vachinyadziswa
uye vavhundutswe; ngavafire munyadzi dzavo.
Ngavazive kuti imi, mune zita rinonzi Jehovha,
ndimi moga Wokumusoro-soro ari pamusoro penyika yose.
Ugaro hwenyu hwakanaka sei,
imi Jehovha Wamasimba Ose!
Mweya wangu unopanga,
uye unotoziya, nokuda kwezvivanze zvaJehovha;
mwoyo wangu nenyama yangu
zvinodana kuna Mwari mupenyu.
Kunyange shiri diki yakazviwanira imba,
nenyenganyenga yakazviwanirawo
dendere kwaingachochonyera vana vayo,
iyo nzvimbo iri pedyo nearitari yenyu,
imi Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, Mambo wangu naMwari wangu.
Vakaropafadzwa avo vanogara mumba menyu;
vanogara vachikurumbidzai. Sera
Vakaropafadzwa avo vane simba ravo mamuri,
vakaisa mwoyo yavo parwendo rweZioni.
Pavanopfuura nomuMupata weBhaka,
vanouita nzvimbo yamatsime;
mvura yomuzhizha inouzadzawo namadziva.
Vanowedzera simba pasimba,
kusvikira mumwe nomumwe wavo amira pamberi paMwari muZioni.
Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha Mwari Wamasimba Ose;
rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, imi Mwari waJakobho. Sera
Haiwa Mwari, tariraiwo nhoo yedu;
ringirai nenyasha dzenyu pamuzodziwa wenyu.
Zviri nani kuva pavazhe dzenyu kwezuva rimwe chete,
kupfuura mazuva zviuru ndiri kumwe;
ndingada zvangu kuva murindi womukova weimba yaMwari
wangu kukunda kugara mumatende avakaipa.
Nokuti Jehovha Mwari ndiye zuva nenhoo;
Jehovha anopa nyasha nokukudzwa;
hapana chinhu chakanaka chaanganyima
avo vanofamba zvakarurama.
Haiwa Jehovha Wamasimba Ose,
akaropafadzwa munhu anovimba nemi.
Makanzwira nyasha nyika yenyu, imi Jehovha;
makadzosera Jakobho nhaka yake.
Makakanganwira kutadza kwavanhu venyu,
uye mukafukidza zvivi zvavo zvose. Sera
Makaisa parutivi hasha dzenyu dzose,
mukadzoka pakutsamwa kwenyu kunotyisa.
Tidzoreizve, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu,
mugoisa kure nemi kusafara kwenyu pamusoro pedu.
Mucharamba makatitsamwira nokusingaperi here?
Mucharega kutsamwa kwenyu kuripo kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvose here?
Ko, hamungatimutsiridzizve here,
kuti vanhu venyu vagofara mamuri?
Tiratidzei ngoni dzenyu, imi Jehovha,
mugotipawo ruponeso rwenyu.
Ndichateerera zvichataurwa naJehovha Mwari;
anovimbisa rugare kuvanhu vake, vatsvene vake,
asi ngavasadzokerazve kuupenzi.
Chokwadi, ruponeso rwake rwuri pedyo navanomutya,
kuti kubwinya kwake kugogara munyika yedu.
Rudo nokutendeka zvinosangana pamwe chete;
kururama norugare zvinosvetana.
Kutendeka kunomera panyika,
kururama kunotarira pasi kuri kudenga.
Chokwadi, Jehovha achapa zvinhu zvakanaka,
uye nyika yedu ichabereka mukoho wayo.
Kururama kuchamutungamirira,
uye kuchamugadzirira nzira yetsoka dzake.
Inzwai, imi Jehovha, mundipindure,
nokuti ndiri murombo uye ndinoshayiwa.
Chengetai upenyu hwangu, nokuti ndakazvipa kwamuri.
Muri Mwari wangu;
ponesai muranda wenyu anovimba nemi.
Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Ishe,
nokuti ndinodana kwamuri zuva rose.
Vigirai muranda wenyu mufaro,
nokuti kwamuri, imi Ishe,
ndinosimudzira mweya wangu.
Imi munokanganwira uye makanaka, imi Ishe,
muzere norudo kuna vose vanodana kwamuri.
Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha;
inzwai kuchemera kwangu ngoni dzenyu.
Ndichadana kwamuri pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu,
nokuti muchandipindura.
Haiwa Ishe, hakuna akafanana nemi pakati pavamwari;
hakuna mabasa akaita seenyu.
Ndudzi dzose dzamakaita dzichauya
kuzonamata pamberi penyu, imi Ishe;
dzicharumbidza zita renyu.
Nokuti imi muri mukuru uye munoita zvinhu zvinoshamisa;
imi moga ndimi Mwari.
Haiwa Jehovha, ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu,
uye ndichafamba muzvokwadi yenyu;
ndipei mwoyo mumwe,
kuti ndigotya zita renyu.
Ndichakurumbidzai, imi Ishe Mwari wangu, nomwoyo wangu wose;
ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi.
Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru kwandiri;
makandirwira paguva rakadzika.
Haiwa Mwari, vanozvikudza vari kundirwisa;
boka ravanhu vane utsinye rinotsvaka upenyu hwangu,
vanhu vasina hanya nemi.
Asi, imi Ishe, mune tsitsi uye muri Mwari ane nyasha,
anononoka kutsamwa, azere norudo nokutendeka.
Dzokerai kwandiri mundinzwire ngoni;
ipai simba renyu kumuranda wenyu,
uye muponese mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu.
Ndipei chiratidzo chokunaka kwenyu,
kuti vavengi vangu vazvione vagonyadziswa,
nokuti imi Jehovha makandibatsira uye mukandinyaradza.
Akateya nheyo dzake pagomo dzvene;
Jehovha anoda masuo eZioni
kupfuura pose panogara Jakobho.
Zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zvinotaurwa pamusoro pako,
iwe guta raMwari: Sera
“Ndichanyora nezvaRahabhi neBhabhironi
pakati pavanondiziva,
neFiristiawo neTire, pamwe chete neEtiopia,
uye vachati, ‘Uyu akaberekerwa muZioni.’ ”
Zvirokwazvo, pamusoro peZioni vachati,
“Uyu nowoyo vakaberekerwamo,
uye Wokumusoro-soro pachake acharisimbisa.”
Jehovha achanyora panonyorwa mazita amarudzi,
kuti, “Uyu akaberekerwa muZioni.” Sera
Pavanoimba, vachaimba vachiti,
“Matsime angu ose ari mamuri.”
Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari anondiponesa,
ndakachema masikati nousiku pamberi penyu.
Munyengetero wangu ngausvike pamberi penyu;
rerekerai nzeve yenyu kukuchema kwangu.
Nokuti mweya wangu uzere nokutambudzika,
uye upenyu hwangu hwaswedera pedyo neguva.
Ndinoverengwa pakati paavo vakaburukira kugomba;
ndava somunhu asina simba.
Ndakatsaurwa pamwe chete navakafa,
savakaurayiwa vavete muguva,
vamusingacharangaririzve,
vakagurwa kubva pakuchengeta kwenyu.
Makandiisa mugomba rakadzika dzika,
murima guru makadzika dzika.
Hasha dzenyu dzinorema kwazvo pamusoro pangu,
makandifukidza namafungu enyu ose. Sera
Makanditorera shamwari dzangu dzapedyo,
uye mukandiita chinhu chinonyangadza.
Ndakapfigirwa uye handingatongopunyuki;
meso angu asviba neshungu.
Ndinodana kwamuri, imi Jehovha, mazuva ose;
ndinotambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri.
Ko, munoratidza zvishamiso zvenyu kuna vakafa here?
Ko, vakafa vanomuka vachikurumbidzai here? Sera
Ko, rudo rwenyu runoparidzwa muguva,
nokutendeka kwenyu mukuparadzwa here?
Ko, zvishamiso zvenyu zvinozivikanwa munzvimbo yerima,
kana mabasa akarurama enyu munyika yokukanganwa here?
Asi ndinochemera rubatsiro kwamuri, imi Jehovha;
mangwanani, munyengetero wangu unosvika pamberi penyu.
Seiko, imi Jehovha, muchindiramba
uye muchindivanzira chiso chenyu?
Kubvira pauduku hwangu, ndakatambudzika zvokutosvika pedyo norufu;
ndatambudzika nokutyisa kwenyu uye handisisina tariro.
Hasha dzenyu dzakapfuura napamusoro pangu;
kutyisa kwenyu kwandiparadza.
Zuva rose zvakandipoteredza samafashamu;
ndakaputirwa nazvo chose.
Makanditorera shamwari dzangu navadikani vangu;
rima ndiyo shamwari yangu iri pedyo.
Jehovha, imi makava ugaro hwedu
kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Makomo asati azvarwa
uye musati mabudisa nyika nepasi rose,
kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi muri Mwari.
Munodzosera vanhu kuguruva zvakare, muchiti,
“Dzokerai kuguruva, imi vanakomana vavanhu.”
Nokuti pamberi penyu makore chiuru
akangofanana nezuva richangopfuura,
kana senguva yokurinda usiku.
Munokukura vanhu pakuvata kworufu;
vakaita sebundo idzva ramangwanani,
kunyange richimera riri idzva mangwanani,
nenguva yamadekwana rinenge raoma uye rasvava.
Tapera nokutsamwa kwenyu
uye tinovhundutswa nehasha dzenyu.
Makaisa zvakaipa zvedu pamberi penyu,
makaisa zvivi zvedu zvakavanzika muchiedza chokuvapo kwenyu.
Mazuva edu ose anopfuura napasi pehasha dzenyu;
tinopedza makore edu nokuchema.
Uwandu hwamazuva edu hunosvika makore makumi manomwe,
kana makumi masere, kana tiine simba;
kunyange zvakadaro uwandu hwawo hunongova nhamo nokusuwa,
nokuti anokurumidza kupfuura, uye isu tobhururuka toenda.
Ndianiko anoziva simba rokutsamwa kwenyu?
Nokuti hasha dzenyu dzakakura sokutyiwa kwakakufanirai imi.
Tidzidzisei kuverenga mazuva edu zvakanaka,
kuti tiwane mwoyo wouchenjeri.
Dzokai, imi Jehovha! Zvichadaro kusvikira riniko?
Ivai netsitsi pamusoro pavaranda venyu.
Tigutsei mangwanani norudo rwenyu rusingaperi,
kuti tigoimba nomufaro tigofara mazuva edu ose.
Tifadzei zvinoenzana namazuva amakatitambudza,
samakore mazhinji atakaona nhamo.
Mabasa enyu ngaaratidzwe kuvaranda venyu,
nokubwinya kwenyu kuvana vavo.
Nyasha dzaIshe Mwari wedu ngadzive pamusoro pedu;
tisimbisirei mabasa amaoko edu, hongu,
simbisai basa ramaoko edu.
Uyo anogara panzvimbo yokuvanda yeWokumusoro-soro
achazorora mumumvuri weWamasimba Ose.
Ndichati pamusoro paJehovha, “Ndiye utiziro hwangu nenhare yangu,
Mwari wangu, wandinovimba naye.”
Zvirokwazvo achakuponesa parugombe rwomuteyi
napadenda rinouraya.
Achakufukidza neminhenga yake,
uye uchawana utiziro pasi pamapapiro ake;
kutendeka kwake kuchava nhoo yako norusvingo rwako.
Haungatyiswi nokuvhundutsa kwousiku,
kana museve unopfurwa masikati,
kana hosha inofamba murima,
kana denda rinoparadza masikati.
Chiuru chingawa parutivi rwako,
zviuru gumi kurudyi pako,
asi hazvingaswederi kwauri.
Uchangozviona nameso ako chete,
uye uchaona kurangwa kwavakaipa.
Kana ukaita Wokumusoro-soro ugaro hwako,
kunyange Jehovha, iye utiziro hwangu,
ipapo hapana chakaipa chichakuwira,
hakuna njodzi ichasvika patende rako.
Nokuti acharayira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako,
kuti vakuchengete panzira dzako dzose;
vachakusimudza mumaoko avo,
kuti rutsoka rwako rurege kugumburwa padombo.
Uchatsika pamusoro peshumba napamusoro pechiva;
uchatsika-tsika shumba huru nenyoka.
“Nokuti anondida,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, “neni ndichamununura;
ndichamudzivirira, nokuti anoziva zita rangu.
Achadana kwandiri, uye ndichamupindura;
ndichava naye pakutambudzika,
ndichamurwira uye ndichamukudza.
Ndichamugutsa noupenyu hurefu,
uye ndichamuratidza ruponeso rwangu.”
Zvakanaka kurumbidza Jehovha
nokuimbira zita renyu nziyo, imi Wokumusoro-soro,
kuparidza rudo rwenyu mangwanani
nokutendeka kwenyu usiku,
nechiridzwa chine hungiso
gumi namaririro akanaka embira.
Nokuti munondifadza namabasa enyu, imi Jehovha;
ndinoimba nomufaro nokuda kwamabasa amaoko enyu.
Haiwa Jehovha, mabasa enyu makuru seiko,
ndangariro dzenyu dzakadzika sei!
Munhu asina njere haazivi,
mapenzi haanzwisisi,
kuti kunyange vakaipa vachimera souswa,
uye vaiti vezvakaipa vose vachikura,
vachaparadzwa nokusingaperi.
Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munosimudzirwa nokusingaperi.
Nokuti zvirokwazvo vavengi venyu, imi Jehovha,
zvirokwazvo vavengi venyu vachaparadzwa;
vaiti vezvakaipa vose vachaparadzirwa.
Makasimudzira runyanga rwangu sorwenyati;
mafuta akaisvonaka akadururirwa pamusoro pangu.
Meso angu akaona kukundwa kwavadzivisi vangu;
nzeve dzangu dzakanzwa kuparadzwa kwavavengi vangu vakaipa.
Vakarurama vachakura kwazvo somuchindwe,
vachakura somusidhari weRebhanoni;
wakadyarwa muimba yaJehovha,
vachakura kwazvo muvanze dzaMwari wedu.
Vacharamba vachibereka zvibereko pakukwegura kwavo,
vachagara vari vanyoro uye vari vatsva.
Vachaparidza kuti, “Jehovha akarurama;
ndiye Dombo rangu, uye maari hamuna chakaipa.”
Jehovha anobata ushe, akashongedzwa noumambo;
Jehovha akashongedzwa noumambo uye akafukidzwa nesimba.
Nyika yakateyiwa zvakasimba; haingazungunuswi.
Chigaro chenyu choushe chakasimbiswa kare kare;
imi muripo nokusingaperi.
Haiwa Jehovha, makungwa akasimudza,
makungwa akasimudza manzwi awo;
makungwa akasimudza mafungu anotinhira.
Mukuru kukunda kutinhira wemvura zhinji,
mukuru kukunda mafungu egungwa,
Jehovha ari kumusoro ndiye mukuru.
Zvamakatema hazvishanduki;
utsvene hunofukidza imba yenyu imi Jehovha,
kwamazuva asingaperi.
Haiwa Jehovha, imi Mwari anotsiva,
haiwa Mwari iyemi munotsiva, penyai.
Simukai, imi Mutongi wenyika;
tsivai vanozvikudza zvakavafanira.
Haiwa Jehovha, vakaipa vachasvika riniko,
vachasvika riniko vakaipa vachingofara?
Vanodurura mashoko okuzvikudza;
vose vanoita zvakaipa vazere nokuzvirumbidza.
Vanopwanya vanhu venyu, imi Jehovha,
vanodzvinyirira nhaka yenyu.
Vanouraya chirikadzi nomweni;
vanoponda nherera.
Vanoti, “Jehovha haaoni;
Mwari waJakobho haana hanya.”
Nzwisisai, imi vasina njere pakati pavanhu;
imi mapenzi, muchava vakachenjera riniko?
Ko, iye akasima nzeve, haanganzwi here?
Iye akaumba ziso haangaoni here?
Ko, iye anoranga ndudzi haangarangi here?
Anodzidzisa vanhu angashayiwa zivo here?
Jehovha anoziva mirangariro yavanhu;
anoziva kuti haina maturo.
Akaropafadzwa munhu anorangwa nemi, iyemi Jehovha,
munhu wamunodzidzisa pamurayiro wenyu;
munomuzorodza pamazuva enhamo,
kusvikira akaipa achererwa gomba.
Nokuti Jehovha haangarambi vanhu vake;
haangambosiyi nhaka yake.
Kururamisira kuchawanikwa nokuda kwevakarurama,
uye vose vakarurama pamwoyo vachakutevera.
Ndianiko achandirwira pane vakaipa?
Ndianiko achandibatsira pavaiti vezvakaipa?
Dai Jehovha asina kundibatsira,
ndingadai ndakakurumidza kugara parunyararo rworufu.
Pandakati, “Rutsoka rwangu rwotedzemuka,”
rudo rwenyu, imi Jehovha, rwakanditsigira.
Pandakava nokufunganya kukuru mandiri,
kunyaradza kwenyu kwakandivigira mufaro kumweya wangu.
Ko, chigaro choushe chino uori chingashamwaridzana nemi here,
icho chinouyisa kutambudzika muzvirevo zvacho?
Vanobatana pamwe chete kuti varwise vakarurama,
vachipomera mhosva yorufu kuna vasina mhosva.
Asi Jehovha ndiye ava nhare yangu,
uye Mwari wangu ndiye dombo randinotizira.
Achavatsiva nokuda kwezvivi zvavo,
uye achavaparadza nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo;
Jehovha Mwari wedu achavaparadza.
Uyai, tiimbire Jehovha nomufaro;
ngatidanidzirei kuDombo roruponeso rwedu.
Ngatisvikei pamberi pake nokuvonga
uye timukudze nenziyo.
Nokuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari mukuru,
Mambo mukuru pamusoro pavamwari vose.
Nzvimbo dzakadzika dzapanyika dziri muruoko rwake,
uye misoro yamakomo ndeyake.
Gungwa nderake, nokuti ndiye akariita,
uye maoko ake akaumba nyika yakaoma.
Uyai tikotame, tinamate,
ngatipfugamei pamberi paJehovha Muiti wedu;
nokuti ndiye Mwari wedu,
uye isu tiri vanhu vanofudzwa naye,
makwai anochengetwa naye.
Nhasi kana muchinzwa inzwi rake,
musaomesa mwoyo yenyu sezvamakaita paMeribha,
sezvamakaita pazuva riya paMasa mugwenga,
pandakaedzwa namadzibaba enyu
kunyange vakanga vaona zvandakanga ndaita.
Ndakatsamwira rudzi urwu kwamakore makumi mana;
ndakati, “Ava vanhu vane mwoyo yakatsauka,
uye havana kuziva nzira dzangu.”
Saka ndakapika pakutsamwa kwangu ndikati,
“Havangazombopindi pazororo rangu.”
Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva;
imbirai Jehovha, nyika yose.
Imbirai Jehovha, rumbidzai zita rake;
paridzai ruponeso rwake zuva nezuva.
Paridzai kubwinya kwake pakati pendudzi,
namabasa ake anoshamisa pakati pamarudzi.
Nokuti Jehovha mukuru uye anofanira kurumbidzwa,
iye anofanira kutyiwa pamusoro pavamwari vose.
Nokuti vamwari vose vendudzi zvifananidzo,
asi Jehovha akaita matenga.
Kubwinya noumambo zviri pamberi pake;
simba nokubwinya zviri munzvimbo yake tsvene.
Remekedzai Jehovha, imi ndudzi dzose,
ipai rukudzo nesimba kuna Jehovha.
Ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo rwakafanira zita rake;
uyai nechipiriso mugopinda pavanze dzake.
Namatai Jehovha mukubwinya kwoutsvene hwake;
dederai pamberi pake, imi nyika dzose.
Muti pakati pendudzi, “Jehovha ndiye anobata ushe.”
Nyika yakanyatsosimbiswa, haingazungunuswi;
uye achatonga marudzi nokururama.
Kudenga denga ngakufare, nyika ngaifarisise;
gungwa ngaritinhire, nezvose zviri mariri;
masango ngaafare, nezvose zviri maari.
Ipapo miti yose yesango ichaimba nomufaro;
ichaimba pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya,
anouya kuzotonga nyika.
Achatonga nyika nokururama,
uye vanhu nechokwadi chake.
Jehovha anobata ushe, nyika ngaifare;
zviwi zviri kure ngazvifare.
Makore nerima guru zvakamukomberedza;
kururama nokururamisira ndidzo nheyo dzechigaro chake choushe.
Moto unoenda mberi kwake
uchipisa vavengi vake kumativi ose.
Mheni yake inovhenekera pasi;
nyika inozviona igodedera.
Makomo anonyungudika senamo pamberi paJehovha,
pamberi paIshe wenyika yose.
Kudenga denga kunoparidza kururama kwake,
uye vanhu vose vanoona kubwinya kwake.
Vose vanonamata zvifananidzo vanonyadziswa,
avo vanozvirumbidza nezvifananidzo,
munamatei, imi vamwari vose!
Zioni rinonzwa rigofara uye misha yeJudha inofara nokuda kwezvamakatonga, imi Jehovha.
Nokuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, ndimi Wokumusoro-soro pasi pose;
makasimudzirwa kupfuura vamwari vose.
Vanoda Jehovha ngavavenge zvakaipa,
nokuti anorinda upenyu kwavanhu vake vakatendeka
uye anovarwira muruoko rwowakaipa.
Chiedza chinovhenekera pamusoro pavakarurama,
nomufaro pamusoro pavane mwoyo yakarurama.
Farai muna Jehovha, imi vakarurama,
uye mukudze zita rake dzvene.
Jehovha anobata ushe,
ndudzi ngadzidedere;
anogara pachigaro choushe chiri pakati pamakerubhi,
nyika ngaizungunuke.
Jehovha mukuru paZioni;
iye akasimudzirwa pamusoro pendudzi dzose.
Ngavarumbidze zita renyu guru rinotyisa,
iye mutsvene.
Mambo mukuru, anoda kururamisira,
imi makasimbisa kururama;
muna Jakobho makaita
kururamisira nokururama.
Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu
nokunamata pachitsiko chetsoka dzake;
iye mutsvene.
Mozisi naAroni vakanga vari pakati pavaprista vake,
Samueri akanga ari pakati paavo
vaidana kuzita rake,
vakadana kuna Jehovha akavapindura.
Akataura kwavari ari mushongwe yegore;
vakachengeta zvaakatema nemitemo yaakavapa.
Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wedu,
imi makavapindura;
makanga muri Mwari anokanganwira kuna Israeri,
kunyange makavaranga pane zvavakaita.
Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu
mumunamate pagomo rake dzvene,
nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu ndiye mutsvene.
Danidzirai nomufaro kuna Jehovha, imi nyika dzose.
Shumirai Jehovha nomufaro;
uyai pamberi pake nenziyo dzomufaro.
Zivai kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari.
Ndiye akatisika, uye tiri vake;
tiri vanhu vake, namakwai anofudzwa naye.
Pindai pamasuo ake nokuvonga
nomuvanze dzake nokurumbidza;
chimuvongai uye murumbidze zita rake.
Nokuti Jehovha akanaka uye rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi;
kutendeka kwake kunoramba kuripo kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha;
kuchemera kwangu rubatsiro ngakusvike kwamuri.
Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu
pandinenge ndichitambudzika.
Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri;
pandinokudanai, ndipindurei nokukurumidza.
Nokuti mazuva angu anopera soutsi;
mapfupa angu anopisa samazimbe anopfuta.
Mwoyo wangu warohwa uye waoma souswa;
ndinokanganwa kudya zvokudya zvangu.
Nokuda kwokugomera kwangu
kukuru ndaonda zvokuti ganda rangu ranamatira pamapfupa.
Ndafanana nezizi romugwenga,
sezizi riri pakati pamatongo.
Ndinovata ndakasvinura,
ndava seshiri iri yoga pamusoro pedenga remba.
Zuva rose vavengi vangu vanondishungurudza;
avo vanondipengera vanoshandisa zita rangu sechituko.
Nokuti ndinodya madota sechokudya changu,
uye ndinovhenganisa zvokunwa zvangu nemisodzi,
nokuda kwehasha dzenyu huru,
nokuti makandisimudza mukandikanda parutivi.
Mazuva angu akaita somumvuri wamadekwana;
ndinosvava souswa.
Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munogara pachigaro choushe nokusingaperi;
mukurumbira wenyu uripo kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Imi muchasimuka mugonzwira Zioni tsitsi,
nokuti ndiyo nguva yokurinzwira nyasha;
nguva yakatarwa yasvika.
Nokuti matombo aro anokosha kuvaranda venyu;
guruva raro chairo rinovaendesa kugomba.
Ndudzi dzichatya zita raJehovha,
madzimambo ose enyika achatya kubwinya kwenyu.
Nokuti Jehovha achavakazve Zioni,
agozviratidza pakubwinya kwake.
Achadavira minyengetero yavanotambura;
haangazvidzi chikumbiro chavo.
Izvi ngazvinyorerwe zvizvarwa zvamangwana,
kuti vanhu vasati vasikwa vagorumbidza Jehovha vachiti,
“Jehovha akatarira pasi ari panzvimbo yake tsvene yakakwirira,
ari kudenga akacherechedza pasi,
kuti anzwe kugomera kwavasungwa
agosunungura avo vakatongerwa rufu.”
Saka zita raJehovha richaparidzwa muZioni,
nokurumbidzwa kwake muJerusarema,
panoungana marudzi noushe
kuti vanamate Jehovha.
Panguva youpenyu hwangu akatapudza simba rangu;
akaita kuti mazuva angu ave mashoma.
Saka ndakati,
“Regai kundibvisa, imi Mwari wangu, pakati pamazuva angu;
makore enyu anoramba aripo kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Pamavambo makateya nheyo dzenyika,
uye matenga ibasa basa ramaoko enyu.
Izvo zvichaparara, asi imi munogara muripo;
zvose zvichasakara senguo. Senguo muchavabvisa uye vacharaswa.
Asi imi mucharamba makadaro,
uye makore enyu haatongogumi.
Vana vavaranda venyu vachagara pamberi penyu;
zvizvarwa zvavo zvichasimbiswa pamberi penyu.”
Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu;
zvose zviri mukati mangu, ngazvirumbidze zita rake dzvene.
Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu,
uye urege kukanganwa mikomborero yake yose,
iye anokanganwira zvivi zvako zvose,
uye anoporesa kurwara kwako kwose,
anodzikinura upenyu hwako kubva pagomba,
uye anokushongedza korona yorudo netsitsi,
anogutsa zvido zvako nezvinhu zvakanaka,
kuti uduku hwako huvandudzwe sohwegondo.
Jehovha anoita zvakarurama,
uye anoruramisira vose vakadzvinyirirwa.
Akazivisa nzira dzake kuna Mozisi,
namabasa ake kuvanhu veIsraeri:
Jehovha ane tsitsi nenyasha,
anononoka kutsamwa, azere norudo.
Haangarambi achipomera mhosva,
uye haangarambi akatsamwa nokusingaperi;
haatiitiri sezvakafanira zvivi zvedu,
kana kutipa mubayiro sezvakafanira zvakaipa zvedu.
Nokuti sokukwirira kwaakaita kudenga kumusoro kwenyika,
ndizvo zvakaita kukura kworudo rwake kuna vanomutya;
sokuva kure kwamabvazuva namavirira,
saizvozvo akabvisa kudarika kwedu kwatiri.
Sokunzwira tsitsi kunoita baba vana vavo,
saizvozvo Jehovha ane tsitsi pamusoro pavanomutya;
nokuti anoziva kuti takaumbwa sei,
anorangarira kuti tiri guruva.
Kana ari munhu zvake, mazuva ake akaita souswa,
anokura seruva resango;
mhepo inorova napamusoro paro onei raenda,
uye nzvimbo yaranga riri haicharirangaririzve.
Asi kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi,
rudo rwaJehovha rwuri pane avo vanomutya,
nokururama kwake kuvana vavana vavo,
naavo vanochengeta sungano yake
uye vanorangarira kuita zvaakatema.
Jehovha akasimbisa chigaro chake choushe kudenga,
uye ushe hwake hunotonga zvinhu zvose.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi vatumwa vake,
nemi vane simba vanoita zvaakarayira,
vanoteerera shoko rake.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi hondo dzose dzokudenga,
imi varanda vake vanoita kuda kwake.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi mabasa ake ose
kwose kwose kuno umambo hwake.
Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu.
Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu.
Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, muri mukuru kwazvo; makashongedzwa nokubwinya noumambo.
Iye anozviputira muchiedza seanozviputira nenguo;
anotatamura matenga kunge tende
uye anogadzika matanda edzimba dzake dzapamusoro pamusoro pemvura yadzo zhinji.
Anoita makore ngoro dzake,
uye anokwira pamapapiro emhepo.
Anoita mhepo nhume dzake,
namazhenje omoto varanda vake.
Akamisa nyika pamusoro penheyo dzayo;
haingatongozungunuswi.
Makaifukidza nokwakadzika somunofukidza nenguo;
mvura zhinji yakamira pamusoro pamakomo.
Asi pakutsiura kwenyu mvura zhinji yakatiza,
pakunzwa kutinhira wenyu yakatiza;
yakayerera napamusoro pamakomo,
ikadzika nomumipata,
ichienda kunzvimbo yamakairayira.
Makatara muganhu waisingadariki;
haichazombofukidzizve nyika.
Anoita kuti matsime adire mvura mumipata;
inoyerera napakati pamakomo.
Anonwisa mhuka dzose dzesango mvura;
mbizi dzinopedza nyota yadzo.
Shiri dzedenga dzinovaka matendere adzo pedyo nemvura;
dzinorira dziri pakati pamatavi.
Anodiridza makomo ari padzimba dzake dzapamusoro;
nyika inogutswa nezvibereko zvebasa rake.
Anomeresa uswa hwemombe,
nembeu kuti vanhu vasakure,
achibudisa zvokudya kubva pasi:
iyo waini inofadza mwoyo womunhu,
namafuta anopenyesa chiso chake,
nechingwa chinosimbisa mwoyo wake.
Miti yaJehovha inodiridzwa zvakanaka,
iyo misidhari yeRebhanoni yaakasima.
Shiri dzinoruka matendere adzo ipapo;
dambiramurove rakaita imba yaro mumiti yomupaini.
Makomo marefu ndeengururu;
mapako ndiwo utiziro hwembira.
Mwedzi unotara nguva,
uye zuva rinoziva nguva yokuvira kwaro.
Munouyisa rima, usiku hugovapo,
uye zvikara zvose zvesango zvinobuda kundovhima.
Shumba dzinoomba dzichitsvaka nyama,
uye dzinotsvaka zvokudya zvadzo kubva kuna Mwari.
Kana zuva robuda, idzo dzinoenda kure;
dzinodzokera dzondovata mumapako adzo.
Ipapo munhu anobuda oenda kubasa rake,
kumushando wake kusvikira madekwana.
Haiwa Jehovha, mabasa enyu manganiko!
Makaaita ose nenjere;
nyika izere nezvisikwa zvenyu.
Hero gungwa, rakakura uye rakapamhama,
rine zvisikwa zvisingagoni kuverengwa,
zvipenyu zvikuru nezviduku.
Hezvo zvikepe zvinofamba-famba, nengwena,
yamakaumba kuti itambemo.
Zvose izvi zvinotarira kwamuri
kuti muzvipe zvokudya zvazvo nenguva yakafanira.
Pamunozvipa, zvinozviunganidza;
pamunozarura ruoko rwenyu, izvo zvinogutswa nezvinhu zvakanaka.
Pamunovanza chiso chenyu,
izvo zvinovhundutswa;
pamunozvitorera mweya,
izvo zvinofa uye zvinodzokera kuguruva.
Pamunotuma Mweya wenyu,
izvo zvinosikwa,
uye munovandudza chiso chenyika.
Kubwinya kwaJehovha ngakugare nokusingaperi;
Jehovha ngaafare nebasa rake,
iye anotarira nyika, yobva yabvunda,
iye anobata makomo obva apwititika utsi.
Ndichaimbira Jehovha upenyu hwangu hwose;
ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza ndichiri mupenyu.
Kurangarira kwangu ngakumufadze,
pandinofara muna Jehovha.
Asi vatadzi ngavaparadzwe panyika,
uye vakaipa ngavarege kuzovapozve.
Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Vongai Jehovha, danai kuzita rake;
zivisai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi.
Muimbirei, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza;
rondedzerai mabasa ake ose anoshamisa.
Ngarikudzwe zita rake dzvene;
mwoyo yavanotsvaka Jehovha ngaifare.
Tarirai kuna Jehovha nokusimba rake;
tsvakai chiso chake nguva dzose.
Rangarirai zvishamiso zvaakaita,
mabasa ake, nezvaakatonga zvaakareva,
imi vana vaAbhurahama muranda wake,
haiwa vanakomana vaJakobho, vasanangurwa vake.
Ndiye Jehovha Mwari wedu;
kutonga kwake kuri munyika yose.
Anorangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi,
iro shoko raakarayira, kuchiuru chezvizvarwa,
sungano yaakaita naAbhurahama,
mhiko yaakapika kuna Isaka.
Akaisimbisa kuna Jakobho somutemo,
nokuna Israeri sesungano isingaperi achiti,
“Ndichapa nyika yeKenani kwauri
somugove wenhaka yako.”
Pavaiva vashoma pakuwanda,
zvirokwazvo vari vashoma, uye vari vaeni mairi,
vakadzungaira vachibva kuno rumwe rudzi kusvikira kuno rumwe rudzi.
Kubva kuno humwe ushe vachienda kuno humwe.
Haana kutendera munhu kuvadzvinyirira;
akatuka madzimambo nokuda kwavo achiti,
“Musabata vazodziwa vangu;
musaitira vaprofita vangu zvakaipa.”
Akadana nzara panyika
ikaparadza zvose zvaiuyisa zvokudya;
uye akatuma munhu pamberi pavo,
iye Josefa, akatengeswa senhapwa.
Vakakuvadza tsoka dzake nezvisungo
mutsipa wake ukaiswa mumatare esimbi,
kusvikira zvaakareva zvazadziswa,
kusvikira shoko raJehovha raratidza kutendeka kwake.
Mambo akatuma shoko kuti asunungurwe,
vatongi vavanhu vakamuregedza.
Akamuita tenzi weimba yake,
nomutongi wepfuma yake yose,
kuti arayire machinda ake sezvaaida
uye adzidzise vakuru vake njere.
Ipapo Israeri akapinda muIjipiti;
Jakobho akagara somweni munyika yaHamu.
Jehovha akawanza vanhu vake chose;
akavaita vazhinji kwazvo kupinda vavengi vavo,
avo vaakashandura mwoyo yavo kuti ivenge vanhu vake,
kuti varangane pamusoro pavaranda vake.
Akatuma Mozisi muranda wake,
naAroni, waakanga asarudza.
Vakaita zviratidzo zvinoshamisa pakati pavo,
izvo zvishamiso zvake munyika yaHamu.
Akatumira rima akaita kuti nyika ive murima,
nokuti havana kumukira shoko rake here?
Akashandura mvura yavo zhinji ikava ropa,
zvikaita kuti hove dzavo dzife.
Nyika yavo yakazara namatatya,
akapinda mudzimba dzamadzimambo avo.
Akataura mapupira enhunzi akauya,
nenda munyika yavo yose.
Akashandura mvura yavo ikava chimvuramabwe,
nemheni munyika yavo yose;
akarova mizambiringa yavo nemionde yavo,
akaparadza miti yomunyika yavo.
Akataura, mhashu dzikauya,
namagutaguta asingaverengeki;
zvakadya miriwo minyoro yose munyika yavo,
zvikadya zvibereko zvevhu ravo.
Ipapo akarova matangwe munyika yavo,
zvibereko zvokutanga zvesimba roujaya hwavo.
Akabudisa Israeri akaremerwa nesirivha negoridhe,
kwakanga kusina akagumburwa pakati pamarudzi avo.
Ijipiti yakafara pavakabva,
nokuti kutya vaIsraeri kwakanga kwavabata.
Akatatamura gore rikava chifukidzo,
uye moto kuti uvhenekere usiku.
Vakakumbira, iye akavauyisira zvihuta, uye akavagutsa nechingwa chakabva kudenga.
Akazarura dombo, mvura ikatubuka;
ikayerera mugwenga sorwizi.
Nokuti akarangarira mhiko yake tsvene
yaakapa Abhurahama muranda wake.
Akabudisa vanhu vake nomufaro,
vasanangurwa vake nokupembera kwomufaro;
akavapa nyika dzendudzi,
vakagara nhaka yakanga yatamburirwa navamwe,
kuti vachengete zvaakatema
uye vacherechedze mirayiro yake.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka;
nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Ndianiko angaparidza mabasa aJehovha esimba,
kana kureva kurumbidzwa kwake kwose?
Vakaropafadzwa vanochengeta kururamisira,
vanogara vachiita zvakarurama.
Ndirangarirei, imi Jehovha, pamunoratidza nyasha kuvanhu venyu,
pamunovaponesa, mundibatsirewo,
kuti ndifadzwe nokubudirira kwavasanangurwa venyu,
kuti ndigovane pamufaro wavanhu venyu,
uye ndibatane nenhaka yenyu pakurumbidza.
Takatadza, sezvakaita madzibaba edu;
takaita zvakaipa uye takaita mabasa akaipa.
Madzibaba edu paakanga ari muIjipiti,
havana kumbofunga nezvezvishamiso zvenyu;
havana kurangarira tsitsi dzenyu zhinji,
asi vakakumukirai pagungwa, iro Gungwa Dzvuku.
Kunyange zvakadaro akavaponesa nokuda kwezita rake,
kuti simba rake guru rizivikanwe.
Akarayira Gungwa Dzvuku iro rikapwa;
uye akavafambisa napakadzika sevanopfuura nomugwenga.
Akavaponesa kubva muruoko rwomuvengi;
akavadzikinura kubva muruoko rwomuvengi.
Mvura zhinji yakafukidza vadzivisi vavo;
hakuna mumwe wavo akapona.
Ipapo vakatenda vimbiso dzake
vakaimba vachimurumbidza.
Asi vakakurumidza kukanganwa zvaakanga aita,
uye vakasamirira kurayira kwake.
Havana kuzvidzora pakukara kwavo mugwenga;
vakaedza Mwari murenje.
Saka akavapa zvavakakumbira,
asi akatuma chirwere chinopedza muviri pamusoro pavo.
Vakaitira Mozisi godo mumusasa,
naAroni, akanga akatsaurirwa kuna Jehovha.
Nyika yakazaruka ikamedza Dhatani;
ikaviga boka raAbhiramu.
Moto wakapfuta pakati pavateveri vavo;
murazvo ukaparadza vakaipa.
Vakaumba mhuru paHorebhi,
vakanamata chifananidzo chakaumbwa.
Vakatsinhanisa kubwinya kwavo
nomufananidzo wehando, inodya uswa.
Vakakanganwa Mwari akavaponesa,
uyo akanga aita zvinhu zvikuru muIjipiti,
mabasa anoshamisa munyika yaHamu
namabasa anotyisa paGungwa Dzvuku.
Saka akati, achavaparadza,
dai Mozisi, musanangurwa wake,
asina kumira pamberi pake kuti
adzore hasha dzake pakuvaparadza.
Ipapo vakazvidza nyika inofadza;
havana kutenda zvaakavimbisa.
Vakanyunyuta vari mumatende
avo vakasateerera Jehovha.
Saka akapika akasimudza ruoko rwake
kuti achavaparadza murenje,
achaparadza zvizvarwa zvavo pakati pendudzi,
agovaparadzira munyika dzose.
Vakazvibatanidza pamwe chete naBhaari wePeori,
uye vakadya zvibayiro zvakabayirwa vamwari vakafa.
Vakatsamwisa Jehovha namabasa avo akaipa,
uye denda rikavapo pakati pavo.
Asi Finehasi akasimuka,
akaita zvakarurama, denda rikaguma.
Izvozvo zvakanzi kwaari kururama
kusvikira kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa nokusingaperi.
Vakatsamwisa Jehovha pamvura zhinji yeMeribha,
uye Mozisi akaoneswa nhamo nokuda kwavo;
nokuti vakamukira Mweya waMwari,
Mozisi akataura nehasha nomuromo wake.
Havana kuparadza marudzi
sokurayirwa kwavakaitwa naJehovha,
asi vakavhengana nendudzi,
vakatora tsika dzavo.
Vakanamata zvifananidzo zvavo,
izvo zvakazova musungo kwavari.
Vakabayira vanakomana vavo
navanasikana vavo kumadhimoni.
Vakateura ropa risina mhosva,
iro ropa ravanakomana vavo neravanasikana vavo,
vavakabayira kuzvifananidzo zveKenani,
nyika ikasvibiswa neropa ravo.
Vakazvisvibisa nezvavakaita;
vakazviitisa ufeve namabasa avo.
Naizvozvo Jehovha akatsamwira vanhu vake,
akasema nhaka yake.
Akavaisa mumaoko endudzi,
uye vakatongwa navavengi vavo.
Vavengi vavo vakavadzvinyirira,
uye vakavaisa pasi pesimba ravo.
Akavarwira kakawanda,
asi ivo vakanga vakarerekera pakumumukira
vakaparadzwa muchivi chavo.
Asi akatarisa kutambudzika kwavo
paakanzwa kuchema kwavo;
akarangarira sungano yake nokuda kwavo,
uye akazvidemba nokuda kworudo rwake rukuru.
Akaita kuti vanzwirwe
tsitsi navose vakavatapa.
Tiponesei, imi Jehovha Mwari wedu,
uye mutiunganidze kubva kundudzi,
kuti tigovonga zita renyu dzvene.
Tigofara mukurumbidzwa kwenyu.
Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, iye Mwari waIsraeri,
kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi.
Vanhu vose ngavati, “Ameni!”
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka;
rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Vakadzikinurwa naJehovha ngavadaro,
vaakadzikinura muruoko rwomuvengi,
avo vaakaunganidza kubva panyika dzose,
kubva kumabvazuva nokumavirira, nokumusoro nezasi.
Vamwe vakadzungaira murenje nomugwenga,
vachishayiwa nzira yokuenda kuguta kwavangagara.
Vakava nenzara nenyota,
uye upenyu hwavo hwakanga hwoparara.
Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo,
akavarwira pakutambura kwavo.
Akavafambisa nenzira yakarurama
kuenda kuguta ravaizogara.
Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi,
uye nokuda kwamabasa anoshamisa aakavaitira,
nokuti anogutsa vane nyota,
uye vane nzara anovazadza nezvakanaka.
Vamwe vakagara murima nokusurikirwa kwakadzama,
vari vasungwa vanotambudzika muzvisungo zvamatare,
nokuti vakanga vamukira mashoko aMwari
uye vakazvidza kurayira kweWokumusoro-soro.
Saka akaita kuti vashande zvinorwadza;
vakagumburwa, uye pakanga pasina anovabatsira.
Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo,
uye akavaponesa pakutambura kwavo.
Akavabudisa murima nomukusviba kwakadzika dzika,
uye akadambura ngetani dzavo.
Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi,
uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakavaitira,
nokuti anopwanya masuo endarira,
uye akagura mazariro esimbi.
Vamwe vakava mapenzi nokuda kwenzira dzavo dzokumukira,
uye vakatambudzwa kwazvo nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo.
Vakasema zvokudya zvose,
uye vakaswedera pamasuo orufu.
Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo,
uye akavaponesa pakutambura kwavo.
Akatuma shoko rake uye akavaporesa;
akavanunura kubva paguva.
Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi,
uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakavaitira.
Ngavabayire zvibayiro zvokuvonga,
uye vareve zvamabasa ake nenziyo dzomufaro.
Vamwe vakafamba rwendo pagungwa nezvikepe;
vakanga vari vashambadziri pamvura zhinji.
Vakaona mabasa aJehovha,
mabasa ake anoshamisa pakadzika.
Nokuti akataura uye akamutsa dutu
rikasimudza mafungu.
Vakaenda kumusoro kumatenga vakaendawo pasi kwakadzika;
mukutambudzika kwavo kushinga kwavo kwakanyongodeka.
Vakandeya vakadzedzereka savanhu vadhakwa; vakasvika pakupererwa namazano.
Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo,
uye akavabudisa pakutambura kwavo.
Akanyaradza dutu remhepo nezevezeve;
mafungu egungwa akanyarara kuti mwiro.
Vakafara parakadzikama,
uye akavatungamirira kwakachengetedzeka kwavaida.
Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi,
uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakaitira vanhu.
Ngavamukudze paungano yavanhu,
uye vamurumbidze pagungano ramakurukota.
Akashandura nzizi dzikava gwenga,
hova dzinoerera dzikava nyika ine nyota,
uye nyika yezvibereko ikava gwenga romunyu,
nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavaigaramo.
Akashandura gwenga rikava madziva emvura,
nenyika yakaoma ikava zvitubu zvinoerera;
ndipo paakagarisa vane nzara,
uye vakavaka guta ravangagara.
Vakadyara minda, uye vakasima minda yemizambiringa,
ikabereka mukohwo wakanaka;
akavaropafadza, uye akavawanza zvikuru,
uye haana kutendera zvipfuwo zvavo kuparara.
Ipapo vakava vashoma, uye vakaninipiswa vakadzvinyirirwa,
nenjodzi uye nokusuwa;
iye anodurura kuzvidzwa pamusoro pamakurukota,
akaita kuti vadzungaire musango risina nzira.
Akasimudza vanoshayiwa kubva mukutambudzika kwavo,
uye akawedzera mhuri dzavo samapoka amakwai.
Vakarurama vanozviona vagofara,
asi vakaipa vose vanodzivirwa miromo yavo.
Ani naani akachenjera ngaachengete zvinhu izvi,
uye arangarire rudo rukuru rwaJehovha.
Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari imi;
ndichaimba uye ndichaimba zvakanaka nomwoyo wangu wose.
Muka iwe mutengeranwa nembira!
Ndichamutsa mambakwedza.
Haiwa Jehovha ndichakurumbidzai pakati pendudzi; ndichaimba nezvenyu pakati pamarudzi.
Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumatenga.
Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru,
kupfuura kudenga denga;
Kudzwai, imi Mwari, kumusoro kwokudenga,
uye kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose.
Tiponesei uye mutibatsire noruoko rwenyu rworudyi,
kuti vamunoda varwirwe.
Mwari akataura ari panzvimbo yake tsvene achiti,
“Pakukunda kwangu ndichaganhura Shekemu,
uye ndigoyera Mupata weSukoti.
Gireadhi ndeyangu, Manase ndowangu;
Efuremu inguwani yangu,
Judha itsvimbo yangu.
Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokugezera,
pamusoro paEdhomu ndichapotsera shangu dzangu;
pamusoro paFiristia ndichapembera mukukunda.”
Ndianiko achandiuyisa muguta rakakomberedzwa namasvingo?
Ndianiko achanditungamirira kuEdhomu?
Ko, hamusimi here, imi Mwari, iyemi makatiramba
uye mukasazobudazve kuenda nehondo dzedu?
Tibatsirei pamuvengi wedu,
nokuti rubatsiro rwomunhu haruna maturo.
Tichapiwa kukunda naMwari,
uye achatsika-tsika vavengi vedu.
Haiwa Mwari, imi wandinorumbidza,
regai kunyarara,
nokuti vanhu vakaipa vanonyengera vakandishamira miromo yavo;
vakataura nhema pamusoro pangu nendimi dzavo.
Vakandikomba namashoko okuvenga;
vanorwa neni pasina mhosva.
Pachinzvimbo choushamwari hwangu navo, vanondipa mhosva,
asi ini ndiri munhu wokunyengetera.
Vanonditsivira zvakaipa pane zvakanaka,
uye vanondivengera ushamwari hwangu.
Tumai munhu akaipa kuti apikisane naye;
mupomeri ngaamire kuruoko rwake rworudyi.
Paanotongwa, ngaawanikwe ane mhosva,
uye minyengetero yake ngaimupe mhaka.
Mazuva ake ngaave mashoma;
mumwe ngaatore nzvimbo youkuru hwake.
Vana vake ngavave nherera,
uye mukadzi wake ave chirikadzi.
Vana vake ngavave vapemhi vanodzungaira;
ngavadzingwe vabve mumatongo emisha yavo.
Waakakwereta ngaatore zvose zvaanazvo;
vatorwa ngavapambe zvose zvaakashandira.
Ngakurege kuva neanomunzwira ngoni
kana kunzwira tsitsi nherera dzake.
Zvizvarwa zvake ngazvirove,
mazita avo adzimwe parudzi runotevera.
Mhosva yamadzibaba ake ngairangarirwe pamberi paJehovha;
chivi chamai vake ngachirege kumbodzimwa.
Zvivi zvavo ngazvirambe zviri pamberi paJehovha,
kuti aparadze chirangaridzo chavo panyika.
Nokuti haana kumbofunga kuita zvakanaka,
asi akavhima varombo kusvika parufu,
vanoshayiwa navane mwoyo yakaputsika.
Aifarira kutaura chituko, ngachichiuya pamusoro pake;
iye asina kufadzwa nokuropafadza, ngakuve kure naye.
Aifuka kutuka senguo yake;
zvakapinda mumuviri wake semvura,
nomumapfupa ake samafuta.
Ngazvive sejasi rakamonerwa paari,
sebhanhire rakasungirirwa paari nokusingaperi.
Uyu ngauve muripo waJehovha kuvapomeri vangu,
kuna avo vanotaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu.
Asi imi, Ishe Jehovha,
ndiitirei zvakanaka nokuda kwezita renyu;
ndirwirei, kubudikidza nokunaka kworudo rwenyu.
Nokuti ndiri murombo uye ndinoshayiwa,
uye mwoyo wangu wakuvara mukati mangu.
Ndinopera somumvuri wamadekwana;
ndinozunzwa semhashu.
Mabvi angu apera simba nokutsanya;
muviri wangu waonda uye ndaonda kwazvo.
Ndiri chinhu chinosekwa navapomeri vangu;
pavanondiona, vanodzungudza misoro yavo.
Ndibatsirei, imi Jehovha Mwari wangu;
ndiponesei zvakafanira rudo rwenyu.
Ngavazive kuti ndirwo ruoko rwenyu,
kuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, makazviita.
Ivo vangatuka havo, asi imi mucharopafadza;
vachanyadziswa pavanorwisa,
asi muranda wenyu achafara.
Vapomeri vangu vachafukidzwa nenyadzi,
uye vachaputirwa nokunyara sokunge nejasi.
Ndicharumbidza Jehovha nomuromo wangu zvikuru;
paungano huru, ndichamurumbidza.
Nokuti anomira kuruoko rworudyi rwouyo anoshayiwa,
kuti amuponese pane avo vanomupomera mhosva.
Jehovha akati kuna She wangu,
“Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi,
kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako
chitsiko chetsoka dzako.”
Jehovha achatambanudza tsvimbo yesimba rako kubva muZioni;
uchatonga pakati pavavengi vako.
Mauto ako achazvipira
pazuva rako rehondo.
Wapfekedzwa nguo youshe, utsvene,
kubva pachizvaro chamambakwedza
uchagamuchira dova roujaya hwako.
Jehovha akapika,
uye haangashanduki, achiti,
“Iwe uri muprista nokusingaperi,
worudzi rwaMerikizedheki.”
Jehovha ari kuruoko rwako rworudyi;
achaparadza madzimambo pazuva rehasha dzake.
Achatonga ndudzi, achiunganidza vakafa,
uye achiparadza vatongi venyika yose.
Achanwa parukova rwuri parutivi penzira;
naizvozvo achasimudza musoro wake.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Akaropafadzwa munhu anotya Jehovha,
anofarira mirayiro yake zvikuru.
Vana vake vachava nesimba panyika;
zvizvarwa zvavakarurama zvicharopafadzwa.
Pfuma nezvakawanda zviri mumba make,
uye kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi.
Kunyange murima akarurama anobudirwa nechiedza,
iye munhu ane nyasha nengoni uye akarurama.
Zvakanaka zvinouya kumunhu anopa zvizhinji
uye anokweretesa pachena, anofambisa nzira dzake nokururamisira.
Zvirokwazvo, haangatongozungunuswi;
munhu akarurama acharangarirwa nokusingaperi.
Haangatyi mashoko akaipa;
mwoyo wake wakasimba, anovimba naJehovha.
Mwoyo wake wakachengetedzeka, haangatyi chinhu;
pakupedzisira achatarira nokukunda kuvavengi vake.
Akaparadzira zvipo zvake kuvarombo,
kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi;
runyanga rwake ruchasimudzwa mudenga mukukudzwa.
Akaipa achazviona uye acharwadziwa,
acharumanya meno ake uye achaonda;
kushuva kwowakaipa kuchava pasina.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Rumbidzai, imi varanda vaJehovha,
rumbidzai zita raJehovha.
Zita raJehovha ngarirumbidzwe,
kubva zvino kusvikira narini.
Kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro,
zita raJehovha rinofanira kurumbidzwa.
Jehovha anosimudzirwa pamusoro pendudzi dzose;
kubwinya kwake kuri pamusoro pamatenga.
Ndianiko akaita saJehovha Mwari wedu,
iye anogara pachigaro choushe chokumusoro-soro,
anokotamira pasi kuti aone
zviri kudenga napanyika?
Anosimudza murombo kubva muguruva,
uye anosimudza vanoshayiwa kubva padurunhuru ramadota;
anovagadza namachinda,
namachinda avanhu vavo.
Anogarisa mukadzi asingabereki mumba make,
samai vavana vanofara.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Israeri akati abuda muIjipiti,
imba yaJakobho ichibva kurudzi runo mutauro wokumwe,
Judha akava imba tsvene yaMwari,
Israeri ushe hwake.
Gungwa rakazviona rikatiza,
Jorodhani rwakadzokera shure;
makomo akakwakuka samakondobwe,
zvikomo samakwayana.
Haiwa gungwa, wakatizeiko,
iwe Jorodhani zvawakadzokera shure,
imi makomo zvamakakwakuka samakondobwe,
nemi zvikomo, samakwayana?
Dedera, iwe nyika pamberi paShe,
pamberi paMwari waJakobho,
akashandura dombo rikava dziva,
dombo rakaoma rikava matsime emvura.
Kwete kwatiri, Jehovha, kwete kwatiri,
asi kukudzwa ngakupiwe kuzita renyu,
nokuda kworudo rwenyu nokutendeka kwenyu.
Sei ndudzi dzichiti,
“Mwari wavo aripiko?”
Mwari wedu ari kudenga;
anoita zvose zvinomufadza.
Asi zvifananidzo zvavo isirivha negoridhe,
zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu.
Zvine miromo, asi hazvigoni kutaura,
zvina meso, asi hazvigoni kuona;
zvine nzeve, asi hazvigoni kunzwa mhino,
asi hazvigoni kunhuhwidza;
zvina maoko, asi hazvigoni kubata,
tsoka, asi hazvigoni kufamba;
uye hazvitauri napahuro pazvo.
Vanozviita vachafanana nazvo,
navose vanovimba nazvo.
Haiwa imba yaIsraeri, vimbai naJehovha,
ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo.
Imi imba yaAroni, vimbai naJehovha,
ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo.
Imi vanomutya, vimbai naJehovha,
ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo.
Jehovha anotirangarira uye achatiropafadza:
Acharopafadza imba yaIsraeri, acharopafadza imba yaAroni,
acharopafadza vanotya Jehovha,
vaduku navakuru zvakafanana.
Jehovha ngaakuwanzei,
mose iwe navana vako.
Jehovha ngaakuropafadze,
iye muiti wedenga napasi.
Kudenga denga kumusoro ndokwaJehovha,
asi nyika akaipa kuvanhu.
Vakafa havasivo vanorumbidza Jehovha,
avo vanoburukira kwakanyarara;
asi tisu tinokudza Jehovha,
kubva zvino kusvikira narini.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Ndinoda Jehovha, nokuti akanzwa inzwi rangu;
akandinzwira tsitsi pakuchema kwangu.
Nokuti akarerekera nzeve yake kwandiri,
ndichadana kwaari mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu.
Misungo yorufu yakandipinganidza,
kurwadza kweguva kwakauya pamusoro pangu;
ndakakundwa nenhamo nokusuwa.
Ipapo ndakadana kuzita raJehovha ndikati,
“Haiwa Jehovha, ndiponesei!”
Jehovha ane nyasha uye akarurama;
Mwari wedu azere netsitsi.
Jehovha anodzivirira vakatendeka pamwoyo;
pandakanga ndiri pakushayiwa kukuru, iye akandiponesa.
Haiwa mweya wangu, chizorora zvakare,
nokuti Jehovha akakuitira zvakanaka.
Nokuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, makarwira mweya wangu parufu,
meso angu pamisodzi,
uye makumbo angu pakugumburwa,
kuti ndifambe pamberi paJehovha
munyika yavapenyu.
Ndakatenda; naizvozvo ndakati,
“Ndiri kutambudzika kwazvo.”
Uye pakuvhunduka kwangu ndakati,
“Vanhu vose vanoreva nhema.”
Ndingaripira seiko Jehovha
pamusoro pokunaka kwake kwose kwandiri?
Ndichasimudza mukombe woruponeso
ndigodana kuzita raJehovha.
Ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu kuna Jehovha,
pamberi pavanhu vake vose.
Chinhu chinokosha pamberi paJehovha
ndirwo rufu rwavatsvene vake.
Haiwa Jehovha, zvirokwazvo ndiri muranda wenyu;
ndiri muranda wenyu, mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu;
makandisunungura pangetani dzangu.
Ndichabayira chipo chokuvonga kwamuri,
uye ndichadana kuzita raJehovha.
Ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu kuna Jehovha,
pamberi pavanhu vake vose,
pavanze dzeimba yaJehovha,
mukati mako, iwe Jerusarema.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi ndudzi dzose;
Mukudzei, imi marudzi ose.
Nokuti rudo rwake kwatiri rukuru,
uye kutendeka kwaJehovha kunogara nokusingaperi.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Ndinodana kuna Jehovha mukutambudzika kwangu,
uye anondipindura.
Haiwa Jehovha, ndiponesei pamiromo inoreva nhema,
nendimi dzinonyengera.
Achaiteiko kwauri,
uye chimwe chiiko kunze kwezvizvi, iwe rurimi runonyengera?
Achakuranga nemiseve yakapinza yemhare,
namazimbe anopfuta omuti womurara.
Ndine nhamo ini ndinogara muMesheki,
kuti ndinogara pakati pamatende eKedhari!
Ndakagara nguva refu
pakati pavanovenga rugare.
Ndiri munhu worugare;
asi pandinotaura, ivo ndevehondo.
Ndakafara pavakati kwandiri,
“Handei kumba yaJehovha.”
Tsoka dzedu dzimire
mukati mamasuo ako, iwe Jerusarema.
Jerusarema rakavakwa seguta
rakapakata kwazvo.
Ndiko kunokwira marudzi,
iwo marudzi aJehovha,
kundorumbidza zita raJehovha
maererano nezvakatemerwa Israeri.
Zvigaro zvokutonga zvimire ikoko,
zvigaro zvoushe zveimba yaDhavhidhi.
Nyengetererai rugare rweJerusarema:
“Vanokuda dai vagara zvakanaka.
Dai mukati mamasvingo ako maita rugare,
nokuchengetedzeka mukati menhare dzako.”
Nokuda kwehama neshamwari dzangu,
ndichati, “Rugare ngaruve mukati mako.”
Nokuda kweimba yaJehovha Mwari wedu,
ndichatsvaka kubudirira kwako.
Ndinosimudzira meso angu kwamuri,
kunemi mune chigaro choushe kudenga.
Sokutarira kunoita meso evaranda kuna vatenzi vavo,
sezvinoita meso omurandakadzi achitarira ruoko rwatenzikadzi wake,
saizvozvo meso edu anotarira kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu,
kusvikira atinzwira ngoni.
Tinzwirei ngoni, imi Jehovha, tinzwirei ngoni,
nokuti takatsunga pakuzvidzwa kwakawanda.
Takatsunga zvikuru pakumhurwa kunobva kuna vanozvikudza,
nokuzvidzwa kuzhinji kunobva kuna vanozvikudza.
Israeri ngaati
dai Jehovha akanga asiri kurutivi kwedu,
dai Jehovha akanga asiri kurutivi kwedu
patakarwiswa navanhu,
apo kutsamwa kwavo kwakatimukira,
vangadai vakatimedza tiri vapenyu;
mafashamu angadai akatifukidza,
mvura zhinji ingadai yakatikukura,
mvura zhinji ine hasha
ingadai yakatirasira kure.
Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe,
asina kutendera kuti tibvamburwe nameno avo.
Tapunyuka seshiri yabva parugombe rwomuteyi;
rugombe rwadamburwa uye tapunyuka.
Kubatsirwa kwedu kuri muzita raJehovha,
Muiti wedenga nenyika.
Vanovimba naJehovha vakafanana neGomo reZioni,
risingazungunuswi asi rinogara nokusingaperi.
Sokupoteredzwa kwakaitwa Jerusarema namakomo,
saizvozvo Jehovha anopoteredza vanhu vake
kubva zvino nokusingaperi.
Tsvimbo yavasakarurama haingagari
pamusoro penyika yakagoverwa vakarurama,
nokuti ipapo vakarurama vangazotambanudzira
maoko avo kuita zvakaipa.
Haiwa Jehovha, itirai zvakanaka, kuna avo vakanaka,
kuna avo vane mwoyo yakarurama.
Asi avo vanotsaukira kunzira dzakaminama,
Jehovha achavaparadza pamwe chete navaiti vezvakaipa.
Rugare ngaruve pana Israeri.
Jehovha paakadzosa vatapwa kuZioni,
takanga tava savanhu vairota.
Miromo yedu yakanga izere nokuseka,
ndimi dzedu dzizere nenziyo dzomufaro.
Ipapo zvakanzi pakati pendudzi,
“Jehovha akavaitira zvinhu zvikuru.”
Jehovha atiitira zvinhu zvikuru,
uye tazara nomufaro.
Tidzorereizve nhaka yedu, imi Jehovha,
sehova dzeNegevhi.
Avo vanodyara nemisodzi
vachakohwa nenziyo dzomufaro.
Uyo anobuda achichema,
akatakura mbeu yokudyara,
achadzoka nenziyo dzomufaro,
akatakura zvisote.
Kana Jehovha asingavaki imba,
vavaki vayo vanoshandira pasina.
Kana Jehovha asingachengeti guta,
varindi vanomira vakarinda pasina.
Hazvina maturo kumuka mangwanani
nokunonoka kuvata,
uchitambudzikira zvokudya,
nokuti anopa hope kuna vaanoda.
Vanakomana inhaka inobva kuna Jehovha,
vana mubayiro unobva kwaari.
Semiseve mumaoko emhare
ndizvo zvakaita vanakomana voujaya.
Akaropafadzwa murume
ane goba rizere navo.
Havanganyadziswi
pavanokakavadzana navavengi vavo pasuo.
Vakaropafadzwa vose vanotya Jehovha,
vanofamba munzira dzake.
Uchadya chibereko chokushanda kwako;
maropafadzo nokubudirira zvichava zvako.
Mukadzi wako achava somuzambiringa unobereka,
pakati peimba yako;
vanakomana vako vachaita samabukira omuorivhi,
vakakomberedza tafura yako.
Ndizvo zvakaita munhu akaropafadzwa,
anotya Jehovha.
Jehovha ngaakuropafadzei kubva kuZioni,
mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu;
muone henyu kubudirira kweJerusarema,
uye murarame kuti muone vana vavana venyu.
Rugare ngaruve pana Israeri.
Vakandidzvinyirira zvikuru kubva pauduku hwangu,
Israeri ngaati,
“Vakandidzvinyirira zvikuru kubva pauduku hwangu,
asi havana kundikunda.
Varimi vakarima musana wangu
vakaita miforo yavo mirefu.”
Asi Jehovha akarurama,
akandisunungura pamabote avakaipa.
Vose vanovenga Zioni
ngavadzorerwe shure nenyadzi.
Ngavaite souswa pamusoro pedenga remba,
hunooma husati hwakura;
mukohwi haangazadzi maoko ake nahwo,
uye anounganidza haangazadzi maoko ake.
Vanopfuura nepo ngavarege kuti,
“Maropafadzo aJehovha ngaave pamusoro pako;
tinokuropafadza muzita raJehovha.”
Ndinodanidzira kwamuri Jehovha,
ndiri pakadzika;
haiwa Jehovha, inzwai inzwi rangu.
Nzeve dzenyu ngadzinzwe kuchemera kwangu ngoni.
Dai imi, iyemi Jehovha, maironda zvakaipa zvomunhu,
haiwa Jehovha, ndianiko aimira?
Asi kwamuri kune kukanganwira;
naizvozvo imi munotyiwa.
Ndinomirira Jehovha, mweya wangu unomirira,
uye tariro yangu iri mushoko rake.
Mweya wangu unorindira Ishe
kupfuura varindi
vanomirira rungwanani.
Haiwa Israeri, isa tariro yako muna Jehovha,
nokuti Jehovha ane rudo rusingaperi
uye kwaari kune dzikinuro izere.
Iye pachake achadzikinura Israeri
kubva pazvivi zvavo zvose.
Haiwa Jehovha, mwoyo wangu hauzvikudzi,
meso angu haana manyawi;
handina hanya nezvinhu zvikuru
kana zvinhu zvinonyanya kushamisa.
Asi ndakadzikamisa uye ndakanyaradza mweya wangu;
somwana akarumurwa namai vake,
somwana akarumurwa, ndizvo zvakaita mweya wangu mandiri.
Haiwa Israeri, isai tariro yenyu pana Jehovha,
kubva zvino nokusingaperi.
Haiwa Jehovha, rangarirai Dhavhidhi
namatambudziko ake ose aakasangana nawo.
Akapika mhiko kuna Jehovha,
akaita mhiko kuna Wamasimba waJakobho achiti,
“Handingapindi mumba mangu
kana kuenda kundovata pamubhedha wangu,
handingatenderi hope mumaziso angu,
kana kutsumwaira mumeso angu,
kusvikira ndawana nzvimbo yaJehovha,
nzvimbo yokugara yoWamasimba waJakobho.”
Takazvinzwa muEfurata,
takasangana nazvo muminda yeJaari tikati,
“Ngatiendei kunzvimbo yake yokugara;
ngatinamatei pachitsiko chetsoka dzake,
haiwa Jehovha, simukai muuye kunzvimbo yenyu yokuzorora,
imi neareka yesimba renyu.
Vaprista venyu dai vafukidzwa nokururama;
dai vatsvene venyu vaimba nomufaro.”
Nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wenyu,
musaramba muzodziwa wenyu.
Jehovha akapika mhiko kuna Dhavhidhi,
mhiko yechokwadi yaasingagoni kushandura achiti,
“Mumwe wechizvarwa chako
ndichamugadza pachigaro chako choushe,
kana vanakomana vako vakachengeta sungano yangu
nezvandakatema zvandakavadzidzisa,
ipapo vanakomana vavo
vachagara pachigaro chako choushe nokusingaperi-peri.”
Nokuti Jehovha akasarudza Zioni,
akarida kuti huve ugaro hwake achiti,
“Iyi ndiyo nzvimbo yangu yokuzorora nokusingaperi-peri;
ipapa ndipo pandichagara samambo, nokuti ndakapada,
ndichariropafadza nezvakawanda;
ndichagutsa varombo varo nezvokudya.
Ndichafukidza vaprista varo noruponeso,
uye vatsvene varo vachagara vachiimba nomufaro.
“Pano ndipo pandichameresa nyanga yaDhavhidhi,
uye ndichatungidza mwenje womuzodziwa wangu.
Ndichafukidza vavengi vake nenyadzi,
asi korona yake ichabwinya kwazvo.”
Zvakanaka uye zvinofadza sei
kana hama dzichigara pamwe chete mukubatana!
Zvakafanana namafuta anokosha adururirwa pamusoro,
anoerera kundebvu,
anoerera kundebvu dzaAroni,
anoburukira kusvikira pamipendero yenguo dzake.
Zvinoita sokuti dova reHerimoni
riri kuwira pamusoro peGomo reZioni.
Nokuti ndipo pakaiswa kuropafadza kwaJehovha,
ihwo upenyu husingaperi-peri.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi varanda vose vaJehovha,
vanoshumira usiku muimba yaJehovha.
Simudzai maoko enyu munzvimbo tsvene,
murumbidze Jehovha.
Dai Jehovha, iye Muiti wedenga napasi,
akuropafadzai kubva paZioni.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Rumbidzai zita raJehovha;
murumbidzei, imi varanda vaJehovha,
imi munoshumira muimba yaJehovha,
muvanze dzeimba yaMwari wedu.
Rumbidzai Jehovha, nokuti Jehovha akanaka;
imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza, nokuti ndizvo zvakanaka.
Nokuti Jehovha akasarudza Jakobho kuti ave wake,
naIsraeri kuti ave pfuma yake.
Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha mukuru,
uye kuti Ishe wedu mukuru kupfuura vamwari vose.
Jehovha anoita zvose zvinomufadza,
kudenga napasi,
nomumakungwa napakadzika pose.
Anoita kuti makore akwire kubva kumagumo enyika;
anotumira mheni nemvura,
uye anobudisa mhepo kubva mumatura ake.
Ndiye akaparadza matangwe eIjipiti,
matangwe avanhu neemhuka.
Akatumira zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvake mukati mako,
iwe Ijipiti, pamusoro paFaro navaranda vake vose.
Akaparadza ndudzi dzakawanda
uye akauraya madzimambo ane simba,
Sihoni mambo weAmori,
Ogi mambo weBhashani
namadzimambo ose eKenani,
akapa nyika yavo kuti ive nhaka,
nhaka yavanhu vake Israeri.
Haiwa Jehovha, zita renyu rinogara nokusingaperi,
mukurumbira wenyu, imi Jehovha, kuzvizvarwa zvose.
Nokuti Jehovha achapupurira vanhu vake
uye achava nenyasha pamusoro pavaranda vake.
Zvifananidzo zvendudzi isirivha negoridhe,
zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu.
Zvine miromo, asi hazvigoni kutaura,
zvina meso, asi hazvigoni kuona;
nenzeve, asi hazvigoni kunzwa,
uye hamuna kufema mumuromo mazvo.
Vaya vanozviita vachafanana nazvo,
saizvozvowo, naivo vanovimba nazvo.
Haiwa imi imba yaIsraeri, rumbidzai Jehovha;
haiwa imba yaAroni, rumbidzai Jehovha;
Haiwa imi imba yaRevhi, rumbidzai Jehovha;
imi vanomutya, rumbidzai Jehovha.
Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe kubva kuZioni,
iye agere muJerusarema.
Rumbidzai Jehovha.
Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka:
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Vongai Mwari wavamwari:
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Vongai Ishe wamadzishe:
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye oga anoita zvishamiso zvikuru,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akaita matenga nokunzwisisa kwake,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akatambanudza nyika pamusoro pemvura zhinji,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akaita zviedza zvikuru,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
zuva kuti ribate ushe masikati,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
mwedzi nenyeredzi kuti zvibate ushe usiku;
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akarova matangwe eIjipiti,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
uye akabudisa Israeri kubva pakati pavo,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
noruoko rune simba uye noruoko rwakatambanudzwa,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akaparadzanisa Gungwa Dzvuku napakati,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
uye akayambutsa Israeri napakati paro,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
asi akakukura Faro nehondo yake muGungwa Dzvuku;
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
iye akatungamirira vanhu vake nomugwenga,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
akarova madzimambo makuru,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
uye akauraya madzimambo ane simba,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Sihoni mambo wavaAmori,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
naOgi mambo weBhashani,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
akavapa nyika yavo senhaka,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
nhaka kumuranda wake Israeri.
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Iye akatirangarira pakudzikisirwa kwedu,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
uye akatisunungura kubva pavavengi vedu,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
uye anopa zvokudya kuzvisikwa zvose.
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Vongai Mwari wokudenga,
Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.
Panzizi dzeBhabhironi takagarapo tikachema,
patakarangarira Zioni.
Pamikonachando apo
ndipo patakaturika mbira dzedu,
nokuti ipapo avo vakatitapa vakatikumbira nziyo,
vatambudzi vedu vakatigombedzera kuti tiimbe nziyo dzomufaro, vakati,
“Tiimbirei rumwe rwiyo rweZioni!”
Tingaimba seiko nziyo dzaJehovha
tiri munyika yokumwe?
Kana ndikakukanganwa, iwe Jerusarema,
ruoko rwangu rworudyi ngarukanganwe umhizha hwarwo.
Rurimi rwangu ngarunamatire kumusoro kwomuromo wangu,
kana ndikasakurangarira iwe,
kana ndisingafungi Jerusarema,
iwo mufaro wangu wapamusoro-soro.
Haiwa Jehovha, rangarirai henyu zvakaitwa navaEdhomu,
pazuva rakawa Jerusarema.
Vakati, “Rikoromorei! Rikoromorei
kusvikira panheyo dzaro!”
Haiwa Mwanasikana weBhabhironi, watongerwa kuparadzwa,
achafara munhu uyo achatsiva
kwauri zvawakaita kwatiri,
iye achatora pwere dzako
agodzirovera pamatombo.
Haiwa Jehovha, makandinzvera
uye munondiziva.
Munoziva nguva yandinogara neyandinosimuka;
munonzwisisa pfungwa dzangu muri kure.
Munonzvera kubuda kwangu nokuvata kwangu pasi;
munoziva nzira dzangu dzose.
Shoko risati rava parurimi rwangu,
tarirai, imi Jehovha, munoriziva rose.
Munondikomberedza shure nemberi;
makaisa ruoko rwenyu pamusoro pangu.
Kuziva kwakadai kunondishamisa,
kwakanyanya kukwirira zvokuti handingasvikiri.
Ndingaendepiko kuti ndibve paMweya wenyu?
Ndingatizirepiko kuti ndibve pamberi penyu?
Kana ndikakwira kumatenga, imi muriko;
kana ndikawarira mubhedha wangu kwakadzika, imi muriko.
Kana ndikasimuka namapapiro amambakwedza,
kana ndikandogara kumagumo egungwa,
kunyange ipapo ruoko rwenyu runondisesedza,
ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runondimbundikira.
Kana ndikati, “Zvirokwazvo rima richandivanza,
uye chiedza chinondikomberedza chichava usiku kwandiri,”
kunyange rima haringavi rima kwamuri;
usiku huchapenya samasikati,
nokuti rima rakaita sechiedza kwamuri.
Nokuti imi makasika zvomukatikati mangu;
makandiruka ndiri mudumbu ramai vangu.
Ndinokurumbidzai nokuti ndakaitwa nomutoo unotyisa uye unoshamisa;
mabasa enyu anoshamisa,
ndinonyatsozviziva kwazvo.
Mapfupa angu akanga asina kuvanzika kwamuri,
pandakanga ndaiswa munzvimbo yakavanda.
Pandakarukwa ndiri pakadzika penyika,
meso enyu akaona muviri usati waumbwa.
Mazuva ose andakarongerwa
akanga akanyorwa mubhuku renyu,
rimwe rawo risati ravapo.
Mirangariro yenyu inokosha sei kwandiri, imi Mwari!
Yakakura sei pakuverengwa kwayo!
Dai ndaiverenga,
ingadai yaikunda tsanga dzejecha pakuwanda.
Pandinopepuka,
ndinenge ndinemi.
Dai mukangouraya vakaipa, imi Mwari!
Endai kure neni, imi vanhu vokuteura ropa!
Ivo vanotaura nemi nomurangariro wakaipa;
vadzivisi venyu vanoshandisa zita renyu zvakaipa.
Ko, ini handivengi vanokuvengai here, imi Jehovha,
nokusema vaya vanokumukirai?
Handina chimwe chinhu asi kuvavenga ivo;
ndinovati vavengi vangu.
Ndinzverei, imi Mwari, mugoziva mwoyo wangu;
ndiedzei mugoziva kushuva kwendangariro dzangu.
Muone kana musina nzira yakaipa mandiri,
mugondifambisa munzira isingaperi.
Ndirwirei, imi Jehovha, pavanhu vakaipa;
ndidzivirirei pavanhu vanoita nechisimba.
Ivo vanofunga urongwa hwakaipa mumwoyo yavo,
uye vanomutsa hondo mazuva ose.
Vanorodza ndimi dzavo kuti dzipinze sedzenyoka;
uturu hwenyoka yechiva huri pamiromo yavo. Sera
Ndichengetei, imi Jehovha, kubva mumaoko avakaipa;
ndidzivirirei pavanhu vanoita nechisimba
vanoronga kupinga tsoka dzangu.
Vanhu vanozvikudza vakandivanzira misungo;
vakatambanudza mabote emimbure yavo
uye vakateya ugombe munzira yandinofamba nayo. Sera
Haiwa Jehovha, ndinoti kwamuri, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.”
Haiwa Jehovha, inzwai kuchemera nyasha kwangu.
Haiwa Ishe Jehovha, imi mudzikinuri wangu ane simba,
anofukidza musoro wangu pazuva rehondo,
regai kupa vakaipa zvavanoda, imi Jehovha;
musarega urongwa hwavo huchibudirira,
kuti varege kuzvikudza. Sera
Misoro yaavo vakandipoteredza
